fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the administrative user. Used for internal system references and relationships.

fields.name: email
fields.description: Primary email address for the administrative user account. Must be unique across all users and serves as the primary authentication identifier.

fields.name: gender
fields.description: Gender identity of the administrative user. Used for personalization and demographic reporting where applicable. Supports standard gender classifications with unknown as default for privacy.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: First name of the administrative user. Used for personalization and identification in administrative interfaces. Maximum length of 30 characters.

fields.name: middleName
fields.description: Middle name or initial of the administrative user. Optional field for complete name representation in formal communications. Maximum length of 20 characters.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: Last name (surname) of the administrative user. Used for formal identification and sorting in administrative listings. Maximum length of 50 characters.

fields.name: language
fields.description: Preferred language for user interface and communications. Two-letter ISO 639-1 language code that determines the language for system notifications and interface elements. Maximum length of 2 characters.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: Contact phone number for the administrative user. Primary phone number for urgent communications and two-factor authentication. Maximum length of 30 characters.

fields.name: job
fields.description: Job title or role description of the administrative user. Professional title that helps identify the user's responsibilities and authority level within the organization. Maximum length of 30 characters.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the administrative user account was created. Used for audit trails and account lifecycle tracking.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description: Identifier of the user who created this administrative account. Used for audit trails and accountability tracking.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the administrative user account was last modified. Automatically updated whenever profile information changes.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description: Identifier of the user who last modified this administrative account. Used for audit trails and change tracking.

fields.name: tenants
fields.description:
Retrieve organizational associations for the administrative user with pagination support.

    Returns all organizations the user has access to or is associated with. For admin users, returns all unique tenants in the system. For regular users, returns only their assigned tenants.

    Possible errors:
    - No specific errors - this field resolver handles all cases gracefully

args.name: input
args.description: Pagination parameters for retrieving user's organizational associations. If not provided, default pagination settings will be applied.

fields.name: ticketsAssigned
fields.description: Retrieve all tickets assigned to the administrative user.

types.name: ID
types.description: The `ID` scalar type represents a unique identifier, often used to refetch an object or as key for a cache. The ID type appears in a JSON response as a String; however, it is not intended to be human-readable. When expected as an input type, any string (such as `"4"`) or integer (such as `4`) input value will be accepted as an ID.

types.name: AdminUserSortField
types.description: Available fields for sorting administrative user search results. Enables ordering by temporal attributes for chronological analysis and audit purposes.

enumValues.name: CREATED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by the date and time when the administrative user account was created. Useful for identifying newest or oldest user accounts.

enumValues.name: LAST_MODIFIED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by the date and time when the administrative user account was last modified. Useful for identifying recently updated user profiles.

types.name: AdminUserSortInput
types.description: Sorting configuration for administrative user search results. Defines both the field to sort by and the sort direction for organizing user listings.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description: Field to sort administrative users by. Supports sorting by various user attributes including personal information, timestamps, and system identifiers. Must be one of the available AdminUserSortField enum values.

inputFields.name: order
inputFields.description: Sort direction for the specified field. Ascending order sorts from lowest to highest values, while descending order sorts from highest to lowest values. Must be either ASC or DESC.

types.name: AdminUsersSearchInput
types.description: Search and pagination parameters for retrieving administrative users. Supports filtering by dates, pagination controls, and custom sorting options for comprehensive user management.

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description: Page number for pagination. Must be a positive integer starting from 1. Used to navigate through multiple pages of administrative user results. Minimum value is 1.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description: Number of results per page. Controls how many administrative users are returned in a single request. Used for pagination and performance optimization. Must be a positive integer with reasonable limits for performance.

inputFields.name: createdAt
inputFields.description: Filter administrative users by their account creation date. Supports date range queries with before, after, and exact date matching for audit and reporting purposes.

inputFields.name: lastModifiedAt
inputFields.description: Filter administrative users by their last modification date. Supports date range queries to find recently updated user profiles for change tracking and audit purposes.

inputFields.name: sortInputs
inputFields.description: Sorting criteria for administrative user results. Supports multiple sort fields with ascending or descending order. Applied in the order specified to create complex sorting behavior.

fields.name: default

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description: Identifier of the user who created this organizational entity. Used for audit trails and accountability tracking in organizational management.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the organizational entity was last modified. Automatically updated whenever configuration or settings change.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description: Identifier of the user who last modified this organizational entity. Used for audit trails and change tracking in organizational management.

fields.name: user
fields.description: Administrative user associated with this organizational entity. Represents the primary administrator responsible for organizational management and configuration.

fields.name: tenantInfo

Provides access to tenant configuration and settings in federated queries.

Defines the structure, behavior, and webhook integration for an agent that handles user interactions through chat or button triggers, supporting both single-turn and multi-turn conversation patterns.

Provides complete configuration for a new agent including localized content, webhook integration, authentication, and behavioral settings.

Localized button labels for the agent.

Classification types for the agent.

inputFields.description: Trigger mechanism that activates the agent interaction.

inputFields.description: Interaction mode defining the conversational pattern.

Username for HTTP Basic Authentication.

Password for HTTP Basic Authentication.

types.name: AgentInteractionMode
types.description:
Interaction mode defining the conversational pattern of the agent.

Determines whether the agent handles single request-response exchanges or maintains ongoing multi-turn conversations with context.

enumValues.name: SINGLE_TURN
enumValues.description:
Agent handles single request-response exchanges.

Each interaction is independent with no conversation history, suitable for stateless operations like data lookups, one-time actions, and simple queries.

enumValues.name: MULTI_TURN
enumValues.description:
Agent maintains ongoing conversations with context.

Supports multi-message dialogues with conversation history, enabling complex workflows, follow-up questions, and contextual interactions.

types.name: AgentMessage
types.description: Represents a message exchange within an agent conversation.

fields.name: conversationId
fields.description: ID. Webhook response must contain a non blank field called conversationId.

fields.name: responseMessage
fields.description: Response message from the agent. Webhook response must contain a non blank field called responseMessage.

fields.name: responseMetadata
fields.description: Metadata associated with the response message. Webhook response can contain a field called responseMetadata.

Input data for sending a message to an agent.

inputFields.description: Message to send to the agent via webhook in a field named requestMessage.

inputFields.name: requestMetadata
inputFields.description: Metadata to send to the agent via webhook in a field named requestMetadata

inputFields.name: type
inputFields.description: Type of interaction. Must match one of the agent's configured types.

inputFields.name: conversationId
inputFields.description: Conversation ID. Sent in webhook request in a field named conversationId.

types.name: Attribute
types.description:
Base interface for all attribute types across different entity classes.

Attributes provide extensible metadata and properties for various entities in the system. Each attribute is associated with a specific entity type and contains typed values based on its attribute description schema.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute instance.

Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for this specific attribute. Used to reference and manage individual attribute instances.

fields.name: value
fields.description:
The actual value data stored in this attribute.

Contains the attribute value in the appropriate format based on the attribute description's type definition. The value structure varies depending on the attribute type (text, enum, color, etc.).

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when this attribute was originally created.

Records the exact date and time when this attribute instance was first created in the system. Used for audit trails and data lifecycle management.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when this attribute was last modified.

Records the most recent date and time when any changes were made to this attribute's value or configuration. Updated automatically on each modification.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who created this attribute.

References the user account that originally created this attribute instance. May be 0 for system-generated attributes or when user information is not available.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who last modified this attribute.

References the user account that made the most recent changes to this attribute. May be 0 for system modifications or when user information is not available.

fields.name: attributeDescription
fields.description:
Retrieve the attribute description that defines this attribute's schema and behavior.

Returns the complete attribute description containing metadata, type definitions, display configuration, and localization settings. This description serves as the template that defines how this attribute should behave and be presented.

Essential for understanding attribute constraints, available operations, and presentation requirements. Used by client applications for form generation, validation, and display formatting.

types.name: AttributeAttributeDescriptionSearchInput
types.description:
Advanced search filters for attribute descriptions with comprehensive filtering capabilities.

Provides detailed filtering options based on attribute description metadata including IDs, names, types, groups, and visibility settings. Enables precise attribute discovery through multiple criteria combinations for efficient attribute management and discovery operations.

Perfect for building attribute management interfaces where users need to find specific attribute descriptions based on various characteristics and properties.

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description:
Specific attribute description identifiers to filter by.

Array of UUID strings representing exact attribute descriptions to include in results. Use this when you need to retrieve specific attribute descriptions by their unique identifiers. Array must contain unique values and be non-empty when provided.

inputFields.name: names
inputFields.description:
Specific attribute description names to filter by.

Array of attribute description names in SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE format. Use this when you need to retrieve attribute descriptions by their human-readable names. Array must contain unique values and be non-empty when provided.

inputFields.name: types
inputFields.description:
Attribute description data types to filter by.

Array of AttributeType enum values to filter attribute descriptions by their data type. Use this to find all attribute descriptions that handle specific data types like text, enum, integer, decimal, datetime, or color. Array must contain unique values and be non-empty when provided.

inputFields.name: groups
inputFields.description:
Logical grouping identifiers to filter by.

Filter attribute descriptions by their group assignments. Groups help organize related attributes together for better management and display.

inputFields.name: isSearchable
inputFields.description:
Filter by searchable capability.

When true, returns only attribute descriptions that are enabled for search and filtering operations. When false, returns only non-searchable descriptions.

inputFields.name: isPublic
inputFields.description:
Filter by public visibility.

When true, returns only attribute descriptions that are displayed in public interfaces. When false, returns only non-public descriptions.

inputFields.name: isHidden
inputFields.description:
Filter by hidden status.

When true, returns only attribute descriptions that are hidden from user interfaces. When false, returns only visible descriptions.

inputFields.name: isSystem
inputFields.description:
Filter by system-level access.

When true, returns only attribute descriptions that require system-level permissions. When false, returns only non-system descriptions.

inputFields.name: term
inputFields.description:
Free-text search term to filter by.

Performs a full-text search across attribute description fields. Use this to find attribute descriptions that match a specific keyword or phrase.

inputFields.name: termFields
inputFields.description:
Fields to search in when using the term filter.

Specifies which fields should be included in the full-text search when a term is provided. Defaults to searching in all fields. Array must contain unique values and be non-empty when provided.

inputFields.name: termLanguages
inputFields.description:
Languages to search in when using the term filter.

Specifies which languages should be included in the full-text search when a term is provided. All languages are included by default. Array must contain unique values and be non-empty when provided.

types.name: AttributeAttributeDescriptionTermField
types.description: Available fields for searching attribute descriptions with full-text search

enumValues.name: NAME
enumValues.description: Search by attribute description name for easy browsing and discovery

enumValues.name: DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description: Search by attribute description text for finding specific attribute descriptions

types.name: AttributeBulkCreateInput
types.description:
Input for bulk attribute operations with flexible attribute description referencing.

Supports bulk attribute creation, updates, and deletion with the ability to reference attribute descriptions by either ID or name. When no value is provided, the existing attribute is deleted and the default value from the attribute description applies.

Perfect for bulk operations where you need to process multiple attributes efficiently while maintaining data consistency and validation against attribute description rules.

inputFields.name: attributeDescriptionId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the attribute description.

Reference to an existing attribute description by its UUID. Use this when you know the exact ID of the attribute description template to use.

inputFields.name: attributeDescriptionName
inputFields.description:
Name of the attribute description.

Reference to an existing attribute description by its name. Must be in SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE format. Use this when you prefer to reference by name instead of ID.

inputFields.name: value
inputFields.description:
The value of the attribute for bulk operations.

When provided, creates or updates the attribute with this value. When omitted, the attribute will be deleted and the default value from the attribute description will apply.

fields.name: id
fields.description: ID of the created or updated attribute description

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the created or updated attribute description

fields.name: message
fields.description: Success or error message

fields.name: key
fields.description: Name of the attribute description the attribute is created for

fields.name: value
fields.description: The value for this attribute

fields.name: action
fields.description: Action performed on the attribute description

fields.name: success
fields.description: Whether the action was successful or not

fields.name: productId
fields.description: The productId of the attribute value

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description: The categoryId of the attribute value

fields.name: clusterId
fields.description: The clusterId of the attribute value

fields.name: companyId
fields.description: The companyId of the attribute value

fields.name: contactId
fields.description: The contactId of the attribute value

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: The customerId of the attribute value

types.name: AttributeColorValue
types.description:
Color-based attribute value storing hexadecimal color codes for visual attributes.

Stores color information as validated hexadecimal color codes. Perfect for product colors, theme colors, design attributes, or any visual property that requires precise color specification.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute value instance.

Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for this specific attribute value. Used to reference and manage individual attribute value instances across the system.

fields.name: type
fields.description:
Type identifier for color-based attribute values.

Always set to color for this value type. Used for type discrimination and validation in polymorphic attribute value handling.

fields.name: colorValue
fields.description:
Hexadecimal color code representing the color value.

Stores color information as a validated hex string in the format #RRGGBB or #RGB. Perfect for product colors, theme settings, or any visual attribute requiring precise color specification.

types.name: AttributeCreateInput
types.description:
Input for creating new attributes with values and entity associations.

Provides comprehensive attribute creation capabilities, entity association, and value constraints. The input ensures that exactly one entity ID is specified and that the value structure matches the referenced attribute description's requirements.

Supports all attribute types (text, enum, integer, decimal, datetime, color) and all entity classes (product, category, cluster, company, contact, customer). The creation process establishes proper entity relationships.

inputFields.name: attributeDescriptionId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the attribute description that defines this attribute.

References the attribute description that contains the metadata, type, and configuration for this attribute. Must be a valid UUID format.

inputFields.name: value
inputFields.description:
The actual value data for this attribute.

Contains the attribute value in the appropriate format based on the attribute description's type. The value structure must match the type specified in the referenced attribute description.

inputFields.name: customerId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the customer this attribute belongs to.

Specify this field when creating a customer-specific attribute. Must be a positive integer representing a valid customer ID. Only one entity ID should be provided per attribute creation.

inputFields.name: contactId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the contact this attribute belongs to.

Specify this field when creating a contact-specific attribute. Must be a positive integer representing a valid contact ID. Only one entity ID should be provided per attribute creation.

inputFields.name: companyId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the company this attribute belongs to.

Specify this field when creating a company-specific attribute. Must be a positive integer representing a valid company ID. Only one entity ID should be provided per attribute creation.

inputFields.name: productId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the product this attribute belongs to.

Specify this field when creating a product-specific attribute. Must be a positive integer representing a valid product ID. Only one entity ID should be provided per attribute creation.

inputFields.name: clusterId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the cluster this attribute belongs to.

Specify this field when creating a cluster-specific attribute. Must be a positive integer representing a valid cluster ID. Only one entity ID should be provided per attribute creation.

inputFields.name: categoryId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the category this attribute belongs to.

Specify this field when creating a category-specific attribute. Must be a positive integer representing a valid category ID. Only one entity ID should be provided per attribute creation.

types.name: AttributeCsvInput
types.description:
Input for importing attributes from CSV file with configurable field mappings.

Supports bulk attribute creation and updates through CSV file processing. Includes validation for file format and field mapping configuration to ensure data integrity during import operations.

inputFields.name: file
inputFields.description:
CSV file containing attribute data for bulk import.

Must be a valid CSV file with proper formatting. The file should contain attribute data that matches the configured field mappings for successful processing.

inputFields.name: mappings
inputFields.description:
Configuration for mapping CSV columns to attribute fields.

Defines how CSV columns should be mapped to attribute properties. Array must contain unique mappings and each mapping must be properly validated. When not provided, default field mappings will be used.

types.name: AttributeCsvMapping
types.description:
Mapping configuration for CSV import operations linking CSV columns to attribute fields.

Defines how CSV file columns should be mapped to attribute properties during import operations. Each mapping connects a CSV header name to a specific attribute field, enabling flexible CSV formats and data transformation during import.

Essential for CSV import operations to ensure proper data mapping and validation during bulk attribute processing.

inputFields.name: csvHeader
inputFields.description:
Name of the column header in the CSV file.

Must match exactly with the column header in the uploaded CSV file. Case-sensitive string that identifies which CSV column contains the data for the mapped attribute field.

inputFields.name: fieldName
inputFields.description:
Target attribute field that the CSV column should map to.

Specifies which attribute property should receive the data from the corresponding CSV column. Must be a valid AttributeFieldName enum value that defines the available attribute fields for mapping.

types.name: AttributeDateTimeValue
types.description:
Date and time-based attribute value for temporal data with timezone support.

Stores date and time information in ISO 8601 format with timezone awareness. Perfect for timestamps, expiration dates, event scheduling, deadlines, or any time-sensitive attribute data requiring precise temporal representation.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute value instance.

Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for this specific attribute value. Used to reference and manage individual attribute value instances across the system.

fields.name: type
fields.description:
Type identifier for date and time-based attribute values.

Always set to datetime for this value type. Used for type discrimination and validation in polymorphic attribute value handling.

fields.name: dateTimeValue
fields.description:
Date and time value in ISO 8601 format with timezone information.

Stores temporal data with precise date and time information. Perfect for timestamps, expiration dates, event scheduling, or any time-sensitive attribute.

fields.name: min
fields.description:
Minimum decimal value found for this attribute in current results.

The lowest decimal value present in the search results for this attribute, used as the lower bound for precise range filtering controls.

fields.name: max
fields.description:
Maximum decimal value found for this attribute in current results.

The highest decimal value present in the search results for this attribute, used as the upper bound for precise range filtering controls.

types.name: Float
types.description: The `Float` scalar type represents signed double-precision fractional values as specified by [IEEE 754](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IEEE_floating_point).

types.name: AttributeDecimalValue
types.description:
Decimal-based attribute value for floating-point numeric data with precision support.

Stores floating-point decimal values for measurements, prices, weights, percentages, or any numeric data requiring fractional precision. Supports a wide range of decimal values with appropriate precision handling.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute value instance.

Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for this specific attribute value. Used to reference and manage individual attribute value instances across the system.

fields.name: type
fields.description:
Type identifier for decimal-based attribute values.

Always set to decimal for this value type. Used for type discrimination and validation in polymorphic attribute value handling.

fields.name: decimalValue
fields.description:
Decimal value with floating-point precision for fractional numeric data.

Stores numbers with decimal precision, perfect for measurements, prices, weights, percentages, ratios, or any numeric value requiring fractional components.

types.name: AttributeDescription
types.description:
Attribute description schema defining the structure and metadata for attributes.

Serves as a template that defines how attributes should be structured and displayed. Contains type information, the entity type, localization settings, and default values that govern attribute behavior across the system.

An attribute description is the definition/blueprint of an attribute, specifying what entity it applies to (product, company, etc.), what data type it is (text, int, etc.), localized descriptions, and default values. The actual attributes are just the specific values assigned to objects using this description as their template. You must first define the attribute description, then use it to assign values to specific objects.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute description.

This UUID serves as the primary key and is automatically generated when the attribute description is created. Used to reference this description when creating attribute values and establishing relationships.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Human-readable identifier name for this attribute description.

Must be in SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE format with maximum length of 64 characters. Must be unique within the attribute class. Used as a stable reference for the attribute description across different environments.

fields.name: descriptions
fields.description:
Localized human-readable descriptions explaining what this attribute represents.

Provides user-friendly explanations in multiple languages for display in user interfaces and documentation. Each entry contains a language code and the corresponding description text.

fields.name: units
fields.description:
Localized units of measurement for the attribute value.

Specifies the units in which the attribute value is measured (e.g., "cm", "kg", "pieces") in multiple languages. Only applicable for numeric attribute types.

fields.name: attributeClass
fields.description:
Entity type that this attribute description applies to. One of: [product, category, cluster, customer, contact, company]

Specifies which type of resource can have attribute value based on this description. Each class has its own namespace for attribute names.

fields.name: type
fields.description:
The type of the attribute. One of: [TEXT, ENUM, COLOR, DATETIME, INT, DECIMAL]

Determines how attribute values are stored depending on what this attribute is used for.

fields.name: valuesetId
fields.description:
Reference to a valueset that provides predefined options when the attribute type is ENUM.

Required for ENUM-type attributes to define the available selection options. The referenced valueset should already exist and contain valueset items that define the valid choices users can select when assigning attribute values to objects.

fields.name: group
fields.description:
Logical grouping identifier for related attributes.

Used to organize attributes into categories for better management and user interface organization. Attributes in the same group are typically displayed together.

fields.name: isSearchable
fields.description:
Enable this attribute for search and filtering operations.

When true, attributes based on this description can be used in search filters and faceted navigation. Useful for attributes that help users find and filter products or other resources.

fields.name: isPublic
fields.description:
Make this attribute visible to end users.

When true, attributes based on this description are displayed in public interfaces like product specifications. When false, they are only visible to administrative users.

fields.name: isSystem
fields.description:
Restrict access to system administrators only.

When true, only users with system-level permissions can view and modify attributes based on this description. Used for internal system attributes.

fields.name: isHidden
fields.description:
Hide this attribute from all user interfaces.

When true, attributes based on this description are completely hidden from user interfaces and are only used for internal processing and background operations.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Date and time this attribute description was created.

Timestamp of when the attribute description was first created in the system. Used for auditing and tracking the creation history of attribute descriptions.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Date and time this attribute description was last modified.

Timestamp of when the attribute description was last updated in the system. Used for auditing and tracking the modification history of attribute descriptions.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description:
ID of the user that created this attribute description.

References the user ID of the user who created the attribute description. Used for auditing and tracking the creation history of attribute descriptions.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description:
ID of the user that last modified this attribute description.

References the user ID of the user who last modified the attribute description. Used for auditing and tracking the modification history of attribute descriptions.

fields.name: defaultValue
fields.description:
Default value configuration for attributes based on this description.

Specifies the initial value that will be assigned to new attributes created from this description. The value type must match the attribute type specified above.

types.name: AttributeDescriptionClass
types.description: Entity types that the attribute or the attribute description belongs to

enumValues.name: PRODUCT
enumValues.description: Product-specific attributes for specifications, features, variants, and customizable product properties that extend the base product schema

enumValues.name: CATEGORY
enumValues.description: Category-level attributes for classification metadata, display properties, and category-specific configuration that applies to the category

enumValues.name: CLUSTER
enumValues.description: Product cluster attributes for grouped product characteristics, shared properties, and cluster-wide configuration that spans multiple related products

enumValues.name: CUSTOMER
enumValues.description: Customer-specific attributes for personalization, preferences, behavioral data, and customer relationship management that enhances customer profiles

enumValues.name: CONTACT
enumValues.description: Contact person attributes for extended contact information, relationship data, communication preferences, and professional details

enumValues.name: COMPANY
enumValues.description: Company-level attributes for business metadata, organizational properties, compliance data, and enterprise-specific configuration

types.name: AttributeDescriptionCreateInput
types.description:
Input for creating new attribute descriptions with comprehensive configuration options.

Provides complete attribute description creation capabilities including type definition, localization, visibility settings, and default values. The input ensures proper attribute schema definition with all necessary metadata for attribute management and usage.

Supports all attribute types, entity class assignment, and comprehensive configuration options for search, visibility, and access control. The creation process validates all inputs and establishes proper attribute description templates for future attribute creation.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier name for the attribute description.

Must be in SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE format using only uppercase letters, numbers, and underscores. Maximum length is 64 characters. This name serves as a human-readable identifier and must be unique within the attribute class.

inputFields.name: descriptions
inputFields.description:
Localized human-readable descriptions of the attribute.

Provide user-friendly descriptions in multiple languages to explain what this attribute represents. Array must not be empty and contain at least the default language. These descriptions are used in user interfaces and documentation.

inputFields.name: units
inputFields.description:
Localized unit of measurement for the attribute value.

Specify the units in which the attribute value is measured (e.g., "cm", "kg", "pieces"). Only applicable for numeric attribute types.

inputFields.name: type
inputFields.description:
The type of the attribute. One of: [TEXT, ENUM, COLOR, DATETIME, INT, DECIMAL]

Determines how attribute values are stored depending on what this attribute is used for.

inputFields.name: attributeClass
inputFields.description:
Entity type that this attribute description applies to.

Specifies which type of resource can have attributes based on this description. Each class has its own namespace for attribute names, ensuring name uniqueness within each entity type.

inputFields.name: valuesetId
inputFields.description:
Reference to a valueset for ENUM type attributes with predefined options.

Required when type is ENUM. Links to a predefined set of allowed values that defines the valid options for enum attributes. The valueset contains the selectable options that users can choose from. Must reference an existing valueset that contains appropriate options for the intended use case.

inputFields.name: group
inputFields.description:
Logical grouping identifier for related attributes.

Used to organize attributes into categories for better management and user interface organization. Attributes in the same group are typically displayed together.

inputFields.name: isSearchable
inputFields.description:
Enable this attribute for search and filtering operations.

When true, attributes based on this description can be used in search filters and faceted navigation. Useful for attributes that help users find and filter products or other resources.

inputFields.name: isPublic
inputFields.description:
Make this attribute visible to end users.

When true, attributes based on this description are displayed in public interfaces like product specifications. When false, they are only visible to administrative users.

inputFields.name: isSystem
inputFields.description:
Restrict access to system administrators only.

When true, only users with system-level permissions can view and modify attributes based on this description. Used for internal system attributes.

inputFields.name: isHidden
inputFields.description:
Hide this attribute from all user interfaces.

When true, attributes based on this description are completely hidden from user interfaces and are only used for internal processing and background operations.

inputFields.name: defaultValue
inputFields.description:
Default value configuration for attributes based on this description.

Specifies the initial value that will be assigned to new attributes created from this description. The value type must match the attribute type specified above.

types.name: AttributeDescriptionCsvInput
types.description:
Input for importing attribute descriptions from CSV file with configurable field mappings.

Supports bulk attribute description creation and updates through CSV file processing. The file should contain attribute description schema data that matches the configured field mappings for successful processing.

inputFields.name: file
inputFields.description:
Input for importing attribute descriptions from CSV file with configurable field mappings.

Supports bulk attribute description creation and updates through CSV file processing. The file should contain attribute description schema data that matches the configured field mappings for successful processing.

inputFields.name: mappings
inputFields.description:
Configuration for mapping CSV columns to attribute description fields.

Defines how CSV columns should be mapped to attribute description properties. Array must contain unique mappings and each mapping must be properly validated. When not provided, default field mappings will be used.

types.name: AttributeDescriptionCsvMapping
types.description:
Mapping configuration for CSV import operations linking CSV columns to attribute description fields.

Defines how CSV file columns should be mapped to attribute description properties during import operations. Each mapping connects a CSV header name to a specific attribute description field, enabling flexible CSV formats and data transformation during bulk attribute description processing.

inputFields.name: csvHeader
inputFields.description:
Name of the column header in the CSV file.

Must match exactly with the column header in the uploaded CSV file. Case-sensitive string that identifies which CSV column contains the data for the mapped attribute description field.

inputFields.name: fieldName
inputFields.description:
Target attribute description field that the CSV column should map to.

Specifies which attribute description property should receive the data from the corresponding CSV column. Must be a valid AttributeDescriptionFieldName enum value that defines the available attribute description fields for mapping.

enumValues.name: NAME
enumValues.description: [Required][String] Descriptive identifier (Screaming Snake Case)

enumValues.name: DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description: [Required][Object] Attribute descriptions per language

enumValues.name: UNIT
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] Attribute unit per language

enumValues.name: LANGUAGE
enumValues.description: [Required][String] The language of the attribute

enumValues.name: TYPE
enumValues.description: [Required][String] Attribute type. One of: [text, enum, color, datetime, integer, decimal]

enumValues.name: ATTRIBUTE_CLASS
enumValues.description: [Required][Enum] Attribute class. One of: [product, category, cluster, customer, contact, company], must be one of the following: [product, category, cluster, customer, contact, company]

enumValues.name: VALUESET_ID
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] The ID of the connected valueset to use when type is ENUM

enumValues.name: GROUP
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] The attribute group

enumValues.name: IS_SEARCHABLE
enumValues.description: [Optional][Boolean] Flags whether this attribute should be used when generating catalog page filters

enumValues.name: IS_PUBLIC
enumValues.description: [Optional][Boolean] Flags whether this attribute should be used when generating product specifications

enumValues.name: IS_SYSTEM
enumValues.description: [Optional][Boolean] Flags whether this attribute is only available to system users

enumValues.name: IS_HIDDEN
enumValues.description: [Optional][Boolean] Flags whether this attribute is hidden and should only be used for background operations

enumValues.name: TEXT_VALUES
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] Attribute value descriptions per language, required for TEXT type attributes

enumValues.name: TEXT_VALUES_LANGUAGE
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] Attribute value descriptions per language, required for TEXT type attributes

enumValues.name: ENUM_VALUES
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] Attribute enum values, required for ENUM type attributes

enumValues.name: INT_VALUE
enumValues.description: [Optional][Integer] Attribute integer value, required for INTEGER type attributes

enumValues.name: DECIMAL_VALUE
enumValues.description: [Optional][Decimal] Attribute decimal value, required for DECIMAL type attributes

enumValues.name: DATE_TIME_VALUE
enumValues.description: [Optional][DateTime] Attribute datetime value, required for DATETIME type attributes in ISO 8601 format 'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ' (e.g., 2024-10-31T09:55:00.000Z)

enumValues.name: COLOR_VALUE
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] Attribute color value, required for COLOR type attributes

types.name: AttributeDescriptionResponse
types.description:
Paginated response containing attribute description search results.

Provides a structured response for attribute description queries including the matching descriptions, pagination metadata, and total count information. Used for attribute description search and listing operations with comprehensive pagination support.

fields.name: items
fields.description: List of items of type AttributeDescription

fields.name: itemsFound
fields.description: Total number of items found

fields.name: offset
fields.description: The amount of items to show per page

fields.name: page
fields.description: The current page

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Total amount of pages

fields.name: start
fields.description: Start position of the current page

fields.name: end
fields.description: End position of the current page

types.name: AttributeDescriptionSearchInput
types.description:
Search criteria for filtering attribute descriptions with comprehensive options.

Provides flexible filtering capabilities for attribute descriptions including ID-based lookups, name matching, class filtering, and type-based searches. Supports pagination and sorting for large result sets.

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description:
Specific attribute description IDs to retrieve.

Filter results to only include attribute descriptions with the specified UUIDs. Array must not be empty when provided and must contain unique values.

inputFields.name: names
inputFields.description:
Specific attribute description names to retrieve.

Filter results to only include attribute descriptions with the specified names. Names must be in SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE format. Array must not be empty when provided and must contain unique values.

inputFields.name: classes
inputFields.description:
Specific attribute description classes to retrieve.

Filter results to only include attribute descriptions with the specified entity classes. Each class maintains its own attribute namespace. Array must not be empty when provided and must contain unique values.

inputFields.name: types
inputFields.description:
Specific attribute description data types to retrieve.

Filter results to only include attribute descriptions with the specified data types. Array must not be empty when provided and must contain unique values.

inputFields.name: groups
inputFields.description:
Specific attribute description groups to retrieve.

Filter results to only include attribute descriptions that belong to the specified groups. Groups are used for organizing related attributes. Array must not be empty when provided and must contain unique values.

inputFields.name: isSearchable
inputFields.description:
Filter by searchable status.

When true, returns only attribute descriptions that are enabled for search and filtering operations. When false, returns only non-searchable attribute descriptions.

inputFields.name: isPublic
inputFields.description:
Filter by public visibility status.

When true, returns only attribute descriptions that are configured to be displayed in product specifications and are visible to end users. When false, returns only attribute descriptions that are not included in public product specifications.

inputFields.name: isHidden
inputFields.description:
Filter by hidden status for background operations.

When true, returns only attribute descriptions that are hidden from user interfaces and used exclusively for background system operations. When false, returns only visible attribute descriptions.

inputFields.name: isSystem
inputFields.description:
Filter by system access restriction.

When true, returns only attribute descriptions that are restricted to administrative users and not accessible to regular users. When false, returns only attribute descriptions available to all user types.

inputFields.name: term
inputFields.description:
Free-text search term to filter by.

Performs a full-text search across attribute description fields. Use this to find attribute descriptions that match a specific keyword or phrase.

inputFields.name: termFields
inputFields.description:
Fields to search in when using the term filter.

Specifies which fields should be included in the full-text search when a term is provided. Defaults to searching in all fields. Array must contain unique values and be non-empty when provided.

inputFields.name: termLanguages
inputFields.description:
Languages to search in when using the term filter.

Specifies which languages should be included in the full-text search when a term is provided. All languages are included by default. Array must contain unique values and be non-empty when provided.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of results to return per page.

Specifies the maximum number of attribute descriptions to include in each page of results. Used in combination with page number to control pagination and result set size. Defaults to 12 if not specified.

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Current page number for paginated results.

Specifies which page of results to retrieve when dealing with large datasets. Page numbers start from 1. Used together with offset to control pagination behavior. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

inputFields.name: sortInputs
inputFields.description:
Sorting criteria for ordering search results.

Defines how the returned attribute descriptions should be ordered. Multiple sort criteria can be applied in sequence. Array must not be empty when provided and must contain unique sorting configurations.

types.name: AttributeDescriptionSortField
types.description: Available fields for sorting attribute description search results with flexible ordering options

enumValues.name: NAME
enumValues.description: Sort by attribute description name alphabetically for easy browsing and discovery

enumValues.name: CREATED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by creation timestamp to see newest or oldest attribute descriptions first

enumValues.name: LAST_MODIFIED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by last modification timestamp to identify recently updated attribute descriptions

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description: The field to sort by

inputFields.name: order
inputFields.description: Order option to sort by. [Default to `ASC`]

types.name: AttributeDescriptionUpdateInput
types.description:
Input for updating an existing attribute description's configuration.

Allows modification of attribute description properties including localized content, visibility settings, and default values. Only provided fields will be updated, others remain unchanged.

inputFields.name: descriptions
inputFields.description:
Updated localized descriptions explaining what this attribute represents.

Provide user-friendly descriptions in multiple languages for display in user interfaces and documentation. Array must not be empty when provided and must contain unique language entries.

inputFields.name: units
inputFields.description:
Updated localized units of measurement for the attribute value.

Specify the units in which the attribute value is measured (e.g., "cm", "kg", "pieces") in multiple languages. Only applicable for numeric attribute types.

inputFields.name: group
inputFields.description:
Updated logical grouping identifier for related attributes.

Used to organize attributes into categories for better management and user interface organization. Maximum length is 64 characters. Attributes in the same group are typically displayed together.

inputFields.name: isSearchable
inputFields.description:
Updated setting for enabling this attribute in search and filtering operations.

When true, attributes based on this description can be used in search filters and faceted navigation. Useful for attributes that help users find and filter products or other resources.

inputFields.name: isPublic
inputFields.description:
Updated setting for making this attribute visible to end users.

When true, attributes based on this description are displayed in public interfaces like product specifications. When false, they are only visible to administrative users.

inputFields.name: isSystem
inputFields.description:
Updated setting for restricting access to system administrators only.

When true, only users with system-level permissions can view and modify attributes based on this description. Used for internal system attributes.

inputFields.name: isHidden
inputFields.description:
Updated setting for hiding this attribute from all user interfaces.

When true, attributes based on this description are completely hidden from user interfaces and are only used for internal processing and background operations.

inputFields.name: defaultValue
inputFields.description:
Updated default value configuration for attributes based on this description.

Specifies the initial value that will be assigned to new attributes created from this description. The value type must match the attribute type specified in the description.

types.name: AttributeEnumValue
types.description:
Enumeration-based attribute value for predefined option selection from valuesets.

Stores one or more selected values from a predefined list of options defined in the associated valueset. Perfect for categories, sizes, colors, statuses, or any controlled vocabulary where users select from predefined choices.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute value instance.

Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for this specific attribute value. Used to reference and manage individual attribute value instances across the system.

fields.name: type
fields.description:
Type identifier for enumeration-based attribute values.

Always set to enum for this value type. Used for type discrimination and validation in polymorphic attribute value handling.

fields.name: enumValues
fields.description:
Selected values from the predefined valueset options.

Contains one or more values selected from the attribute description's associated valueset. Each value must be a valid option from the predefined list, ensuring data consistency and controlled vocabularies.
Supports both single and multiple selection scenarios depending on the attribute description's configuration.

types.name: AttributeFieldName
types.description: Available field names for CSV import mapping and attribute data processing with comprehensive field definitions

enumValues.name: ATTRIBUTE_DESCRIPTION_ID
enumValues.description: [Required][String] The ID of the AttributeDescription, required if attributeDescriptionName is not provided

enumValues.name: ATTRIBUTE_DESCRIPTION_NAME
enumValues.description: [Required][String] The Name of the AttributeDescription, required if attributeDescriptionId is not provided

enumValues.name: TEXT_VALUES
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] Attribute value descriptions per language, required for TEXT type attributes

enumValues.name: TEXT_VALUES_LANGUAGE
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] Attribute value descriptions per language, required for TEXT type attributes

enumValues.name: ENUM_VALUES
enumValues.description: [Optional][Array] Attribute enum values, required for ENUM  type attributes

enumValues.name: INT_VALUE
enumValues.description: [Optional][Integer] ttribute integer value, required for INTEGER type attributes

enumValues.name: DECIMAL_VALUE

types.name: AttributeResult
types.description:
Comprehensive attribute result combining attribute descriptions, values, and entity associations.

Represents the complete attribute information for an entity, including the attribute description schema, the actual attribute instance (if assigned), and the effective value (either from the assigned attribute or the default value from the description).

This entity provides a unified view of attribute data that combines:
- The attribute description defining the schema and rules
- The specific attribute instance linking the value to the entity (nullable if not explicitly assigned)
- The effective attribute value (either assigned value or default from description)

Perfect for displaying complete attribute information in user interfaces, generating specifications, or providing comprehensive attribute data for business logic operations.

fields.name: attribute
fields.description:
The specific attribute instance linking the value to the entity.

Contains the actual attribute record that associates the value with the specific entity (product, category, etc.). This field is null when the entity doesn't have an explicitly assigned attribute value, in which case the default value from the attribute description is used.

When present, this attribute contains metadata such as creation timestamps, modification history, and value.

fields.name: attributeDescription
fields.description:
The attribute description defining the schema and behavior for this attribute.

Contains the complete attribute description including type definition, display configuration, localization settings, and default values. This description serves as the template that defines how the attribute should behave and be presented.

Essential for understanding attribute constraints, available operations, and presentation requirements.

fields.name: value
fields.description:
The effective attribute value for this entity.

Contains the actual value data, either from the explicitly assigned attribute instance or the default value from the attribute description when no specific value has been assigned to the entity.

The value structure varies based on the attribute type (text, enum, color, etc.) and includes all necessary data for display and business logic operations.

types.name: AttributeResultResponse
types.description:
Paginated response containing comprehensive attribute result data.

Provides a structured response for attribute result queries including the matching attribute results with complete attribute information, pagination metadata, and total count information. Used for attribute result search and listing operations with comprehensive pagination support.

Each result combines attribute descriptions, values, and entity associations to provide complete attribute information for display and business logic operations.

types.name: AttributeValue
types.description:
Base interface for all attribute value types with polymorphic type resolution.

Provides the foundation for typed attribute values across different data types including text, enumeration, color, decimal, datetime, and integer values. Each concrete implementation handles specific data type requirements, validation, and formatting.

The interface enables polymorphic handling of attribute values while maintaining type safety and proper validation for each specific attribute type. Used throughout the system for storing and retrieving typed attribute data.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute value instance.

Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for this specific attribute value. Used to reference and manage individual attribute value instances across the system.

types.name: AttributeValueInput
types.description:
Input for defining typed attribute values with comprehensive data type support.

Provides a flexible structure for specifying attribute values based on the attribute description's type definition. Only the field corresponding to the attribute's type should be populated, while others should remain null or undefined.

Supports all attribute types including:
- TEXT: Localized text values with multi-language support
- ENUM: Predefined option selection from valuesets
- INT: Integer numeric values with range validation
- DECIMAL: Decimal numeric values with precision control
- DATETIME: Date and time values with ISO format
- COLOR: Hexadecimal color codes with validation

inputFields.name: textValues
inputFields.description:
Localized text values for TEXT type attributes with multi-language support.

Provide text content in multiple languages with support for multiple values per language. Use this field when the attribute type is TEXT. Supports rich text content, descriptions, and any textual data that needs localization. The language codes should follow standard ISO language codes.

inputFields.name: enumValues
inputFields.description:
Selected values from predefined options for ENUM type attributes.

Specify one or more values from the attribute description's associated valueset. Use this field when the attribute type is ENUM. Perfect for categories, sizes, colors, or any predefined list of options. The values must exactly match the options defined in the attribute description's valueset.

inputFields.name: intValue
inputFields.description:
Integer value for INT type attributes.

Use this field when the attribute type is INT. Stores whole numbers without decimal places, perfect for quantities, counts, ratings, sequence numbers, or numeric identifiers.

inputFields.name: decimalValue
inputFields.description:
Decimal value for DECIMAL type attributes.

Use this field when the attribute type is DECIMAL. Stores numbers with decimal precision, perfect for measurements, prices, weights, percentages, ratios, or any numeric value requiring fractional components.

inputFields.name: dateTimeValue
inputFields.description:
Date and time value for DATETIME type attributes with ISO 8601 format.

Use this field when the attribute type is DATETIME. Perfect for timestamps, expiration dates, event scheduling, or any time-sensitive attribute data. The format ensures consistent date handling across different systems.

inputFields.name: colorValue
inputFields.description:
Hexadecimal color value for COLOR type attributes.

Used when the attribute type is COLOR. Must be a valid hexadecimal color code including the # prefix. Perfect for product colors, theme colors, brand colors, or any visual styling attributes.

types.name: BulkCostPrice
types.description:
Volume-based cost pricing tier for quantity-dependent cost calculations.

  Represents cost prices that apply to specific quantity ranges, enabling volume purchasing advantages and margin calculations based on purchase quantities. Used for inventory management and pricing optimization.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the bulk cost price record.

    Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for bulk cost price management operations, linking to price records and quantity-based cost calculations.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when the bulk cost price record was initially created.

    Automatically set when the bulk cost price is first saved to the system. Used for audit trails and cost price management.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when the bulk cost price record was last updated.

    Automatically updated whenever any field in the bulk cost price record is modified. Essential for tracking cost price changes and synchronization.

fields.name: value
fields.description:
Cost price value applied to the specified quantity range.

    The actual cost per unit when purchasing within the defined quantity tier. Used for margin calculations and pricing decisions based on volume purchasing power.

fields.name: quantityFrom
fields.description:
Minimum quantity required to qualify for this cost price tier.

    Defines the lower bound of the quantity range where this cost price applies. Creates tiered cost structures that reflect volume purchasing advantages. Minimum value is 1.

fields.name: validFrom
fields.description:
Date when this bulk cost price becomes active and available for cost calculations.

    If not specified, the bulk cost price is immediately effective. Used for scheduling cost price changes and managing time-based pricing strategies.

fields.name: validTo
fields.description:
Date when this bulk cost price expires and is no longer available for cost calculations.

    If not specified, the bulk cost price remains active indefinitely. Used for temporary cost pricing and promotional cost structures.

fields.name: priceId
fields.description:
Price record identifier for bulk cost price association.

    Links the bulk cost price to a specific product price, enabling quantity-based cost calculations and margin analysis for volume purchases.

inputFields.description: Price record identifier for bulk cost price association

  Defines the available field identifiers for bulk cost price creation and update operations, enabling structured data import and field-level validation for volume cost pricing configurations.

enumValues.name: PRICE_ID
enumValues.description: [Required][String] Price id

enumValues.name: VALUE
enumValues.description:
[Required][Number][5 Decimal Places] Bulk discount amount or percentage.

The discount value applied to bulk purchases, calculated either as a percentage reduction from the standard price or as a fixed discounted price per unit, depending on the configured discount type.

enumValues.name: QUANTITY_FROM
enumValues.description:
[Required][Integer] Minimum quantity threshold for bulk pricing eligibility.

The minimum number of units that must be purchased to qualify for the bulk price discount. Creates tiered pricing structure based on order volume.

enumValues.name: VALID_FROM
enumValues.description:
[Optional][DateTime] Bulk pricing effective start date.

The date when the bulk pricing becomes active and available for customer orders. Must be a valid ISO 8601 date string format. (e.g., 2024-10-31T09:55:00.000Z)

enumValues.name: VALID_TO
enumValues.description:
[Optional][DateTime] Bulk pricing expiration date.

The date when the bulk pricing offer expires and is no longer available. Must be a valid ISO 8601 date string format. (e.g., 2024-10-31T09:55:00.000Z)

inputFields.description:
Price value for this quantity tier.

    Decimal value representing the unit price with up to 5 decimal places precision. Applied when the minimum quantity threshold is met for volume discount calculations.

inputFields.name: validFrom
inputFields.description:
Start date for bulk price validity period.

    ISO 8601 date-time string indicating when this bulk price becomes effective. If not specified, the bulk price is effective immediately.

inputFields.name: validTo
inputFields.description:
End date for bulk price validity period.

    ISO 8601 date-time string indicating when this bulk price expires. If not specified, the bulk price remains effective indefinitely.

inputFields.name: quantityFrom
inputFields.description:
Updated minimum quantity threshold for this bulk price tier to apply.

    Positive integer representing the minimum order quantity required for this bulk price to be activated. Used for implementing volume discounts and quantity-based pricing strategies.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Number of created items

fields.name: updated
fields.description: Number of updated items

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total number of created and updated items

types.name: Bundle
types.description:
Product bundle entity representing a collection of products sold together.

Contains bundle configuration, pricing information, and associated product items with comprehensive metadata for bundle management and sales operations.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the bundle.

Used to reference the bundle across all operations and maintain data consistency.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Display name for the bundle.

Used in customer-facing interfaces and administrative tools for bundle identification. Maximum length is 64 characters.

fields.name: description
fields.description:
Detailed description of the bundle contents and value proposition.

Provides customers with comprehensive information about what the bundle includes and its benefits. Maximum length is 255 characters.

fields.name: discount
fields.description:
Discount percentage applied to bundle pricing.

Represents the percentage reduction from individual item prices when purchased as a bundle. Must be between 0 and 100.

fields.name: condition
fields.description:
Determines how bundle discounts are applied to items.

ALL: Discount applies to all items in the bundle
EP: Discount applies only to extra products, excluding the primary item

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Calculated pricing information for the bundle.

Includes net and gross prices with original pricing for comparison, computed based on tax zone and current discount rules.

fields.name: items
fields.description:
Collection of products included in this bundle.

Each item represents a product with its configuration and role within the bundle. Items define which products are part of the bundle and their relationships.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when the bundle was initially created.

Used for audit trails and chronological sorting of bundle records.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who created this bundle.

Used for audit purposes and tracking bundle ownership.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Timestamp of the most recent bundle modification.

Updated automatically whenever bundle properties or items are changed.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who last modified this bundle.

Used for audit purposes and change tracking.

types.name: BundleAddItemsInput
types.description:
Input for adding items to an existing bundle.

Contains the products to be added along with their configurations and tax zone for pricing calculations.

inputFields.name: items
inputFields.description:
Collection of products to add to the existing bundle.

Each item represents a product with its configuration and role. Products must be unique and only one can be designated as the leader item. Validation ensures unique product IDs and single leader designation.

inputFields.name: taxZone
inputFields.description:
Geographic tax zone for pricing calculations.

Determines which tax rates and rules apply to bundle pricing for accurate cost calculations. Must be exactly 2 characters representing a country code. Validation enforces the two-letter format.

types.name: BundleCondition
types.description:
Determines how bundle discounts are applied to items within the bundle.

Controls which products receive the discount when the bundle is purchased.

enumValues.name: ALL
enumValues.description:
Discount applies to all items in the bundle.

Every product in the bundle receives the configured discount percentage.

enumValues.name: EP
enumValues.description:
Discount applies only to extra products, excluding the primary item.

The leader item maintains its original price while additional items receive the bundle discount.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Display name for the bundle.

Used in customer-facing interfaces and administrative tools for bundle identification. Maximum length is 64 characters.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description:
Detailed description of the bundle contents and value proposition.

Provides customers with comprehensive information about what the bundle includes and its benefits. Maximum length is 255 characters.

inputFields.name: discount
inputFields.description:
Discount percentage applied to bundle pricing.

Represents the percentage reduction from individual item prices when purchased as a bundle. Must be between 0 and 100. Validation ensures the value is within the acceptable range.

inputFields.name: condition
inputFields.description:
Determines how bundle discounts are applied to items.

ALL: Discount applies to all items in the bundle
EP: Discount applies only to extra products, excluding the primary item

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description:
Base price for the bundle before discounts.

Used as a reference point for discount calculations and pricing comparisons. Must be a positive number.

inputFields.name: taxZone
inputFields.description:
Geographic tax zone for pricing calculations.

Determines which tax rates and rules apply to bundle pricing for accurate cost calculations. Must be exactly 2 characters.

inputFields.name: addBundleItems
inputFields.description:
Collection of products to include in this bundle.

Each item represents a product with its configuration and role within the bundle. Products must be unique and only one can be designated as the leader item. Validation ensures unique product IDs and single leader designation.

types.name: BundleItem
types.description:
Individual product item within a bundle configuration.

Represents a specific product included in a bundle with its role, pricing, and metadata. Contains information about the product's position and importance within the bundle structure.

fields.name: productId
fields.description:
Product identifier within the bundle.

References the specific product included in this bundle configuration.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Calculated pricing information for this specific item within the bundle.

Includes item-level pricing with bundle discounts applied based on the bundle's pricing rules.

fields.name: isLeader
fields.description:
Designates whether this product serves as the primary item in the bundle.

Leader items typically drive bundle pricing and discount calculations. Only one item per bundle can be designated as the leader.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when this bundle item was added.

Tracks when the product was included in the bundle configuration.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who added this item to the bundle.

Used for audit purposes and tracking item additions.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Timestamp of the most recent modification to this bundle item.

Updated when item properties or configurations are changed.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who last modified this bundle item.

Used for audit purposes and change tracking.

fields.name: product
fields.description:
Complete product information for the bundle item.

Detailed product data including specifications, pricing, availability, and all attributes for the product included in this bundle.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Include hidden products in the lookup.

When true, includes products marked as hidden in the search. When false or not specified, only returns visible products.

types.name: BundleItemInput
types.description:
Input for defining a product item within a bundle.

Specifies the product to include and its role within the bundle configuration.

inputFields.name: productId
inputFields.description:
Product identifier to include in the bundle.

References the specific product that will be part of this bundle configuration. Must be a positive integer. Validation ensures proper integer format.

inputFields.name: isLeader
inputFields.description:
Designates whether this product serves as the primary item in the bundle.

Leader items typically drive bundle pricing and discount calculations. Only one item per bundle can be designated as the leader. Validation ensures proper enum value.

types.name: BundlePrice
types.description:
Comprehensive pricing information for bundles and bundle items.

Contains calculated prices including discounts, taxes, and original pricing for comparison. Provides both net and gross pricing with before-and-after discount values.

fields.name: net
fields.description:
Final net price after applying bundle discounts and tax calculations.

Represents the actual price customers pay excluding taxes.

fields.name: gross
fields.description:
Final gross price after applying bundle discounts and including taxes.

Represents the total price customers pay including all applicable taxes.

fields.name: originalNet
fields.description:
Original net price before any bundle discounts are applied.

Used to calculate savings and display discount value to customers.

fields.name: originalGross
fields.description:
Original gross price before any bundle discounts are applied.

Includes taxes and represents the full retail price without bundle savings.

types.name: BundleSearchInput
types.description:
Search criteria for filtering and retrieving bundles.

Provides comprehensive filtering options including bundle IDs, product associations, pagination, and sorting capabilities.

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description:
Specific bundle identifiers to filter search results.

When provided, only bundles with these exact IDs will be included in the search results. Each ID must be a valid UUID format. Validation ensures proper UUID format for each entry.

inputFields.name: productIds
inputFields.description:
Product identifiers to search for within bundles.

Returns bundles that contain any of the specified products, useful for finding cross-selling opportunities and product associations. Each ID must be a positive integer. Validation ensures unique values and proper integer format.

inputFields.name: taxZone
inputFields.description:
Geographic tax zone for pricing calculations.

Determines which tax rates and rules apply to bundle pricing in the search results. Must be exactly 2 characters representing a country code.

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Page number for pagination, starting from 1.

Used to navigate through multiple pages of results when the total number of bundles exceeds the offset limit. Must be at least 1. Validation ensures positive integer values.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of bundles to return per page.

Controls the size of each page in the paginated response to manage data volume and performance. Must be between 1 and 100. Validation ensures values within the acceptable range.

inputFields.name: sortInputs
inputFields.description:
Sorting criteria for search results.

Specify multiple sort fields with their respective order to control how results are organized and presented. Each sort input must be unique. Validation ensures proper structure and uniqueness of sort criteria.

types.name: BundleSortField
types.description:
Available fields for sorting bundle results.

Determines which bundle property will be used as the primary sort criteria in queries.

enumValues.name: ID
enumValues.description:
Sort by unique bundle identifier.

Useful for consistent ordering and debugging purposes.

enumValues.name: NAME
enumValues.description:
Sort by bundle display name.

Provides alphabetical ordering for user-friendly bundle listings.

enumValues.name: CREATED_AT
enumValues.description:
Sort by bundle creation timestamp.

Allows chronological ordering to show newest or oldest bundles first.

enumValues.name: LAST_MODIFIED_AT
enumValues.description:
Sort by last modification timestamp.

Useful for identifying recently updated bundles and tracking changes.

types.name: BundleSortInput
types.description:
Sorting configuration for bundle search results.

Defines both the field to sort by and the direction of sorting to control result ordering.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description:
Field to use for sorting bundle results.

Determines which bundle property will be used as the primary sort criteria. Validation ensures only valid sort fields are accepted.

inputFields.name: order
inputFields.description:
Sort direction for the specified field.

ASC: Ascending order (A-Z, 0-9, oldest-newest)
DESC: Descending order (Z-A, 9-0, newest-oldest)

Validation ensures only valid sort orders are accepted.

types.name: BundlesResponse

Provides a structured response with bundle data, pagination metadata, and navigation information for efficient data retrieval and display.
