types.name: BusinessHours
types.description:
Operating hours configuration for a specific day of the week.

  Defines when the warehouse is operational including opening/closing times and lunch break periods. Used for scheduling operations and customer communication about availability.

fields.name: dayOfWeek
fields.description:
Day of the week identifier.

    Numeric representation where 0=Sunday, 1=Monday, 2=Tuesday, 3=Wednesday, 4=Thursday, 5=Friday, 6=Saturday. Used to define operating schedules for each day.

fields.name: openingTime
fields.description:
Warehouse opening time for this day.

    Time when the warehouse begins operations in 24-hour format (HH:MM). If null, the warehouse is closed for the entire day.

fields.name: closingTime
fields.description:
Warehouse closing time for this day.

    Time when the warehouse ends operations in 24-hour format (HH:MM). If null, the warehouse is closed for the entire day.

fields.name: lunchBeakStartTime
fields.description:
Start time of lunch break period.

    Time when lunch break begins in 24-hour format (HH:MM). During this period, warehouse operations may be limited or suspended.

fields.name: lunchBeakEndTime
fields.description:
End time of lunch break period.

    Time when lunch break ends in 24-hour format (HH:MM). Operations resume to full capacity after this time.

types.name: BusinessHoursInput
types.description:
Operating hours configuration for a specific day of the week.

  Defines when the warehouse is operational including opening/closing times and lunch break periods. Used for scheduling operations and customer communication about availability.

inputFields.name: dayOfWeek
inputFields.description:
Day of the week (0=Sunday, 1=Monday, ..., 6=Saturday).

    Numeric representation of the day of the week for which these operating hours apply.

inputFields.name: openingTime
inputFields.description:
Warehouse opening time in 24-hour format (HH:MM).

    Time when the warehouse begins operations for the day. Must be in HH:MM format (e.g., "08:00").

inputFields.name: closingTime
inputFields.description:
Warehouse closing time in 24-hour format (HH:MM).

    Time when the warehouse ends operations for the day. Must be in HH:MM format (e.g., "20:00").

inputFields.name: lunchBeakStartTime
inputFields.description:
Lunch break start time in 24-hour format (HH:MM).

    Time when the lunch break begins, during which operations may be limited. Must be in HH:MM format (e.g., "12:00").

inputFields.name: lunchBeakEndTime
inputFields.description:
Lunch break end time in 24-hour format (HH:MM).

    Time when the lunch break ends and full operations resume. Must be in HH:MM format (e.g., "12:30").

types.name: BusinessRule
types.description:
Complete business rule workflow represented as a directed graph structure.

Each business rule consists of interconnected nodes (input, decision tables, output) connected by edges that define the execution flow.
Decision tables contain multiple rows where each row represents a specific rule condition and corresponding action.
The graph structure enables complex business logic modeling with branching, parallel processing, and conditional execution paths.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the business rule within the system

fields.name: shopId
fields.description: [DEPRECATED] Store or shop identifier that owns this business rule, used for multi-tenant rule management
fields.deprecationReason: Shop is deprecated and will be removed in a future version

fields.name: type
fields.description: Classification of the business rule determining its domain context and application scope

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable name of the business rule in multiple languages for international support

fields.name: edges
fields.description: Directed connections between nodes that define the execution flow and data path through the rule graph

fields.name: nodes
fields.description: Processing nodes in the rule graph including input receivers, decision tables, and output generators

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the business rule was initially created in the system

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification to the business rule configuration or logic

fields.name: jdm
fields.description:
Generate the JSON Decision Model (JDM) representation of this business rule for execution engines.

Returns the standardized JDM format containing all rule logic, conditions, and actions required for runtime execution in compatible rule engines.

types.name: BusinessRuleActionField
types.description: Action field definition for complex field types supporting nested operations and data transformations

fields.name: name
fields.description: Localized name of the action field for user interface display and documentation

fields.name: path
fields.description: JSONPath expression defining the location of this action field within the parent complex structure

types.name: BusinessRuleArrayExpression
types.description:
Array-based expression for collection operations, filtering, and element validation.

Provides logical operators for evaluating conditions across array elements including universal quantification (all),
existential quantification (some), negation (none), and membership testing (contains).
Supports both simple value matching and complex nested expressions for comprehensive array processing.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this expression within the business rule system

fields.name: type
fields.description: Data type classification of the expression determining available operators and validation rules

fields.name: operator
fields.description: Logical operator defining how the condition should be applied to array elements

fields.name: string
fields.description: String value to match against array elements (used with 'contains' operator for simple value matching)

fields.name: number
fields.description: Numeric value to match against array elements (used with 'contains' operator for simple value matching)

fields.name: path
fields.description:
Path to the field, can be used to add additional expressions and calulations on the field. 
      Use $ to target the field's value. 
      When omitted the field's value is used.
      The expression will be used on the left hand side of the operator.
      Can also be used to target a specific property in a complex expression's sub-expression
      Check https://gorules.io/docs/rules-engine/expression-language/array for options.

types.name: BusinessRuleArrayExpressionInput
types.description: Input for creating array-based expressions with collection operations and element validation

inputFields.name: operator
inputFields.description: Logical operator defining how the condition should be applied to array elements

inputFields.name: string
inputFields.description: String value to match against array elements (used with 'contains' operator for simple value matching)

inputFields.name: number
inputFields.description: Numeric value to match against array elements (used with 'contains' operator for simple value matching)

inputFields.name: path
inputFields.description:
Path to the field, can be used to add additional expressions and calulations on the field. 
      Use $ to target the field's value. 
      When omitted the field's value is used.
      The expression will be used on the left hand side of the operator.
      Can also be used to target a specific property in a complex expression's sub-expression
      Check https://gorules.io/docs/rules-engine/expression-language/string for options.

types.name: BusinessRuleArrayExpressionOperators
types.description: Logical operators for array-based business rule expressions and collection validation

enumValues.name: all
enumValues.description: Check if all elements in the array meet the specified condition

enumValues.name: none
enumValues.description: Check if no elements in the array meet the specified condition

enumValues.name: some
enumValues.description: Check if at least one element in the array meets the specified condition

enumValues.name: contains
enumValues.description: Check if the array contains a specific value or element

types.name: BusinessRuleComplexExpression
types.description:
Advanced expression combining multiple sub-expressions with aggregation functions.

Enables complex data processing by filtering collections based on multiple criteria and then applying aggregation operations.
Supports mathematical operations (sum), counting operations (count), and data collection (collect) on filtered datasets.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this expression within the business rule system

fields.name: type
fields.description: Data type classification of the expression determining available operators and validation rules

fields.name: operator
fields.description: Optional numeric comparison operator for evaluating the aggregated result against a threshold value

fields.name: action
fields.description:
Aggregation function to apply to the filtered data collection.

- 'sum': Calculate the sum of numeric values from a specific field in filtered elements
- 'count': Count the number of elements that match the filtering criteria
- 'collect': Gather and return all matching elements as a collection

fields.name: field
fields.description: JSONPath to the specific field for sum operations (e.g., '$.price' to sum price values from filtered elements)

fields.name: path
fields.description:
JSONPath expression defining the target data collection for filtering and aggregation.

Defaults to '$' (root field) when omitted. Must be specified when used as a sub-expression within larger expressions.
Examples: '$.orders', '$.items[*]', '$.customer.purchases'

fields.name: number
fields.description: Numeric threshold value for comparison when using the operator (e.g., count > 5, sum >= 100)

types.name: BusinessRuleComplexExpressionAction
types.description: Aggregation functions available for complex expressions operating on filtered data collections

enumValues.name: sum
enumValues.description: Calculate the sum of numeric values from filtered array elements

enumValues.name: count
enumValues.description: Count the number of elements that match the filtering criteria

enumValues.name: collect
enumValues.description: Gather and return all matching elements as a collection

Path to the field, can be used to add additional expressions and calulations on the field.

      When omitted the field's value is used.
      The expression will be used on the left hand side of the operator.
      Can also be used to target a specific property in a complex expression's sub-expression
      Check https://gorules.io/docs/rules-engine/expression-language/string for options.

- 'sum': Calculate the sum of numeric values from a specific field in filtered elements
- 'count': Count the number of elements that match the filtering criteria

types.name: BusinessRuleDateExpression
types.description:
Date and time expression for temporal comparisons and date-specific operations.

Provides comprehensive temporal comparison capabilities including absolute date comparisons, relative date calculations, and time-based conditions.
Supports both date-only and datetime operations with flexible offset calculations from current time.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this expression within the business rule system

fields.name: type
fields.description: Data type classification of the expression determining available operators and validation rules

fields.name: number
fields.description:
Numeric offset value for relative date calculations.

Used with operators that calculate relative dates:
- Days from today (positive for future, negative for past)
- Minutes from now for precise time calculations
- Day of week (1-7, Monday=1), day of month (1-31), month of year (1-12)

fields.name: date
fields.description: Absolute date value for direct date comparisons (used with 'before' and 'after' operators)

fields.name: string
fields.description: Time value in 24-hour format (HH:MM:SS) for time-based operators like 'onTime', 'beforeTime', 'afterTime'

fields.name: operator
fields.description: Temporal comparison operator defining how the date/time value should be evaluated against the target field

fields.name: path
fields.description:
Path to the field, can be used to add additional expressions and calulations on the field. 
      Use $ to target the field's value. 
      When omitted the field's value is used.
      The expression will be used on the left hand side of the operator.
      Can also be used to target a specific property in a complex expression's sub-expression
      Check https://gorules.io/docs/rules-engine/expression-language/date-and-time for options.

- Days from today (positive for future, negative for past)

- Day of week (1-7, Monday=1), day of month (1-31), month of year (1-12)

inputFields.name: date
inputFields.description: Absolute date value for direct date comparisons (used with 'before' and 'after' operators)

inputFields.name: string
inputFields.description: Time value in 24-hour format (HH:MM:SS) for time-based operators like 'onTime', 'beforeTime', 'afterTime'

inputFields.name: operator

inputFields.name: path

Path to the field, can be used to add additional expressions and calulations on the field.

types.name: BusinessRuleDecisionTable
types.description:
Decision table node containing the core business logic organized in tabular format.

Each decision table consists of multiple rows where each row represents a specific business rule with conditions and actions.
The hit policy determines the execution strategy when multiple rules match the input criteria.
Tables support complex expressions, conditional logic, and multi-criteria decision making for comprehensive business rule automation.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Node type identifier, always 'decisionTableNode' for decision processing nodes

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this decision table node within the business rule graph

fields.name: name
fields.description: Descriptive name of the decision table indicating its business purpose and scope

fields.name: description
fields.description: Detailed explanation of the decision table's logic, conditions, and expected outcomes

fields.name: content
fields.description: Complete table structure containing rows, columns, and execution policy for the business rule logic

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description: The name for the input or output column

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description:
The field of the input or output column. 
  In case of an input column this is the full path the root of the input payload of the rule. 
  In case of an output column it's the fieldname you want to output after the rule has been executed.
  Output fields can be organized by using the dot notation.
  For example:
  - input: "input.name"

types.name: BusinessRuleDecisionTableCell
types.description:
Individual data cell within a decision table row containing conditions or actions.

Cells can contain different types of values depending on their purpose:
- Expressions for complex conditional logic and calculations
- String values for text-based results and identifiers
- Numeric values for mathematical operations and quantities
- Localized strings for multi-language support and internationalization

fields.name: expression
fields.description: Complex expression group containing conditional logic, comparisons, and calculations for rule evaluation

fields.name: value
fields.description:
Text value for output cells supporting both literal strings and expression syntax.

Literal strings must be wrapped in quotes (e.g., "Hello World").
Expression syntax allows dynamic content generation and variable substitution.

fields.name: localizedValue
fields.description:
Multi-language text values for internationalized output generation.

Enables rules to produce localized content based on user preferences or regional requirements.
Each entry contains a language code and corresponding translated text.

fields.name: number
fields.description: Numeric value for mathematical calculations, quantities, and numerical output generation

enumValues.name: output

'collect' - Execute all matching rules and aggregate their results

fields.name: outputs

types.name: BusinessRuleDecisionTableInputOutput
types.description:
Column definition for decision table inputs and outputs specifying data structure and field mapping.

Input columns define the data fields that will be evaluated against rule conditions.
Output columns define the result fields that will be populated when rules are executed.
Supports hierarchical field organization using dot notation for complex data structures.

Data field path specification for input evaluation or output generation.

Examples:

types.name: CanvasInput
types.description:
Change the size of the image canvas.

Sets the size of the image canvas, without changing the size of the image itself, which has the effect of adding space around the image.

This parameter takes multiple values. The first two represent the desired width and height, either as measurements of pixels, separated with a comma, or as a ratio, separated with a colon. The remaining parameters allow the placement of the image within the canvas to be adjusted. On each dimension, placement can be made either with a position coordinate (x or y, which are relative to the top left of the newly-enlarged canvas) or as a percentage offset from the center of the image using offset-x and offset-y. These can be mixed and matched, but only one method can be used for each dimension (i.e., x can be combined with offset-y but x cannot be combined with offset-x).

The remaining parameters determine the position of the cropped region.

Offset positioning acts to distribute the remaining space according to the specified offset proportions. For example, offset-y10 would place the image so that 10% of the leftover space is above the image and 90% below it.

Notes
- x and y can be set as a value in pixels (e.g., 40 is 40 pixels) or as a percentage suffixed with p (e.g., 50p is 50%).
- When x and y are percentages, they are calculated as percentages of the image size, not the canvas size.
- offset-x and offset-y are always interpreted as percentages of the canvas size (e.g., 25 is 25%).
- If no x, y, offset-x, or offset-y parameters are supplied, the image is positioned in the center of the canvas.
- The background color of the canvas will default to transparency for image output formats that support transparency and white for formats that don't. This behavior can be changed by adding the bg-color parameter.
- When using canvas and pad at the same time, pad will be ignored.
- Any fractional pixel measurements will be rounded to the nearest whole pixel.

inputFields.name: width
inputFields.description: Width as Pixels or Percentage

inputFields.name: height
inputFields.description: Height as Pixels or Percentage

inputFields.name: widthRatio
inputFields.description: WidthRatio as Number

inputFields.name: heightRatio
inputFields.description: HeightRatio as Number

inputFields.name: x
inputFields.description: X as Pixels or Percentage

inputFields.name: y
inputFields.description: Y as Pixels or Percentage

inputFields.name: offsetX
inputFields.description: X Offset as Percentage

inputFields.name: offsetY
inputFields.description: Y Offset as Percentage

types.name: Carrier
types.description:
Shipping carrier configuration for logistics and delivery operations.

  Represents a shipping company or service provider including service details, coverage areas, pricing information, and integration settings. Used for shipping calculations, order fulfillment, and logistics management.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the shipping carrier.

    Primary key used to reference this carrier throughout the system and for shipping operations.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Shipping carrier company name.

    Official name of the shipping company or service provider used for display in shipping options and logistics management.

    Constraints:
    - Must be unique within the organization
    - Cannot exceed 64 characters

fields.name: type
fields.description:
Type of shipping service offered by the carrier.

    Defines the delivery method and service characteristics provided by this carrier (e.g., pickup, delivery, express).

fields.name: descriptions
fields.description:
Localized carrier descriptions for different languages.

    Collection of carrier service descriptions in various languages for international shipping options and multilingual storefronts.

    Constraints:
    - Each description must have a unique 2-character language code
    - Language codes must be uppercase (e.g., EN, DE, FR)
    - Text values can contain up to 255 characters

fields.name: shippingCost
fields.description:
Base shipping cost for this carrier (deprecated).

    Fixed shipping cost associated with this carrier. This field is deprecated in favor of Propeller's business rule builder for more flexible and complex pricing logic.

    Constraints:
    - Decimal precision: 10 digits total, 5 decimal places
    - Must be a positive value
fields.deprecationReason: Deprecated in favour of Propeller's business rule builder, where logic can be set up for carriers and more complex use cases

fields.name: trackAndTraceURL
fields.description:
Package tracking URL template for shipment monitoring.

    URL template used to generate tracking links for packages shipped with this carrier. May include placeholders for tracking numbers and other shipment details.

    Constraints:
    - Must be a valid HTTPS URL
    - Cannot exceed 255 characters
    - May include query parameters and placeholders

fields.name: logo
fields.description:
Carrier logo URL for branding in shipping options.

    URL pointing to the carrier's logo image used for branding in shipping options and customer-facing interfaces.

    Constraints:
    - Must be a valid URL
    - Cannot exceed 255 characters
    - Recommended: Maximum file size of 200kB
    - Recommended: Dimensions of 200x200px

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Date and time when the carrier was created.

    Timestamp indicating when this carrier was first added to the system. Used for auditing, filtering, and tracking carrier lifecycle. Always in UTC format.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Date and time when the carrier was last modified.

    Timestamp indicating when this carrier was most recently updated in the system. Used for auditing, filtering, and tracking carrier changes. Always in UTC format.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description:
Unique identifier of the user who created this carrier.

    References the user account that originally created this carrier record. Used for auditing and tracking carrier ownership. May be null for system-created carriers.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description:
Unique identifier of the user who last modified this carrier.

    References the user account that most recently updated this carrier record. Used for auditing and tracking carrier changes. May be null for system-updated carriers.

fields.name: trackAndTraces
fields.description:
Retrieve all tracking records for a specific carrier.

Returns comprehensive tracking information for packages handled by the specified shipping carrier.

fields.name: warehouses
fields.description:
Detailed warehouse information for carrier locations.

    Complete warehouse objects for all locations where this carrier provides services. Includes address, operational hours, and facility details for each warehouse.

    - Must be a valid HTTPS URL
    - Cannot exceed 255 characters
    - Must include protocol and host
    - Query parameters are allowed

inputFields.name: logo
inputFields.description:
Public URL to the carrier's logo image for branding in shipping interfaces.

    URL pointing to the carrier's logo image used for branding in shipping options and customer-facing interfaces.

    Validation requirements:
    - Must be a valid URL
    - Cannot exceed 255 characters
    - Recommended: Maximum file size of 200kB
    - Recommended: Dimensions of 200x200px

inputFields.name: warehouseIds
inputFields.description:
Identifiers of warehouses where this carrier provides shipping services.

    Array of warehouse IDs that this carrier can service for shipping operations. Used to determine shipping availability and calculate shipping options based on fulfillment location.

    Validation requirements:
    - All warehouse IDs must be positive integers
    - Array must contain unique values only
    - Warehouse IDs will be validated against the warehouse service

types.name: CarrierSortField
types.description: Available fields for sorting carrier search results

enumValues.name: ID
enumValues.description: Sort by carrier unique identifier

enumValues.name: NAME
enumValues.description: Sort by carrier name alphabetically

enumValues.name: LAST_MODIFIED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by last modification date

enumValues.name: CREATED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by creation date

types.name: CarrierSortInput
types.description:
Sorting criteria for carrier result ordering.

  Specifies a field and direction for sorting carrier search results. Used to control the order in which carriers are returned from search operations.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description:
Field to sort carriers by.

    Specifies which carrier property to use for sorting results. Available fields include ID, name, creation date, and last modification date.

inputFields.name: order
inputFields.description:
Sort direction for the specified field.

    Determines whether results are sorted in ascending or descending order. Ascending order sorts from lowest to highest values, while descending sorts from highest to lowest.

types.name: CarriersResponse
types.description:
Paginated response containing carrier search results.

  Provides a structured response for carrier search operations including the matching carriers, pagination metadata, and result statistics. Used to deliver carrier data with comprehensive pagination support.

fields.name: items
fields.description: List of items of type Carrier

fields.name: itemsFound
fields.description: Total number of items found

fields.name: offset
fields.description: The amount of items to show per page

fields.name: page
fields.description: The current page

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Total amount of pages

fields.name: start
fields.description: Start position of the current page

fields.name: end
fields.description: End position of the current page

types.name: CarriersSearchInput
types.description:
Search criteria for filtering and paginating carriers.

  Provides comprehensive filtering options for carrier searches including pagination, date ranges, service types, warehouse coverage, and sorting capabilities. All filters are optional and can be combined for precise results.

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Page number for pagination results.

    Specifies which page of results to retrieve. Used in combination with offset to control result pagination.

    Validation requirements:
    - Must be a positive integer starting from 1

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of items per page.

    Specifies how many carriers to return per page. Used in combination with page to control result pagination.

    Validation requirements:
    - Must be a positive integer between 1 and 100

inputFields.name: createdAt
inputFields.description:
Filter carriers by creation date range.

    Allows filtering carriers based on when they were created in the system.

    Validation requirements:
    - Supports both greater than and less than date comparisons
    - Dates must be in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z)

inputFields.name: names
inputFields.description:
Filter by specific carrier names.

    Allows filtering carriers by their exact names. Supports multiple names for batch filtering.

    Validation requirements:
    - Names are case-sensitive and must match exactly
    - Each name cannot exceed 64 characters

inputFields.name: types
inputFields.description:
Filter by carrier service types.

    Allows filtering carriers by their service delivery methods. Supports multiple types for comprehensive filtering.

    Validation requirements:
    - Each type must be unique in the array
    - Only valid CarrierType enum values are accepted

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description:
Filter by specific carrier identifiers.

    Allows filtering carriers by their unique IDs. Supports multiple IDs for batch retrieval.

    Validation requirements:
    - Each ID must be a positive integer
    - Array must contain unique values only

inputFields.name: warehouseIds
inputFields.description:
Filter carriers by warehouse service coverage.

    Allows filtering carriers that provide services to specific warehouses. Supports multiple warehouse IDs for comprehensive coverage filtering.

    Validation requirements:
    - Each ID must be a positive integer
    - Array must contain unique values only

inputFields.name: lastModifiedAt
inputFields.description:
Filter carriers by last modification date range.

    Allows filtering carriers based on when they were last updated in the system.

    Validation requirements:
    - Supports both greater than and less than date comparisons
    - Dates must be in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z)

inputFields.name: sortInputs
inputFields.description:
Sorting criteria for result ordering.

    Allows specifying multiple sorting fields with custom ordering directions. Results are sorted in the order specified, with each sort input containing a field and direction.

    Validation requirements:
    - Each sort input must be unique
    - Field must be a valid CarrierSortField enum value
    - Order must be either ASC or DESC

types.name: CarrierType
types.description: Classification of shipping service delivery methods

enumValues.name: PICKUP
enumValues.description: Customer pickup service where orders are collected from designated pickup points or carrier locations

enumValues.name: DELIVERY
enumValues.description: Home or business delivery service where orders are delivered directly to the customer's specified address

types.name: CarrierUpdateInput
types.description:
Input data for updating an existing shipping carrier.

  Contains optional fields for modifying carrier information including service details, coverage areas, pricing, and integration settings. Only provided fields will be updated, others remain unchanged.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Unique name identifying the shipping carrier within your organization.

    Official name of the shipping company or service provider used for display in shipping options and logistics management.

    Validation requirements:
    - Must be unique within the organization
    - Cannot exceed 64 characters
    - Cannot be empty or contain only whitespace

inputFields.name: type
inputFields.description:
Type of shipping service offered by this carrier.

    Defines the delivery method and service characteristics provided by this carrier. Determines how customers receive their orders and affects shipping calculations.

inputFields.name: descriptions
inputFields.description:
Localized descriptions of the carrier service for different languages and markets.

    Collection of carrier service descriptions in various languages for international shipping options and multilingual storefronts.

    Validation requirements:
    - Each description must have a unique 2-character language code (e.g., EN, DE, FR)
    - Language codes must be uppercase
    - Text values can contain up to 255 characters
    - Array must contain unique language codes only

inputFields.name: shippingCost
inputFields.description:
Base shipping cost for this carrier (deprecated).

    Fixed shipping cost associated with this carrier. This field is deprecated in favor of business rule builder for more flexible and complex pricing logic.

    Validation requirements:
    - Must be a positive decimal value
    - Supports up to 5 decimal places

inputFields.name: trackAndTraceURL
inputFields.description:
URL template for package tracking and shipment monitoring.

    URL template used to generate tracking links for packages shipped with this carrier. May include placeholders for tracking numbers and other shipment details.

    Validation requirements:
    - Must be a valid HTTPS URL
    - Cannot exceed 255 characters
    - Must include protocol and host
    - Query parameters are allowed

inputFields.name: logo
inputFields.description:
Public URL to the carrier's logo image for branding in shipping interfaces.

    URL pointing to the carrier's logo image used for branding in shipping options and customer-facing interfaces.

    Validation requirements:
    - Must be a valid URL
    - Cannot exceed 255 characters
    - Recommended: Maximum file size of 200kB
    - Recommended: Dimensions of 200x200px

inputFields.name: warehouseIds
inputFields.description:
Identifiers of warehouses where this carrier provides shipping services.

    Array of warehouse IDs that this carrier can service for shipping operations. Used to determine shipping availability and calculate shipping options based on fulfillment location.

    Validation requirements:
    - All warehouse IDs must be positive integers
    - Array must contain unique values only
    - Warehouse IDs will be validated against the warehouse service

types.name: Cart
types.description:
Shopping cart entity for managing customer purchases.

  Represents a shopping session containing products, customer information, addresses, payment preferences, and all data needed for order processing. Carts can be associated with different customer types and support various business models.

fields.name: cartId
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the shopping cart.

    This UUID serves as the primary key and is used to reference the cart across all operations and API calls.

fields.name: channelId
fields.description:
Sales channel identifier where the cart was created.

    References the specific channel (webshop, mobile app, marketplace) that initiated this cart session, used for channel-specific pricing and business rules.

fields.name: shopId
fields.description:
[DEPRECATED] Shop identifier that owns this cart.

    References the specific shop configuration including branding, pricing rules, payment methods, and shipping options that apply to this cart.
fields.deprecationReason: Shop is deprecated and will be removed in the future. Use channelId instead

fields.name: userId
fields.description:
Legacy user identifier (deprecated).

    Previously used for user association. Use contactId with companyId for B2B customers or customerId for B2C customers instead.
fields.deprecationReason: This field will be removed in a future release, use contact+companyId or customerId instead

fields.name: contactId
fields.description:
Contact identifier for B2B cart association.

    Used in combination with companyId to identify the specific contact within a company who owns this cart. Enables contact-specific pricing and permissions.

fields.name: customerId
fields.description:
Customer identifier for B2C cart association.

    Links the cart to an individual customer account for personalized pricing, order history, and customer-specific features. Used for direct consumer sales.

fields.name: companyId
fields.description:
Company identifier for B2B cart association.

    Used in combination with contactId to establish the company context for this cart. Enables company-specific pricing, terms, and business rules.

fields.name: notes
fields.description:
Customer notes and special instructions for the cart.

    Free-form text where customers can add delivery instructions, special requests, or other notes that should be considered during order processing.

fields.name: reference
fields.description:
Customer reference number or identifier.

    Allows customers to associate their own reference numbers, project codes, or purchase order numbers with the cart for their internal tracking.

fields.name: extra3
fields.description:
Custom metadata field for cart extensions.

    Open field for storing additional cart information that can be used in custom implementations, integrations, or frontend customizations.

fields.name: extra4
fields.description:
Additional custom metadata field for cart extensions.

    Second open field for storing supplementary cart information for custom business logic, integrations, or specialized cart features.

fields.name: orderStatus
fields.description:
Order processing status after cart conversion.

    Indicates the status of the order created from this cart. 'UNFINISHED' means the cart is awaiting payment completion from the payment service provider.

fields.name: actionCode
fields.description:
Applied promotional action code.

    Contains the action code (discount, promotion, or special offer) that has been successfully applied to this cart. Only populated when a valid action code is active.

fields.name: vouchers
fields.description:
Applied voucher codes and their details.

    Collection of voucher codes that have been successfully applied to this cart, including their discount values and validity information.

fields.name: paymentData
fields.description: Payment data for this cart.

fields.name: postageData
fields.description: Postage data for this cart.

fields.name: total
fields.description: Totals for this cart.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Cart's main items

fields.name: bonusItems
fields.description: Bonus items that are added to this cart through incentives.

fields.name: unOrderableItems
fields.description: Items that are added to the Cart, but can't be ordered.

fields.name: invoiceAddress
fields.description: Address the invoice for the order should be sent to.

fields.name: deliveryAddress
fields.description: Address the order should be sent to.

fields.name: taxLevels
fields.description: Amount of tax that applies to this cart per tax code

fields.name: payMethods
fields.description: List of selectable paymethods for this cart and applied user.

fields.name: carriers
fields.description: List of selectable carriers for this cart.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Date this cart has been created.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description: Date this cart has been last updated.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description: User which created the cart.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description: User which last updated the cart.

fields.name: appliedIncentives
fields.description: All incentives that apply to this cart.

fields.name: valuePoints
fields.description: Total amount of value-points that apply to this cart

fields.name: shippingMethods
fields.description: All shipping methods available for this cart.

fields.name: language
fields.description: Language of the order that will be created from this cart. Order confirmation email will be sent in that language.

fields.name: purchaseAuthorizationRequired
fields.description: Indicates whether authorization is required to finalize the cart

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates cart status

fields.name: user
fields.description: Cart User

fields.name: contact
fields.description: Tender Contact

fields.name: customer
fields.description: Tender Customer

fields.name: company
fields.description: Tender Company

types.name: CartAcceptPurchaseAuthorizationRequestInput
types.description:
Input for accepting a cart purchase authorization request.

  Used by authorization managers to approve carts that require purchase authorization before they can be processed into orders.

inputFields.name: contactId
inputFields.description:
Identifier of the contact accepting the authorization request.

    Must be a valid contact ID representing an authorization manager within the same company as the cart. If not provided, the current user's contact will be used.

types.name: CartActionCodeInput
types.description:
Input for applying promotional action codes to a shopping cart.

  Contains the action code that triggers discounts, promotions, or special offers when applied to the cart.

inputFields.name: actionCode
inputFields.description:
Promotional action code to activate.

    Must be a valid, non-empty action code. HTML tags will be automatically removed for security. The code will be validated against available promotions and discounts.

types.name: CartAddBundleInput
types.description:
Input for adding a product bundle to a shopping cart.

  Contains the information needed to add a pre-configured bundle of products to the cart as a single unit with bundle-specific pricing and configuration.

inputFields.name: quantity
inputFields.description:
Number of units to add to the cart.

    Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Additional notes or special instructions for this item.

    Maximum length of 255 characters. HTML tags will be automatically removed for security.

inputFields.name: requestDate
inputFields.description:
Preferred delivery date for this specific item.

    Must be provided in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for items that require specific delivery scheduling.

inputFields.name: bundleId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the bundle to add to the cart.

    Must reference a valid bundle configuration that defines the products, quantities, and pricing rules for the bundle.

types.name: CartAddItemInput
types.description:
Input for adding a product item to a shopping cart.

  Contains all necessary information to add a product to the cart including quantity, pricing overrides, and configuration options for complex products like clusters.

inputFields.name: quantity
inputFields.description:
Number of units to add to the cart.

    Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Additional notes or special instructions for this item.

    Maximum length of 255 characters. HTML tags will be automatically removed for security.

inputFields.name: requestDate
inputFields.description:
Preferred delivery date for this specific item.

    Must be provided in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for items that require specific delivery scheduling.

inputFields.name: productId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the product to add to the cart.

    Must reference a valid product that is available for purchase and matches the cart's shop and channel configuration.

inputFields.name: clusterId
inputFields.description:
Cluster identifier for configurable product groups.

    When adding items that are part of a product cluster (configurable products with multiple components), this identifies the cluster configuration. All child items must belong to this cluster.

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description:
Override price per unit for external pricing systems.

    When specified, overrides the calculated price with a custom value. Should only be used when integrating with external pricing systems. Maximum 5 decimal places allowed.

inputFields.name: childItems
inputFields.description:
Child items for configurable product clusters.

    Used when adding complex products that consist of multiple components. Each child item represents a component of the main product and must be part of the specified cluster configuration.

types.name: CartAddress
types.description:
Address information for cart delivery and billing.

  Contains complete address details including personal information, location data, and contact details used for order processing and delivery.

fields.name: company
fields.description:
Company or organization name.

    Used for business addresses where the delivery or billing should be addressed to a specific company.

fields.name: gender
fields.description:
Gender of the address contact person.

    Used for proper addressing in communications and delivery instructions.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description:
First name of the address contact person.

    Required for personal identification and delivery confirmation.

fields.name: middleName
fields.description:
Middle name or initial of the address contact person.

    Optional additional name information for complete identification.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description:
Last name or surname of the address contact person.

    Required for personal identification and delivery confirmation.

fields.name: street
fields.description:
Street name for the address.

    Primary location identifier for delivery and billing purposes.

fields.name: number
fields.description:
House or building number.

    Specific location identifier within the street for precise delivery.

fields.name: numberExtension
fields.description:
Additional address information such as apartment, suite, or unit number.

    Used for multi-unit buildings or complex delivery locations.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.description:
Postal or ZIP code for the address.

    Required for mail delivery and location verification.

fields.name: city
fields.description:
City or municipality name.

    Required geographic identifier for delivery routing and address validation.

fields.name: region
fields.description:
State, province, or regional identifier.

    Additional geographic information for address precision and delivery routing.

fields.name: country
fields.description:
Country name or code.

    Required for international shipping and address validation.

fields.name: code
fields.description:
Additional address code or reference.

    Used for internal address identification or special delivery instructions.

fields.name: email
fields.description:
Email address for delivery notifications and communication.

    Used for order updates, delivery confirmations, and customer communication.

fields.name: mobile
fields.description:
Mobile phone number for delivery coordination.

    Primary contact number for delivery notifications and coordination.

fields.name: phone
fields.description:
Landline phone number for additional contact options.

    Alternative contact method for delivery coordination and customer service.

fields.name: icp
fields.description:
Indicates if this is an Intra-Community Supply (ICS) address. 
    
    Used for VAT exemption on cross-border B2B transactions within the EU.

fields.name: notes
fields.description:
Additional notes or special delivery instructions.

    Free-form text for specific delivery requirements, access codes, or special handling instructions.

types.name: CartAddressType
types.description: Address types used in shopping cart operations

enumValues.name: INVOICE
enumValues.description: Billing address where the invoice should be sent

enumValues.name: DELIVERY
enumValues.description: Shipping address where the order should be delivered

types.name: CartBaseItem
types.description:
Base cart item with pricing and configuration details.

  Represents an item in the shopping cart with complete pricing breakdown, discounts, and delivery information. Serves as the foundation for different types of cart items.

fields.name: itemId
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this cart item.

    Used for item-specific operations like updates, deletions, and tracking. Generated when the item is added to the cart.

fields.name: parentItemUUID
fields.description:
Identifier of the parent item in hierarchical structures.

    Used when this item is a child component of a configurable product or bundle. Links to the main item's UUID.

fields.name: notes
fields.description:
Customer notes or special instructions for this item.

    Free-form text for item-specific requirements, customizations, or delivery instructions.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Unit price excluding VAT before discounts.

    Base price per unit of measure for this item, calculated before any item-specific discounts are applied.

fields.name: priceNet
fields.description:
Unit price including VAT before discounts.

    Base price per unit of measure for this item with tax included, calculated before any item-specific discounts are applied.

fields.name: priceMode
fields.description:
Source of the item's price calculation.

    Indicates whether the price was calculated using platform rules (PLATFORM) or provided by external systems (EXTERNAL).

fields.name: totalPrice
fields.description:
Final unit price excluding VAT after discounts.

    Total price per unit including all item-specific discounts and promotions, calculated before tax.

fields.name: totalPriceNet
fields.description:
Final unit price including VAT after discounts.

    Total price per unit including all item-specific discounts, promotions, and tax.

fields.name: sum
fields.description:
Combined unit price excluding VAT for item and components.

    Sum of the main item price and all child item prices per unit, calculated before discounts and tax.

fields.name: sumNet
fields.description:
Combined unit price including VAT for item and components.

    Sum of the main item price and all child item prices per unit with tax, calculated before discounts.

fields.name: totalSum
fields.description:
Final combined unit price excluding VAT after discounts.

    Total sum of main item and child item prices per unit, including all discounts but excluding tax.

fields.name: totalSumNet
fields.description:
Final combined unit price including VAT after discounts.

    Total sum of main item and child item prices per unit, including all discounts and tax.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description:
Number of units of this item in the cart.

    Quantity ordered by the customer, used for calculating total prices and inventory requirements.

fields.name: bundleId
fields.description:
Bundle identifier when this item is part of a product bundle.

    Links the item to a specific bundle configuration for bundled product offerings.

fields.name: clusterId
fields.description:
Cluster identifier for configurable product groups.

    Used when this item belongs to a cluster of related or configurable products.

fields.name: productId
fields.description:
Product identifier for the underlying product.

    Links the cart item to the specific product in the catalog system.

fields.name: taxCode
fields.description:
Tax classification code for this item.

    Determines the tax rate and handling applied to this item based on product type and regulations.

fields.name: deliveryDate
fields.description:
Expected delivery date for this item.

    Calculated or estimated date when this specific item will be delivered to the customer.

fields.name: deliveryDeadline
fields.description:
Latest acceptable delivery date for this item.

    Deadline by which this item must be delivered to meet customer requirements or service agreements.

fields.name: discount
fields.description:
Total discount amount applied to this item.

    Sum of all discounts and reductions applied to this cart item, calculated in the cart's currency.

fields.name: discountPercentage
fields.description:
Percentage discount applied to this item.

    Combined percentage reduction from all applicable promotions and discounts for this item.

fields.name: surcharges
fields.description:
Additional charges applied to this item.

    List of extra fees, surcharges, or special handling costs associated with this cart item.

fields.name: incentive
fields.description:
Promotional incentive applied to this item.

    Details of any special promotion, discount, or bonus offer that affects this cart item.

fields.name: requestDate
fields.description:
Customer's requested delivery date for this item.

    Date specified by the customer for when they would prefer to receive this item.

fields.name: product
fields.description:
Complete product information for the cart item.

Returns detailed product data including specifications, pricing, availability, and all attributes for the product in this cart item. Used for cart display, pricing calculations, and order processing.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Include hidden products in the lookup.

When true, includes products marked as hidden in the search. When false or not specified, only returns visible products.

types.name: CartCarrier
types.description:
Shipping carrier information for cart delivery options.

  Represents available shipping providers with their pricing and delivery estimates for the current cart configuration.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the shipping carrier.

    Used to select this carrier for cart delivery and track carrier-specific configurations.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Display name of the shipping carrier.

    Human-readable carrier name shown to customers during carrier selection.

fields.name: logo
fields.description:
URL or path to the carrier's logo image.

    Visual identifier for the carrier, used in user interfaces for carrier selection.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Estimated shipping cost for this carrier.

    Indicative pricing for delivery through this carrier. Final costs may vary based on business rules, promotions, and actual shipping calculations.

fields.name: deliveryDeadline
fields.description:
Expected delivery deadline for this carrier.

    Estimated date when the order would be delivered if this carrier is selected. Based on current processing times and carrier schedules.

types.name: CartChildItemBulkInput
types.description:
Input for child items in bulk cart operations.

  Represents component items that belong to a main item in configurable products or bundles. Contains the same fields as the main item input except for child items and cluster ID.

inputFields.name: itemId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of an existing cart item to update or remove.

    Must be a valid UUID. Cannot be used together with productId or clusterId. Used for modifying items already in the cart.

inputFields.name: productId
inputFields.description:
Product identifier for adding new items to the cart.

    Must be a valid product ID from the catalog. Cannot be used with itemId. Used for adding new products to the cart.

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description:
Override price per unit for this cart item.

    When specified, replaces the calculated price with this custom value. Primarily used for external pricing systems. Must be a positive number with maximum 5 decimal places.

inputFields.name: quantity
inputFields.description:
Number of units to add, update, or maintain in the cart.

    Defaults to 1 if not specified. When updating existing items, setting to null will reset quantity to 1. Setting to 0 will remove the item from the cart.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Additional notes or special instructions for this item.

    Maximum length of 255 characters. HTML tags will be automatically removed for security.

inputFields.name: requestDate
inputFields.description:
Preferred delivery date for this specific item.

    Must be provided in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for items that require specific delivery scheduling.

types.name: CartChildItemInput
types.description:
Input for adding child items within a product cluster.

  Represents a component item that is part of a configurable product cluster. Contains the same fields as the main item input but excludes cluster-level properties.

inputFields.name: quantity
inputFields.description:
Number of units to add to the cart.

    Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Additional notes or special instructions for this item.

    Maximum length of 255 characters. HTML tags will be automatically removed for security.

inputFields.name: requestDate
inputFields.description:
Preferred delivery date for this specific item.

    Must be provided in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for items that require specific delivery scheduling.

inputFields.name: productId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the product to add to the cart.

    Must reference a valid product that is available for purchase and matches the cart's shop and channel configuration.

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description:
Override price per unit for external pricing systems.

    When specified, overrides the calculated price with a custom value. Should only be used when integrating with external pricing systems. Maximum 5 decimal places allowed.

types.name: CartDeleteItemInput
types.description:
Input for removing items from a shopping cart.

  Contains the identifier needed to locate and remove a specific item from the cart.

inputFields.name: itemId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the cart item to remove.

    Must be a valid UUID format. This ID is provided when items are added to the cart and can be found in cart item responses.

types.name: CartIncentive
types.description:
Promotional incentive applied to the shopping cart.

  Represents an active promotion, discount, or special offer that affects cart pricing or adds bonus items.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Display name of the incentive promotion.

    Human-readable name describing the promotional offer or discount applied to the cart.

fields.name: action
fields.description:
Type of incentive action being applied.

    Describes the specific promotional action such as 'discount', 'bonus_item', 'free_shipping', etc.

fields.name: affectedItems
fields.description:
Cart items affected by this incentive.

    List of specific items in the cart that are subject to this promotional offer or discount.

fields.name: params
fields.description:
Configuration parameters for the incentive.

    Detailed settings that define how the incentive is calculated and applied, including discount amounts, quantities, and conditions.

types.name: CartIncentiveParams
types.description:
Configuration parameters for cart incentive calculations.

  Contains the specific values and settings that define how a promotional incentive is calculated and applied to the cart.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description:
Minimum quantity required to trigger the incentive.

    Number of items that must be present in the cart for this incentive to become active.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Fixed price override for incentive items.

    Special price that replaces the regular item price when this incentive is applied.

fields.name: productId
fields.description:
Specific product identifier for targeted incentives.

    Product ID that this incentive applies to, used for product-specific promotions.

fields.name: discount
fields.description:
Discount amount or percentage value.

    The value of the discount applied, interpreted based on the discount type (fixed amount or percentage).

fields.name: discountType
fields.description:
Method of discount calculation.

    Specifies whether the discount value represents a fixed amount (FLAT_FEE) or percentage (PERCENTAGE).

fields.name: valuePoints
fields.description:
Loyalty points awarded by this incentive.

    Number of value points credited to the customer's account when this incentive is applied.

fields.name: repeat
fields.description:
Whether the incentive can be applied multiple times.

    Indicates if the incentive benefits can be repeated for multiple qualifying items or quantities.

fields.name: actionCode
fields.description:
Promotional action code that triggered this incentive.

    The specific promotion code or coupon that activated this incentive offer.

types.name: CartItemBulkInput
types.description:
Input for bulk cart item operations.

  Supports adding, updating, or removing cart items in batch operations. Can target existing items by ID or create new items by product/cluster ID.

inputFields.name: itemId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of an existing cart item to update or remove.

    Must be a valid UUID. Cannot be used together with productId or clusterId. Used for modifying items already in the cart.

inputFields.name: productId
inputFields.description:
Product identifier for adding new items to the cart.

    Must be a valid product ID from the catalog. Cannot be used with itemId. Used for adding new products to the cart.

inputFields.name: clusterId
inputFields.description:
Cluster identifier for configurable product groups.

    Used when adding items that belong to a product cluster. All child items must be part of the same cluster configuration. Cannot be used with itemId.

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description:
Override price per unit for this cart item.

    When specified, replaces the calculated price with this custom value. Primarily used for external pricing systems. Must be a positive number with maximum 5 decimal places.

inputFields.name: quantity
inputFields.description:
Number of units to add, update, or maintain in the cart.

    Defaults to 1 if not specified. When updating existing items, setting to null will reset quantity to 1. Setting to 0 will remove the item from the cart.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Additional notes or special instructions for this item.

    Maximum length of 255 characters. HTML tags will be automatically removed for security.

inputFields.name: requestDate
inputFields.description:
Preferred delivery date for this specific item.

    Must be provided in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for items that require specific delivery scheduling.

inputFields.name: childItems
inputFields.description:
Child items to include with this main item.

    Used for configurable products, bundles, or items with components. Each child item must be part of the same cluster configuration as the parent item.

types.name: CartItemIncentive
types.description:
Promotional incentive applied to a specific cart item.

  Represents a discount, bonus, or special offer that affects the pricing or availability of an individual cart item.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Display name of the item-level incentive.

    Human-readable name describing the promotional offer applied to this specific cart item.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description:
Number of item units affected by the incentive.

    Quantity of this cart item that qualifies for or is impacted by the promotional offer.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Special price or discount value for the incentive.

    Monetary amount representing the incentive benefit, such as a discounted price or discount amount.

fields.name: code
fields.description:
Type code for the item incentive.

    Classification code that identifies the specific type of promotional offer applied to this cart item.

types.name: CartItemsBulkUpsertInput
types.description:
Input for bulk operations on cart items.

  Allows adding, updating, or removing multiple cart items in a single operation for improved performance and consistency.

inputFields.name: cartId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the target shopping cart.

    Must be a valid UUID format representing an existing cart.

inputFields.name: items
inputFields.description:
Collection of cart items to process.

    Each item in the array will be added, updated, or removed based on the operation specified. All items are processed as a single transaction.

types.name: CartItemSurcharge
types.description:
Additional charge or fee applied to a cart item.

  Represents extra costs such as handling fees, special processing charges, or service fees that are added to specific cart items.

fields.name: names
fields.description:
Localized display names for the surcharge.

    Collection of surcharge names in different languages for proper display to customers in their preferred language.

fields.name: descriptions
fields.description:
Localized descriptions explaining the surcharge.

    Detailed explanations of what the surcharge covers, provided in multiple languages for customer clarity.

fields.name: type
fields.description:
Category or type of the surcharge.

    Classification of the surcharge such as 'handling', 'processing', 'expedite', or 'special_service'.

fields.name: value
fields.description:
Monetary value of the surcharge.

    Amount of the additional charge applied to the cart item, calculated in the cart's currency.

fields.name: taxCode
fields.description:
Tax classification code for the surcharge.

    Determines the tax rate and handling applied to this surcharge based on its type and applicable regulations.

fields.name: taxPercentage
fields.description:
Tax rate percentage applied to the surcharge.

    Percentage rate used to calculate tax on this additional charge.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description:
Quantity multiplier for the surcharge.

    Number of units this surcharge applies to, used when the surcharge is quantity-based.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Unit price of the surcharge excluding VAT.

    Cost per unit of the surcharge before tax application, used for detailed pricing breakdown.

fields.name: totalPrice
fields.description:
Total surcharge amount excluding VAT.

    Complete cost of the surcharge (unit price ├ù quantity) before tax application.

fields.name: priceNet
fields.description:
Unit price of the surcharge including VAT.

    Cost per unit of the surcharge with tax included, used for customer-facing pricing.

fields.name: totalPriceNet
fields.description:
Total surcharge amount including VAT.

    Complete cost of the surcharge (unit price ├ù quantity) with tax included, representing the final customer cost.

types.name: CartMainItem
types.description:
Cart item entity for federation with external cart services.

Represents an item in a shopping cart with potential bundle associations. Used for GraphQL federation to provide bundle information within cart contexts.

fields.name: itemId
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this cart item.

    Used for item-specific operations like updates, deletions, and tracking. Generated when the item is added to the cart.

fields.name: productId
fields.description:
Product identifier for the underlying product.

    Links the cart item to the specific product in the catalog system.

fields.name: bundleId
fields.description:
Bundle identifier when this item is part of a product bundle.

    Links the item to a specific bundle configuration for bundled product offerings.

fields.name: bundle
fields.description:
Complete bundle information if this cart item is part of a bundle.

Provides access to bundle details, pricing, and configuration for cart processing.

args.name: taxZone
args.description:
Tax zone for pricing calculations.

      Geographic tax zone code used to calculate accurate bundle pricing including applicable taxes. Must be exactly 2 characters representing a country code. Defaults to 'NL' if not specified.

fields.name: parentItemUUID
fields.description:
Identifier of the parent item in hierarchical structures.

    Used when this item is a child component of a configurable product or bundle. Links to the main item's UUID.

fields.name: notes
fields.description:
Customer notes or special instructions for this item.

    Free-form text for item-specific requirements, customizations, or delivery instructions.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Unit price excluding VAT before discounts.

    Base price per unit of measure for this item, calculated before any item-specific discounts are applied.

fields.name: priceNet
fields.description:
Unit price including VAT before discounts.

    Base price per unit of measure for this item with tax included, calculated before any item-specific discounts are applied.

fields.name: priceMode
fields.description:
Source of the item's price calculation.

    Indicates whether the price was calculated using platform rules (PLATFORM) or provided by external systems (EXTERNAL).

fields.name: totalPrice
fields.description:
Final unit price excluding VAT after discounts.

    Total price per unit including all item-specific discounts and promotions, calculated before tax.

fields.name: totalPriceNet
fields.description:
Final unit price including VAT after discounts.

    Total price per unit including all item-specific discounts, promotions, and tax.

fields.name: sum
fields.description:
Combined unit price excluding VAT for item and components.

    Sum of the main item price and all child item prices per unit, calculated before discounts and tax.

fields.name: sumNet
fields.description:
Combined unit price including VAT for item and components.

    Sum of the main item price and all child item prices per unit with tax, calculated before discounts.

fields.name: totalSum
fields.description:
Final combined unit price excluding VAT after discounts.

    Total sum of main item and child item prices per unit, including all discounts but excluding tax.

fields.name: totalSumNet
fields.description:
Final combined unit price including VAT after discounts.

    Total sum of main item and child item prices per unit, including all discounts and tax.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description:
Number of units of this item in the cart.

    Quantity ordered by the customer, used for calculating total prices and inventory requirements.

fields.name: clusterId
fields.description:
Cluster identifier for configurable product groups.

    Used when this item belongs to a cluster of related or configurable products.

fields.name: taxCode
fields.description:
Tax classification code for this item.

    Determines the tax rate and handling applied to this item based on product type and regulations.

fields.name: deliveryDate
fields.description:
Expected delivery date for this item.

    Calculated or estimated date when this specific item will be delivered to the customer.

fields.name: deliveryDeadline
fields.description:
Latest acceptable delivery date for this item.

    Deadline by which this item must be delivered to meet customer requirements or service agreements.

fields.name: discount
fields.description:
Total discount amount applied to this item.

    Sum of all discounts and reductions applied to this cart item, calculated in the cart's currency.

fields.name: discountPercentage
fields.description:
Percentage discount applied to this item.

    Combined percentage reduction from all applicable promotions and discounts for this item.

fields.name: surcharges
fields.description:
Additional charges applied to this item.

    List of extra fees, surcharges, or special handling costs associated with this cart item.

fields.name: incentive
fields.description:
Promotional incentive applied to this item.

    Details of any special promotion, discount, or bonus offer that affects this cart item.

fields.name: requestDate
fields.description:
Customer's requested delivery date for this item.

    Date specified by the customer for when they would prefer to receive this item.

fields.name: childItems
fields.description:
Child items that belong to this main item.

    Collection of component items, accessories, or parts that are included with or configured for this main item. Used for complex products, bundles, and configurable items.

fields.name: product
fields.description:
Complete product information for the main cart item.

Returns detailed product data including specifications, pricing, availability, and all attributes for the primary product in this cart item. Used for cart display, pricing calculations, and order processing.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Include hidden products in the lookup.

When true, includes products marked as hidden in the search. When false or not specified, only returns visible products.

types.name: CartPaymentData
types.description:
Payment information and configuration for the shopping cart.

  Contains details about the selected payment method, associated costs, tax information, and current payment status.

fields.name: method
fields.description:
Selected payment method identifier.

    Code or name of the payment method chosen for this cart (e.g., 'credit_card', 'bank_transfer', 'paypal').

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Payment processing cost excluding VAT.

    Additional fee charged for using this payment method, calculated before tax application.

fields.name: priceNet
fields.description:
Payment processing cost including VAT.

    Total payment method fee including all applicable taxes and charges.

fields.name: priceMode
fields.description:
Pricing calculation mode for the payment method.

    Determines how payment costs are calculated - using platform defaults or external pricing.

fields.name: tax
fields.description:
Tax amount applied to the payment method fee.

    Calculated tax on the payment processing cost based on applicable tax rates.

fields.name: taxPercentage
fields.description:
Tax rate percentage applied to payment fees.

    Percentage rate used to calculate tax on payment method costs.

fields.name: status
fields.description:
Current status of the payment transaction.

    Indicates the payment state such as 'pending', 'authorized', 'captured', 'failed', or 'refunded'.

fields.name: statusDate
fields.description:
Timestamp when the payment status was last updated.

    Records when the payment status changed, used for tracking payment processing timeline.

types.name: CartPaymentDataInput
types.description:
Payment configuration updates for the shopping cart.

  Contains payment method selection, status updates, and external pricing overrides for cart payment processing.

inputFields.name: method
inputFields.description:
Payment method identifier to use for this cart.

    Maximum length of 50 characters. Specifies the payment method code such as 'credit_card', 'bank_transfer', or 'paypal'.

inputFields.name: status
inputFields.description:
Current payment transaction status.

    Updates the payment status such as 'pending', 'authorized', 'captured', 'failed', or 'refunded'.

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description:
External payment processing cost excluding VAT.

    When specified, overrides platform-calculated payment fees with this external value. Must be 0 or greater with maximum 5 decimal places. Setting this value changes the payment price mode to 'EXTERNAL'.

types.name: CartPaymethod
types.description:
Available payment method option for the shopping cart.

  Represents a payment method that can be selected for cart checkout, including associated costs and configuration details.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the payment method.

    Used to select this payment method for cart checkout and track method-specific configurations.

fields.name: code
fields.description:
Unique identifier code for the payment method.

    Internal system code used to identify and process this payment method (e.g., 'CC', 'BANK', 'PAYPAL').

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Display name of the payment method.

    Human-readable name shown to customers during payment method selection (e.g., 'Credit Card', 'Bank Transfer').

fields.name: externalCode
fields.description:
External system identifier for the payment method.

    Code used by external payment processors or integrations to identify this payment method.

fields.name: type
fields.description:
Payment method type or category.

    Classification of the payment method for processing and display purposes.

fields.name: taxCode
fields.description:
Tax code applied to payment method fees.

    Determines the tax rate and handling for any fees associated with this payment method.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Cost associated with using this payment method.

    Additional fee charged to the customer for selecting this payment method, excluding VAT.

fields.name: logo
fields.description: URL to the payment method's logo.

types.name: CartPostageData
types.description:
Shipping and delivery configuration for the shopping cart.

  Contains information about shipping methods, costs, delivery preferences, and pickup options for the cart.

fields.name: carrier
fields.description:
Selected shipping carrier identifier.

    Code or name of the carrier responsible for delivering this order (e.g., 'DHL', 'UPS', 'FedEx').

fields.name: carrierData
fields.description:
Retrieve the shipping carrier associated with this cart postage data.

    Returns the carrier information including service details, coverage areas, and integration settings used. Used to display carrier-specific tracking information and branding.

fields.name: method
fields.description:
Selected shipping method for the cart.

    Identifies the chosen delivery method such as 'DELIVERY', 'PICKUP', or specific carrier services.

fields.name: taxPercentage
fields.description:
Tax rate percentage applied to shipping costs.

    Percentage rate used to calculate tax on shipping and handling fees.

fields.name: requestDate
fields.description:
Preferred delivery date requested by the customer.

    Target date when the customer would like to receive their order. Used for delivery scheduling and planning.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Shipping cost excluding VAT.

    Base shipping fee calculated based on the selected method, carrier rates, and applicable business rules.

fields.name: priceNet
fields.description:
Shipping cost including VAT.

    Total shipping fee including all applicable taxes and surcharges.

fields.name: priceMode
fields.description:
Source of the shipping price calculation.

    Indicates whether shipping costs were calculated using platform rules (PLATFORM) or provided by external systems (EXTERNAL).

fields.name: partialDeliveryAllowed
fields.description:
Whether partial deliveries are allowed for this order.

    Indicates if the order can be split into multiple shipments when items have different availability or delivery dates.

fields.name: pickUpLocationId
fields.description:
Identifier for the pickup location.

    Used when the shipping method involves customer pickup from a designated location such as a store or pickup point.

fields.name: warehouse
fields.description:
Complete warehouse information for the pickup location.

    Detailed warehouse object including address, business hours, and contact information for the customer pickup location.

types.name: CartPostageDataInput
types.description:
Shipping and delivery configuration updates for the shopping cart.

  Contains shipping method selection, delivery preferences, carrier selection, and external pricing overrides for cart shipping.

inputFields.name: method
inputFields.description:
Shipping method identifier for this cart.

    Maximum length of 30 characters. Specifies the delivery method code such as 'standard', 'express', or 'pickup'.

inputFields.name: requestDate
inputFields.description:
Customer's preferred delivery date.

    Must be today or a future date. Used for delivery scheduling and planning. Time component is ignored, only the date is considered.

inputFields.name: partialDeliveryAllowed
inputFields.description:
Whether partial deliveries are allowed for this cart.

    Indicates if the order can be split into multiple shipments when items have different availability or delivery dates.

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description:
External shipping cost excluding VAT.
