    When specified, overrides platform-calculated shipping fees with this external value. Must be 0 or greater with maximum 5 decimal places. Setting this value changes the shipping price mode to 'EXTERNAL'.

inputFields.name: carrier
inputFields.description:
Shipping carrier identifier for this cart.

    Maximum length of 45 characters. Specifies the carrier code such as 'DHL', 'UPS', or 'FedEx'.

inputFields.name: pickUpLocationId
inputFields.description:
Pickup location identifier for customer pickup.

    Used when the shipping method involves customer pickup from a designated location such as a store or pickup point.

types.name: CartProcessInput
types.description:
Input for converting a shopping cart into a finalized order.

  Contains configuration options for the order creation process including status and localization preferences.

inputFields.name: orderStatus
inputFields.description:
Initial status to assign to the newly created order.

    Must be a valid order status code for the current system. Maximum length of 60 characters. HTML tags will be automatically removed for security.

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Language code for order processing and communications.

    Must be a valid 2-character ISO language code (e.g., 'en', 'nl', 'de'). Order confirmation emails and documents will be generated in this language.

types.name: CartProcessResponse
types.description:
Response from cart processing operation.

  Contains the results of converting a shopping cart into a finalized order, including the generated order ID and updated cart information.

fields.name: cartOrderId
fields.description:
Unique identifier of the created order.

    System-generated ID for the order that was created from the processed cart. Used for order tracking and management.

fields.name: cart
fields.description:
Updated cart information after processing.

    Cart object reflecting its final state after being converted to an order, including any status changes or final calculations.

types.name: CartResponse
types.description:
Paginated response containing cart search results.

  Provides a collection of shopping carts matching the search criteria, along with pagination information for navigating through large result sets.

fields.name: items
fields.description: List of items of type Cart

fields.name: itemsFound
fields.description: Total number of items found

fields.name: offset
fields.description: The amount of items to show per page

fields.name: page
fields.description: The current page

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Total amount of pages

fields.name: start
fields.description: Start position of the current page

fields.name: end
fields.description: End position of the current page

types.name: CartSearchInput
types.description:
Search criteria for filtering shopping carts.

  Provides flexible filtering options for cart searches including customer associations, cart status, creation dates, and pagination. Results are filtered based on user permissions and organizational access.

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description:
Filter by specific cart identifiers.

    Returns only carts whose IDs match the provided list. Useful for retrieving specific carts or bulk operations.

inputFields.name: contactIds
inputFields.description:
Filter by contact identifiers for B2B carts.

    Returns carts associated with any of the specified contact IDs. Used for finding carts belonging to specific business contacts.

inputFields.name: customerIds
inputFields.description:
Filter by customer identifiers for B2C carts.

    Returns carts associated with any of the specified customer IDs. Used for finding carts belonging to individual customers.

inputFields.name: companyIds
inputFields.description:
Filter by company identifiers for B2B carts.

    Returns carts associated with any of the specified company IDs. Used for finding all carts within specific companies.

inputFields.name: statuses
inputFields.description:
Filter by cart processing statuses.

    Returns carts matching any of the specified status values. Common statuses include 'active', 'abandoned', 'converted', 'expired'.

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Page number for pagination.

    Specifies which page of results to return. Must be 1 or greater.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of items per page.

    Controls how many carts are returned in each page. Must be 1 or greater.

inputFields.name: createdAt
inputFields.description: Search by date created

inputFields.name: lastModifiedAt
inputFields.description: Search by date changed

inputFields.name: sortInputs
inputFields.description: Inputs to sort by

types.name: CartSetContactInput
types.description:
Input for associating a cart with a specific business contact.

  Used in B2B scenarios to assign cart ownership to a contact person within a company, enabling proper pricing, permissions, and order processing.

inputFields.name: contactId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the contact to associate with the cart.

    Must be a valid contact ID representing a person authorized to manage carts within their company.

inputFields.name: companyId
inputFields.description:
Company identifier for the contact's organization.

    If not provided, the contact's default parent company will be used. Must be a valid company ID that the contact is authorized to represent.

types.name: CartSetCustomerInput
types.description:
Input for associating a cart with an individual customer.

  Used in B2C scenarios to assign cart ownership to a specific customer account, enabling personalized pricing, order history, and customer-specific features.

inputFields.name: customerId
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the customer to associate with the cart.

    Must be a valid customer ID representing an individual customer account in the system.

types.name: CartSetUserInput
types.description:
Input for associating a cart with a user, contact, or customer.

  Supports multiple user association patterns including legacy user IDs, B2B contacts with companies, and B2C customers. Only one association type should be specified per request.

inputFields.name: contactId
inputFields.description:
Business contact identifier for B2B cart association.

    Must be used in combination with companyId to establish the business relationship. Cannot be used with userId or customerId.

inputFields.name: customerId
inputFields.description:
Individual customer identifier for B2C cart association.

    Used for direct customer relationships. Cannot be used with userId, contactId, or companyId.

inputFields.name: companyId
inputFields.description:
Company identifier for B2B cart association.

    Must be used in combination with contactId to establish the business relationship. Cannot be used with customerId.

types.name: CartShippingMethod
types.description:
Available shipping method option for the cart.

  Represents a delivery method that can be selected for cart fulfillment, with its display information and system identifier.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Display name of the shipping method.

    Human-readable name shown to customers during shipping method selection (e.g., 'Standard Delivery', 'Express Shipping').

fields.name: code
fields.description:
Unique identifier code for the shipping method.

    Internal system code used to identify and process this shipping method (e.g., 'STD', 'EXP', 'PICKUP').

types.name: CartSortField
types.description: Available fields for sorting cart search results

enumValues.name: ID
enumValues.description: Sort by cart ID alphabetically

enumValues.name: LAST_MODIFIED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by the date when the cart was last modified

enumValues.name: CREATED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by the date when the cart was created

types.name: CartSortInput
types.description:
Sorting configuration for cart search results.

  Defines how the returned cart list should be ordered based on available fields and sort directions.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description:
Cart field to use for sorting.

    Determines which cart property will be used as the primary sort key for ordering results.

inputFields.name: order
inputFields.description:
Sort direction for the results.

    Specifies whether results should be ordered in ascending (ASC) or descending (DESC) order based on the selected field.

types.name: CartStartInput
types.description:
Input for initializing a new shopping cart session.

  Contains optional configuration for cart creation including customer association, language preferences, and business context. Supports both B2B (contact/company) and B2C (customer) scenarios with proper validation to ensure only one customer type is specified.

inputFields.name: contactId
inputFields.description:
Business contact identifier for B2B cart sessions.

    Associates the cart with a specific business contact person. Must be used in combination with companyId to establish the complete B2B relationship context.

inputFields.name: customerId
inputFields.description:
Individual customer identifier for B2C cart sessions.

    Associates the cart with an individual customer account for personalized pricing, order history, and customer-specific features. Cannot be used with contactId or companyId.

inputFields.name: companyId
inputFields.description:
Company identifier for B2B cart sessions.

    Associates the cart with a specific company for B2B pricing, terms, and business rules. Must be used in combination with contactId to identify both the company and the contact person within that company.

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Cart language preference for localization.

    Two-character ISO 639-1 language code (e.g., 'en', 'nl', 'de') that determines the language for cart content, pricing display, and communication. Affects product names, descriptions, and checkout flow.

types.name: CartStatus
types.description: Cart statuses

enumValues.name: OPEN
enumValues.description: Default cart status. OPEN carts are editable by their owner and can be processed to an order if no purchase authorization is required

enumValues.name: PENDING_PURCHASE_AUTHORIZATION
enumValues.description: Carts that require authorization by an authorization manager within the same company. Can only be edited by authorization managers after accepting purchase request, not by the owner (contact that created the Cart)

types.name: CartTaxLevel
types.description:
Tax calculation breakdown by tax rate level.

  Represents the tax amounts applied to the cart at a specific tax percentage, including any applicable discounts.

fields.name: taxPercentage
fields.description:
Tax rate percentage for this tax level.

    The percentage rate applied to calculate tax amounts for items and services subject to this tax level.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Total tax amount for this tax level.

    Sum of all tax charges applied to cart items and services that fall under this specific tax rate.

fields.name: discount
fields.description:
Total discount amount applied at this tax level.

    Sum of all tax-related discounts and reductions that apply to items subject to this tax rate.

types.name: CartTotal
types.description:
Complete pricing breakdown and totals for the shopping cart.

  Contains all calculated amounts including subtotals, taxes, discounts, and final totals for the entire cart.

fields.name: subTotal
fields.description:
Subtotal of all cart items excluding VAT.

    Sum of all item prices before tax, shipping, payment fees, and discounts are applied.

fields.name: subTotalNet
fields.description:
Subtotal of all cart items including VAT.

    Sum of all item prices with tax included, before shipping, payment fees, and discounts are applied.

fields.name: discountPercentage
fields.description:
Total discount percentage applied to the cart.

    Combined percentage discount from all active promotions, incentives, and special offers.

fields.name: totalNet
fields.description:
Final total amount including VAT.

    Complete cart total including all items, taxes, shipping, payment fees, and discounts applied.

fields.name: totalGross
fields.description:
Final total amount excluding VAT.

    Complete cart total before tax application, including shipping, payment fees, and discounts.

fields.name: discountNet
fields.description:
Total discount amount including VAT.

    Sum of all discount reductions applied to the cart, calculated with tax included.

fields.name: discount
fields.description:
Total discount amount excluding VAT.

    Sum of all discount reductions applied to the cart, calculated before tax application.

types.name: CartUnOrderableItem
types.description:
Cart item that cannot be processed into an order.

  Represents items added to the cart that are not available for purchase due to stock issues, restrictions, or other business rules. These items are displayed for reference but excluded from order processing.

fields.name: itemId
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this unorderable cart item.

    Used for item-specific operations like updates, deletions, and tracking. Generated when the item is added to the cart.

fields.name: parentItemUUID
fields.description:
Identifier of the parent item in hierarchical structures.

    Used when this unorderable item is a child component of a configurable product or bundle. Links to the main item's UUID.

fields.name: priceMode
fields.description:
Source of the item's price calculation.

    Indicates whether the price was calculated using platform rules (PLATFORM) or provided by external systems (EXTERNAL).

fields.name: quantity
fields.description:
Number of units that were attempted to be added.

    Quantity that the customer tried to add to the cart before the item was determined to be unorderable.

fields.name: price
fields.description:
Reference price for the unorderable item.

    Price information for display purposes, typically used when the price mode is set to EXTERNAL or for comparison.

fields.name: notes
fields.description:
Customer notes or special instructions for this item.

    Free-form text for item-specific requirements or comments, preserved even though the item cannot be ordered.

fields.name: productId
fields.description:
Product identifier for the unorderable item.

    Links to the specific product in the catalog system that could not be added to the order.

fields.name: clusterId
fields.description:
Cluster identifier for configurable product groups.

    Used when this unorderable item belongs to a cluster of related or configurable products.

fields.name: bundleId
fields.description:
Bundle identifier when this item is part of a product bundle.

    Links the unorderable item to a specific bundle configuration that could not be completed.

fields.name: requestDate
fields.description:
Customer's requested delivery date for this item.

    Date specified by the customer for when they would have preferred to receive this item.

types.name: CartUpdateAddressInput
types.description:
Input for updating cart address information.

  Contains complete address details for updating either billing or delivery addresses associated with a shopping cart.

inputFields.name: type
inputFields.description:
Type of address being updated.

    Specifies whether this update applies to the billing address (INVOICE) or delivery address (DELIVERY).

inputFields.name: company
inputFields.description:
Company or organization name.

    Maximum length of 100 characters. Used for business addresses where delivery or billing should be addressed to a specific company.

inputFields.name: gender
inputFields.description:
Gender of the address contact person.

    Used for proper addressing in communications and delivery instructions.

inputFields.name: firstName
inputFields.description:
First name of the address contact person.

    Maximum length of 30 characters. Required for personal identification and delivery confirmation.

inputFields.name: middleName
inputFields.description:
Middle name or initial of the address contact person.

    Maximum length of 20 characters. Optional additional name information for complete identification.

inputFields.name: lastName
inputFields.description:
Last name or surname of the address contact person.

    Maximum length of 50 characters. Required for personal identification and delivery confirmation.

inputFields.name: street
inputFields.description:
Street name for the address.

    Maximum length of 150 characters. Primary location identifier for delivery and billing purposes.

inputFields.name: number
inputFields.description:
House or building number.

    Maximum length of 10 characters. Specific location identifier within the street for precise delivery.

inputFields.name: numberExtension
inputFields.description:
Additional address information such as apartment or unit number.

    Maximum length of 15 characters. Used for multi-unit buildings or complex delivery locations.

inputFields.name: postalCode
inputFields.description:
Postal or ZIP code for the address.

    Maximum length of 10 characters. Required for mail delivery and location verification.

inputFields.name: city
inputFields.description:
City or municipality name.

    Maximum length of 100 characters. Required geographic identifier for delivery routing and address validation.

inputFields.name: region
inputFields.description:
State, province, or regional identifier.

    Maximum length of 2 characters. Additional geographic information for address precision and delivery routing.

inputFields.name: country
inputFields.description:
Country code for the address.

    Must be a valid 2-character ISO country code. Required for international shipping and address validation.

inputFields.name: code
inputFields.description:
Additional address code or reference.

    Maximum length of 64 characters. Used for internal address identification or special delivery instructions.

inputFields.name: email
inputFields.description:
Email address for delivery notifications and communication.

    Must be a valid email format. Used for order updates, delivery confirmations, and customer communication.

inputFields.name: mobile
inputFields.description:
Mobile phone number for delivery coordination.

    Maximum length of 30 characters. Primary contact number for delivery notifications and coordination.

inputFields.name: phone
inputFields.description:
Landline phone number for additional contact options.

    Maximum length of 30 characters. Alternative contact method for delivery coordination and customer service.

inputFields.name: icp
inputFields.description:
Indicates if this is an Intra-Community Supply (ICS) address. 
    
    Used for VAT exemption on cross-border B2B transactions within the EU.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Additional notes or special delivery instructions.

    Maximum length of 255 characters. Free-form text for specific delivery requirements, access codes, or special handling instructions.

types.name: CartUpdateInput
types.description:
Input for updating cart configuration and metadata.

  Allows modification of cart settings including payment and shipping preferences, notes, language, and custom reference fields.

inputFields.name: paymentData
inputFields.description:
Payment configuration updates for the cart.

    Contains payment method selection, status updates, and external pricing overrides.

inputFields.name: postageData
inputFields.description:
Shipping and delivery configuration updates for the cart.

    Contains shipping method selection, delivery preferences, and external pricing overrides.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
General notes or comments for the cart.

    Maximum length of 255 characters. Free-form text for cart-level notes, special instructions, or internal comments.

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Language preference for the cart.

    Two-character ISO 639-1 language code (e.g., 'en', 'nl', 'de') that determines the language for cart content and communications.

inputFields.name: reference
inputFields.description:
External reference identifier for the cart.

    Custom reference code or identifier that can be used to link the cart to external systems or customer references.

inputFields.name: extra3
inputFields.description:
Additional custom information field for the cart.

    Free-form text field that can store custom data or metadata that will be preserved through cart processing and order creation.

inputFields.name: extra4
inputFields.description:
Additional custom information field for the cart.

    Free-form text field that can store custom data or metadata that will be preserved through cart processing and order creation.

types.name: CartUpdateItemInput
types.description:
Input for updating existing cart items.

  Extends the base cart item input with additional fields for price overrides. Used when modifying items already present in the shopping cart.

inputFields.name: quantity
inputFields.description:
Number of units to add to the cart.

    Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Additional notes or special instructions for this item.

    Maximum length of 255 characters. HTML tags will be automatically removed for security.

inputFields.name: requestDate
inputFields.description:
Preferred delivery date for this specific item.

    Must be provided in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for items that require specific delivery scheduling.

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description:
Override price per unit for this cart item.

    When specified, replaces the calculated price with this custom value. Primarily used for external pricing systems or manual price adjustments. Must be a positive number with maximum 5 decimal places.

types.name: CartVoucher
types.description:
Voucher or gift certificate applied to the shopping cart.

  Represents a redeemable voucher code with its current status, value, and usage restrictions.

fields.name: code
fields.description:
Unique voucher code identifier.

    The code that customers enter to redeem this voucher for discounts or credit.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Display name of the voucher promotion.

    Human-readable name describing the voucher or the promotion rule that generated it.

fields.name: description
fields.description:
Detailed description of the voucher benefits.

    Explanation of what the voucher provides, including terms and conditions.

fields.name: ruleId
fields.description:
Identifier of the promotion rule that created this voucher.

    Links the voucher back to the specific promotional campaign or rule configuration.

fields.name: redeemed
fields.description:
Whether the voucher has been fully used.

    Indicates if the voucher has been completely redeemed and cannot be used again.

fields.name: combinable
fields.description:
Whether this voucher can be used with other vouchers.

    Indicates if multiple vouchers can be applied to the same cart simultaneously.

fields.name: partialRedemption
fields.description:
Whether the voucher supports partial redemption.

    Indicates if the voucher value can be used across multiple orders when it represents a monetary amount.

fields.name: available
fields.description:
Total monetary value available on the voucher.

    Original amount or credit value that can be redeemed using this voucher.

fields.name: remaining
fields.description:
Remaining monetary value after partial use.

    Amount still available for redemption when the voucher supports partial redemption.

types.name: Category
types.description:
Category entity representing product classification and organization.

External entity from the catalog service that provides category identification and hierarchy information. Used as a reference for category-specific attributes and organizational relationships within the attribute system.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Legacy category identifier (deprecated).

Historical identifier maintained for backward compatibility.
Use categoryId for all new implementations.
fields.deprecationReason: This property is no longer relevant or necessary, use categoryId instead.

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description:
Unique category identifier for direct access and management.

Primary identifier for the category used throughout the system for category operations, product associations, and hierarchy management.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Lists attributes for this category based on the search input.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Localized category names for multilingual support.

Collection of category names in different languages for international catalogs.
Defaults to the category's default language when specific language is not available.
Maximum length: 150 characters per name.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code filter.

When provided, returns only names in the specified language.
Must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code. Case-insensitive.

fields.name: description
fields.description:
Comprehensive category descriptions with HTML formatting support.

Detailed descriptions of the category that can include HTML formatting for rich content presentation.
Supports translation for multilingual catalogs and provides complete category context.
Used for category pages and detailed product organization.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code filter.

When provided, returns only descriptions in the specified language.
Must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code. Case-insensitive.

fields.name: shortDescription
fields.description:
Brief category summaries with HTML formatting support.

Concise descriptions suitable for category listings and navigation elements.
Supports HTML formatting and multilingual translation for international catalogs.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code filter.

When provided, returns only short descriptions in the specified language.
Must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code. Case-insensitive.

fields.name: slug
fields.description:
SEO-friendly URL slugs for category pages.

URL-friendly identifiers for each language used in category page URLs and navigation.
Each language has its own optimized slug for better SEO and user experience.
Generated automatically from category names if not provided.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code filter.

When provided, returns only slugs in the specified language.
Must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code. Case-insensitive.

fields.name: path
fields.description:
Hierarchical path from root to current category.

Slash-separated path of category IDs from the root category to the current category.
Used for hierarchy navigation and product search API integration.
Format: "rootId/parentId/currentId"

fields.name: categories
fields.description:
Child categories within this category.

Array of subcategories that belong to this category, enabling hierarchical category navigation and organization.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Filter by visibility status.

Y = include only hidden categories, N = include only visible categories.
When omitted, includes both hidden and visible categories.

fields.name: parent
fields.description:
Parent category in the hierarchy.

The immediate parent category of this category, used for breadcrumb navigation and hierarchy traversal.
Null for root-level categories.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Filter by visibility status.

Y = include only if parent is hidden, N = include only if parent is visible.
When omitted, includes parent regardless of visibility status.

fields.name: defaultLanguage
fields.description:
Default language code for fallback content.

Primary language used when requested language content is not available.
Ensures consistent content delivery across multilingual catalogs.
Must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code.

fields.name: metadataTitles
fields.description:
SEO-optimized page titles for search engines.

Localized title tag content used for search engine optimization and browser tab display.
Should be concise, descriptive, and include relevant keywords for better search visibility.
Recommended length: 50-60 characters.

fields.name: metadataDescriptions
fields.description:
SEO meta descriptions for search engine results.

Localized meta description tag content that appears in search engine results pages.
Should be compelling, informative, and within recommended character limits to improve click-through rates.
Recommended length: 150-160 characters.

fields.name: metadataKeywords
fields.description:
SEO keywords for search engine optimization.

Localized meta keywords relevant to the category content.
Used by search engines to understand category context and improve discoverability for relevant search queries.
Comma-separated list of relevant keywords.

fields.name: metadataCanonicalUrls
fields.description:
Canonical URLs for duplicate content management.

Localized canonical URLs that tell search engines which version of the category page is the authoritative source.
Prevents duplicate content issues and consolidates SEO value.

fields.name: hidden
fields.description:
Visibility status of the category.

Controls whether the category is visible to customers in navigation and search results.
Hidden categories are only accessible to administrators and can be used for draft content or temporary organization.
Values: Y (hidden) or N (visible).

fields.name: categoryPath
fields.description:
Complete category path from root to current category.

Retrieves the full hierarchical path from the root category to the current category.
Returns an ordered array of categories representing the breadcrumb navigation path.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Filter path categories by visibility status.

Y = include only hidden categories in path, N = include only visible categories in path.
When omitted, includes all categories in the path regardless of visibility status.

fields.name: sources
fields.description:
Source systems associated with the category.

Retrieves information about the external systems or sources that this category originates from or is synchronized with.
Useful for tracking category origins in multi-system integrations.

fields.name: products
fields.description:
Products belonging to this category.

Paginated collection of products that are classified under this category, including search results, filtering options, and pagination metadata.

args.name: input
args.description:
Search and filtering criteria for category products.

Optional search parameters to filter and sort products within this category. If not provided, returns all accessible products in the category with default pagination.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Output message response [INFO/WARNING/ERROR]

fields.name: success
fields.description: Success status

fields.name: productId
fields.description: Product ID the action was performed to

fields.name: clusterId
fields.description: Cluster ID the action was performed to

fields.name: data
fields.description: List of output messages for actions performed

fields.name: messages
fields.description: List of extra messages

types.name: CategoryAddProductsClustersInput
types.description:
Input for adding products and clusters to a category.

Specifies which products and clusters should be associated with a category.
At least one of productIds or clusterIds must be provided.
All IDs must be unique and reference existing entities.

inputFields.name: productIds
inputFields.description:
Product identifiers to add to the category.

List of unique product IDs that should be associated with the category.
Products must exist in the system and not already be associated with this category.
Array must not be empty if provided and all IDs must be unique.

inputFields.name: clusterIds
inputFields.description:
Cluster identifiers to add to the category.

List of unique cluster IDs that should be associated with the category.
Clusters must exist in the system and not already be associated with this category.
Array must not be empty if provided and all IDs must be unique.

fields.name: category
fields.description: The category object

fields.name: actions
fields.description: Output messages about the actions performed.

types.name: CategoryAttribute
types.description:
Category-specific attribute containing custom properties and metadata for product categories.

Extends the base category interface with attribute functionality. Used to store additional category information such as display properties, classification metadata, and custom properties that are not part of the standard category schema.

Perfect for category-level configuration, taxonomy enhancement, and category-specific business rules that need to be applied across all products within the category.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute instance.

Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for this specific attribute. Used to reference and manage individual attribute instances.

fields.name: value
fields.description:
The actual value data stored in this attribute.

Contains the attribute value in the appropriate format based on the attribute description's type definition. The value structure varies depending on the attribute type (text, enum, color, etc.).

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when this attribute was originally created.

Records the exact date and time when this attribute instance was first created in the system. Used for audit trails and data lifecycle management.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when this attribute was last modified.

Records the most recent date and time when any changes were made to this attribute's value or configuration. Updated automatically on each modification.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who created this attribute.

References the user account that originally created this attribute instance. May be 0 for system-generated attributes or when user information is not available.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who last modified this attribute.

References the user account that made the most recent changes to this attribute. May be 0 for system modifications or when user information is not available.

fields.name: attributeDescription
fields.description:
Retrieve the attribute description that defines this category attribute's schema and behavior.

Returns the complete attribute description containing metadata, type definitions, display configuration, and localization settings. This description serves as the template that defines how this category attribute should behave and be presented.

Essential for understanding attribute constraints, available operations, and presentation requirements for category-specific attributes that extend category information.

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description:
Unique identifier of the category that owns this attribute.

References the specific category in the catalog hierarchy that this attribute value is associated with. Used to establish the relationship between attributes and their parent categories for classification and organizational purposes.

types.name: CategoryCsvInput
types.description:
Input for bulk category import from CSV files.

Enables bulk creation of categories through CSV file upload with customizable field mappings.
Supports validation, error reporting, and flexible column mapping for different CSV formats.

inputFields.name: file
inputFields.description:
CSV file containing category data.

The CSV file must contain valid category information with proper headers.
File must be in CSV format with UTF-8 encoding.

inputFields.name: mappings
inputFields.description:
Column mapping configuration for CSV import.

Defines how CSV columns map to category fields in the system.
Each mapping specifies the CSV header name and corresponding system field.
Mappings must be unique and follow the defined field constraints.

types.name: CategoryCsvMapping
types.description:
Mapping configuration for CSV column to system field.

Defines how a specific CSV column maps to a category field in the system.
Ensures proper data import by specifying the relationship between CSV headers and system fields.

inputFields.name: csvHeader
inputFields.description:
CSV column header name.

The exact name of the column header in the CSV file.
Must match the header name exactly (case-sensitive).
Cannot be empty or contain only whitespace.

inputFields.name: fieldName
inputFields.description:
Propeller eCommerce Platform field for the CSV column.

The corresponding field in the Propeller eCommerce Platform where the CSV column data will be imported.
Must be a valid CategoryFieldName enum value.
Each field has specific validation rules and constraints.

enumValues.name: PARENT_SOURCE_ID
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] The source id of the parent category. Use either PARENT_ID or a combination of PARENT_SOURCE_NAME and PARENT_SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: PARENT_SOURCE_NAME
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] The source id of the parent category. Use either PARENT_ID or a combination of PARENT_SOURCE_NAME and PARENT_SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: PARENT_ID
enumValues.description: [Optional][Integer] The id of the parent category. Only required when using a combination of PARENT_SOURCE_NAME and PARENT_SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: DEFAULT_LANGUAGE
enumValues.description:
[Required][String] Primary language for category content.

The default language code used when localized content is not available in the requested language. Determines fallback behavior for multilingual category display.

enumValues.name: LANGUAGE
enumValues.description: [Required][String] The language for the name, description and short description

enumValues.name: NAME
enumValues.description:
[Required][String][Max 150 characters] Localized category names for display in different languages.

Collection of category names in various supported languages for international markets and multilingual storefronts. Falls back to the category's default language when specific language is not available.

enumValues.name: DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Detailed category description with rich content support.

Comprehensive category information including features, purpose, and context. Supports HTML formatting for rich content display and can be translated for multilingual catalogs. Used for category pages and detailed product organization.

enumValues.name: SHORT_DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Brief category summary for listings and previews.

Concise category description suitable for navigation menus, category cards, and overview displays where space is limited. Supports HTML formatting and multilingual translation for consistent user experience.

enumValues.name: METADATA_TITLE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] SEO-optimized page title for search engines.

Localized title tag content used for search engine optimization and browser tab display. Should be concise, descriptive, and include relevant keywords for better search visibility.

enumValues.name: METADATA_DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] SEO meta description for search engine results.

Localized meta description tag content that appears in search engine results pages. Should be compelling, informative, and within recommended character limits to improve click-through rates.

enumValues.name: METADATA_KEYWORDS
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] SEO keywords for search engine optimization.

Localized meta keywords relevant to the category content. Used by search engines to understand category context and improve discoverability for relevant search queries.

enumValues.name: METADATA_CANONICAL_URL
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Canonical URL for duplicate content management.

Localized canonical URL that tells search engines which version of the category page is the authoritative source, preventing duplicate content issues and consolidating SEO value.

enumValues.name: SOURCE_NAME
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] The name of the source. Use either ID or a combination of SOURCE_NAME and SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: SOURCE_ID
enumValues.description: [Optional][String] The id of the source. Use either ID or a combination of SOURCE_NAME and SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: ID
enumValues.description: [Optional][Integer] The id of the category. Only required when using a combination of SOURCE_NAME and SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: HIDDEN
enumValues.description: [Optional][Enum] The hidden status of the category, must be one of the following: [Y, N. Defaults to N

inputFields.name: term
inputFields.description:
General search term for product discovery.

    Searches across product names, descriptions, keywords, SKUs, and other searchable fields. Supports partial matching and relevance-based ranking.

inputFields.name: manufacturers
inputFields.description:
Filter by product manufacturers.

    Returns products from any of the specified manufacturers. Useful for brand-based filtering and manufacturer-specific product catalogs.

inputFields.name: supplierCodes
inputFields.description:
Filter by supplier product codes.

    Returns products matching any of the specified supplier codes. Used for supplier-specific product identification and cross-referencing.

inputFields.name: suppliers
inputFields.description:
Filter by product suppliers.

    Returns products from any of the specified suppliers. Useful for supplier-based filtering and procurement-focused searches.

inputFields.name: manufacturerCodes
inputFields.description:
Filter by manufacturer product codes.

    Returns products matching any of the specified manufacturer codes (OEM codes). Used for cross-referencing and manufacturer-specific identification.

inputFields.name: EANCodes
inputFields.description:
Filter by European Article Numbers (EAN).

    Returns products matching any of the specified EAN codes. Used for barcode-based product identification and inventory management.

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description:
Filter by specific product identifiers.

    Returns products whose IDs match the provided list. Useful for retrieving specific products or bulk operations.

inputFields.name: productIds
inputFields.description:
Filter by product identifiers.

    Returns products matching any of the specified product IDs. Alternative to 'ids' field for product identification.

inputFields.name: clusterIds
inputFields.description:
Filter by product cluster identifiers.

    Returns products belonging to any of the specified clusters. Used for finding configurable products and product groups.

inputFields.name: class
inputFields.description:
Filter by product classification.

    Returns products of the specified class type (e.g. product, cluster). Used for business logic and fulfillment routing.

inputFields.name: tags
inputFields.description:
Filter by product tags.

    Returns products that have any of the specified tags. Used for promotional grouping, seasonal filtering, and custom product categorization.

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Language for search processing.

    ISO 639-1 uppercase language code that determines which language-specific fields are used for searching. Does not affect the language of returned content (use language-specific resolvers for that).

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Page number for pagination.

    Specifies which page of results to return. Must be 1 or greater. Default is 1.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of items per page.

    Controls how many products are returned in each page. Default is 12, maximum is 500. Values over 500 will be capped to 500.

inputFields.name: textFilters
inputFields.description: List of text filters

inputFields.name: rangeFilters
inputFields.description: List of range filters

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description: Product price filter

inputFields.name: statuses
inputFields.description: List of product status filters

inputFields.name: hidden
inputFields.description: Is product hidden?

inputFields.name: sortInputs
inputFields.description: List of product sort filters

inputFields.name: searchFields
inputFields.description: List of product search fields

inputFields.name: hasBundle
inputFields.description: Is product in a bundle

inputFields.name: isBundleLeader
inputFields.description: Is product a bundle leader

inputFields.name: containerSlugs
inputFields.description: Product container slug(s)

inputFields.name: containerPathSlugs
inputFields.description: Product path slug(s)

inputFields.name: userId
inputFields.description: Browse catalog as a specific User. Permissions, orderlists, favorite will be merged  with the logged in user.

inputFields.name: companyId
inputFields.description: Browse catalog as a specific Company. Permissions, orderlists, favorite will be merged  with the logged in user.

inputFields.name: createdAt
inputFields.description: Search by date created

inputFields.name: lastModifiedAt
inputFields.description: Search by date changed

inputFields.name: getDescendants
inputFields.description: Get all descending products (true) or only the direct child products of this category (false)

inputFields.name: skus
inputFields.description:
List of specific product SKUs to search for.

Array of Stock Keeping Unit codes to filter products by. When provided, only products with matching SKUs will be returned. Useful for finding specific spare parts or components.

inputFields.name: applyOrderlists
inputFields.description:
Enable orderlist-based product filtering.

    When true, applies orderlist restrictions to determine product visibility based on customer permissions and access rights.

inputFields.name: orderlistIds
inputFields.description:
Specific orderlists to apply for product filtering.

    List of orderlist IDs to use for determining product visibility. If not specified, uses default orderlists based on customer context.

types.name: CategoryRemoveProductsClustersInput
types.description:
Input for removing products and clusters from a category.

Specifies which products and clusters should be disassociated from a category.
At least one of productIds or clusterIds must be provided.
All IDs must be unique and reference existing associations.

inputFields.name: productIds
inputFields.description:
Product identifiers to add to the category.

List of unique product IDs that should be associated with the category.
Products must exist in the system and not already be associated with this category.
Array must not be empty if provided and all IDs must be unique.

inputFields.name: clusterIds
inputFields.description:
Cluster identifiers to add to the category.

List of unique cluster IDs that should be associated with the category.
Clusters must exist in the system and not already be associated with this category.
Array must not be empty if provided and all IDs must be unique.

fields.name: category
fields.description: The category object

fields.name: actions
fields.description: Output messages about the actions performed.

types.name: CategoryResponse
types.description:
Paginated response containing category search results.

Provides a structured response for category queries with pagination support.
Includes the list of categories, total count, and pagination metadata for efficient data navigation.

fields.name: items
fields.description: List of items of type Category

fields.name: itemsFound
fields.description: Total number of items found

fields.name: offset
fields.description: The amount of items to show per page

fields.name: page
fields.description: The current page

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Total amount of pages

fields.name: start
fields.description: Start position of the current page

fields.name: end
fields.description: End position of the current page

types.name: CategorySearchInput
types.description:
Search and filter criteria for category queries.

Provides comprehensive filtering, sorting, and pagination options for category searches.
Supports text search, hierarchical filtering, visibility control, and multilingual content.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Search categories by name.

Performs full text matching against category names in the specified or default language.
Case-sensitive search that matches the entire category name.

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Language code for localized search.

The language to use when searching categories by name or slug.
When omitted, the category's default language is used.
Must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code (2 characters).

inputFields.name: slug
inputFields.description:
Search categories by URL slugs.

Find categories by one or more SEO-friendly URL slugs.
Matches exact slug values in the specified or default language.

inputFields.name: categoryId
inputFields.description:
Filter categories by specific identifiers.

Find categories by one or more category IDs.
Useful for retrieving specific categories or checking existence.

inputFields.name: parentCategoryId
inputFields.description:
Filter categories by parent relationships.

Find categories that belong to one or more parent categories.
Useful for retrieving subcategories of specific parent categories.

inputFields.name: hidden
inputFields.description:
Filter categories by visibility status.

Find categories by their hidden status.
Y = hidden categories, N = visible categories.
When omitted, returns both hidden and visible categories.

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Page number for pagination.

The page number to return in paginated results.
Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 1.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of categories per page.

The amount of categories to return per page.
Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 12.

inputFields.name: sortField
inputFields.description:
Field to sort categories by.

Available sortable fields: [name, dateCreated, entityDateChanged].
When omitted, results are returned in default order.

inputFields.name: sortOrder
inputFields.description:
Sort order for results.

Determines the sorting direction for the specified sort field.
ASC = ascending order, DESC = descending order.
Defaults to ascending order.

types.name: CategorySortableFields
types.description:
Fields available for sorting category results.

Defines the available fields that can be used to sort category queries.
Each field provides different sorting perspectives for category organization and display.

enumValues.name: name
enumValues.description:
Sort by category name.

Sorts categories alphabetically by their name in the specified or default language.
Useful for creating alphabetical category listings.

enumValues.name: dateCreated
enumValues.description:
Sort by creation date.

Sorts categories by the date they were created in the system.
Useful for finding recently added categories or chronological organization.

enumValues.name: dateChanged
enumValues.description:
Sort by last modification date.

Sorts categories by the date they were last modified.
Useful for finding recently updated categories or tracking content changes.

types.name: Channel
types.description:
Represents a sales or distribution channel within a tenant.
Channels define distinct pathways for product sales and customer interaction.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the channel.
Used for all channel-related operations and references.

fields.name: channelId
fields.description:
[DEPRECATED] Legacy channel identifier.
Maintained for backward compatibility - use 'id' field instead.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Display name of the channel.
Used in user interfaces and for channel identification.

fields.name: descriptions
fields.description:
Localized descriptions of the channel in different languages.
Provides multilingual support for channel information display.

fields.name: catalogRootId
fields.description:
Reference to the root catalog item for this channel.
Defines the top-level product hierarchy available through this channel.

fields.name: anonymousUserId
fields.description:
Reference to the anonymous user account for this channel.
Used for handling unauthenticated user sessions and default permissions.

fields.name: defaultLetterId
fields.description:
[DEPRECATED] Legacy letter template identifier.
No longer used in current system architecture.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when the channel was created.
Used for auditing and chronological ordering.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when the channel was last modified.
Updated automatically on any channel changes.

fields.name: tenant
fields.description:
Resolves the tenant that owns this channel.
Provides access to tenant information and settings for the channel.

Errors: TENANT_GET_ERROR, TENANT_NOT_FOUND_ERROR if tenant doesn't exist.

AUTH: Role=[configuration.OWNER,configuration.EDITOR,configuration.VIEWER]

fields.name: shop
fields.description: [DEPRECATED] This field will be removed in a future version
fields.deprecationReason: This field will be removed in a future version

types.name: ChannelCreateInput
types.description:
Input for creating a new channel within a tenant.
Channels represent distinct sales or distribution channels with their own configuration.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Unique name for the channel within the tenant.
Must be at least 1 character long and will be used for identification and display purposes.

Validation: Minimum length of 1 character.

inputFields.name: descriptions
inputFields.description:
Localized descriptions for the channel in different languages.
Each entry must have a unique language code to avoid duplicates.

inputFields.name: catalogRootId
inputFields.description:
Reference to the root catalog item for this channel.
Defines the top-level product hierarchy available through this channel.

inputFields.name: anonymousUserId
inputFields.description:
Reference to the anonymous user account for this channel.
Used for handling unauthenticated user sessions and permissions.

types.name: ChannelUpdateInput
types.description:
Input for updating an existing channel.
All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Unique name for the channel within the tenant.
Must be at least 1 character long and will be used for identification and display purposes.

Validation: Minimum length of 1 character.

inputFields.name: descriptions
inputFields.description:
Localized descriptions for the channel in different languages.
Each entry must have a unique language code to avoid duplicates.

inputFields.name: catalogRootId
inputFields.description:
Reference to the root catalog item for this channel.
Defines the top-level product hierarchy available through this channel.

inputFields.name: anonymousUserId
inputFields.description:
Reference to the anonymous user account for this channel.
Used for handling unauthenticated user sessions and permissions.

types.name: ClaimsResetAllResponse
types.description:
Response for bulk user claims reset operations.

  Provides detailed statistics about the batch claims reset process, including success and failure counts for monitoring and auditing purposes.

fields.name: successCount
fields.description:
Number of users whose claims were successfully reset.

    Indicates how many user accounts had their authorization claims successfully updated during the batch operation.

fields.name: errorCount
fields.description:
Number of users whose claims reset failed.

    Indicates how many user accounts encountered errors during the claims reset process and may need manual intervention.

fields.name: totalProcessed
fields.description:
Total number of users processed in the batch operation.

    Sum of successful and failed operations, representing the complete scope of the batch claims reset.

fields.name: completed
fields.description:
Whether the entire batch operation completed successfully.

    Indicates if the batch process finished without critical errors, though individual user operations may still have failed.

types.name: Cluster
types.description:
Cluster entity representing grouped products with shared characteristics.

External entity from the catalog service that provides cluster identification and categorization. Clusters group related products together based on shared attributes, features, or business logic. Used as a reference for cluster-specific attributes and group-level properties within the attribute system.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Resource primary identifier

fields.name: clusterId
fields.description: The classID of this cluster

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Lists attributes for this cluster based on the search input.

fields.name: categories
fields.description:
All categories the cluster belongs to.

Paginated response containing all categories associated with this cluster.
Includes categories with full category details and pagination support.

args.name: input
args.description:
Search and filter criteria for cluster categories.

Provides filtering, sorting, and pagination options for the cluster's associated categories.
When omitted, returns all categories with default pagination settings.

fields.name: category
fields.description:
Primary category of the cluster.

Retrieves the main category that this cluster belongs to, providing hierarchical organization and navigation context.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Filter by category visibility status.

Y = include only if category is hidden, N = include only if category is visible.
When omitted, includes category regardless of visibility status.

fields.name: categoryPath
fields.description:
Complete category path for the cluster.

Retrieves the full hierarchical path from the root category to the cluster's primary category.
Returns an ordered array of categories representing the breadcrumb navigation path.
Requires authentication for access.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Filter path categories by visibility status.

Y = include only hidden categories in path, N = include only visible categories in path.
When omitted, includes all categories in the path regardless of visibility status.

fields.name: crossupsellsFrom
fields.description:
Retrieve all cross-sell and upsell recommendations where this cluster is the source.

Returns recommendations that are triggered when customers view or interact with any product in this cluster. These are the products or clusters that will be suggested to customers based on products in this cluster. Useful for understanding cluster-level recommendation strategies and scalable product relationships.

Possible errors:
- CROSSUPSELL_UNKNOWN_ERROR: Failed to search cross-sell/upsell recommendations
- CROSSUPSELL_CROSS_SERVICE_ERROR: Failed to communicate with external services

args.name: input
args.description:
Additional search criteria to filter the recommendations.

If not provided, returns all recommendations where this cluster is the source with default pagination settings. Can be used to further filter by recommendation type, target products, date ranges, or apply custom sorting.

fields.name: crossupsellsTo
fields.description:
Retrieve all cross-sell and upsell recommendations where this cluster is the target.

Returns recommendations where products from this cluster are being suggested to customers. These are the source products or clusters that trigger recommendations for products in this cluster. Useful for understanding what drives recommendations for cluster products and optimizing cluster visibility.

Possible errors:
- CROSSUPSELL_UNKNOWN_ERROR: Failed to search cross-sell/upsell recommendations
- CROSSUPSELL_CROSS_SERVICE_ERROR: Failed to communicate with external services

args.name: input
args.description:
Additional search criteria to filter the recommendations.

If not provided, returns all recommendations where this cluster is the target with default pagination settings. Can be used to further filter by recommendation type, source products, date ranges, or apply custom sorting.

fields.name: favoriteLists
fields.description:
Collection of favorite lists that contain this cluster.

Returns paginated results of all favorite lists where this cluster has been added.
Useful for understanding cluster popularity and usage patterns.

**Response Structure**:
- Paginated list of favorite lists containing this cluster
- Complete favorite list metadata
- Owner information (company, contact, or customer)
- Creation and modification timestamps

**Analytics Capabilities**:
- Cluster popularity tracking
- Usage pattern analysis
- Cross-list cluster relationships
- Category preference insights

**Use Cases**:
- Category recommendation systems
- Popular cluster identification
- Bulk product management insights
- Inventory category demand analysis

fields.name: orderlists
fields.description:
Order lists that include this product cluster.

Returns a paginated collection of order lists where this cluster has been assigned.
- POSITIVE order lists: Assigned users/companies can see and order all products in this cluster
- NEGATIVE order lists: Assigned users/companies cannot see or order any products in this cluster

Clusters enable efficient management of product access for groups of related products.
Results can be filtered using the input parameter for more specific queries.

args.name: input
args.description:
Search and filtering criteria for order lists that include this product cluster.
    
    Filters the results to show only order lists where this specific product cluster has been assigned.
    - POSITIVE order lists: Assigned users/companies can see and order products from this cluster
    - NEGATIVE order lists: Assigned users/companies cannot see or order products from this cluster
    
    The cluster inclusion means ALL products within this cluster are affected by the order list rules.
    All standard search criteria can be applied in addition to the cluster-specific filtering.
    
    If not provided, returns all order lists that include this cluster with default pagination settings.

fields.name: products
fields.description: Array of selectable main products for this cluster, when the array contains more than one. Only one can be added per cart/order item

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Product record creation timestamp.

Date and time when this product was first added to the system, used for auditing and product lifecycle tracking.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Product record last modification timestamp.

Date and time when any product information was last updated, used for change tracking and synchronization.

fields.name: drillDowns
fields.description: The drilldown configuration for this cluster

fields.name: defaultProduct
fields.description:
Default product for the cluster.

Returns the primary product that represents this cluster when no specific product option is selected. Used for displaying cluster information and providing a fallback product reference.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Include hidden products in the lookup.

When true, includes products marked as hidden in the search. When false or not specified, only returns visible products.

fields.name: names
fields.description:
Localized names for the cluster.

Returns translated cluster names. Can be filtered by language code to get names for specific locales.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code to filter names.

ISO 639-1 uppercase language code (e.g., 'EN', 'NL', 'DE'). If provided, returns only names for that language.

fields.name: descriptions
fields.description:
Localized descriptions for the cluster.

Returns translated cluster descriptions. Can be filtered by language code to get descriptions for specific locales.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code to filter descriptions.

ISO 639-1 uppercase language code (e.g., 'EN', 'NL', 'DE'). If provided, returns only descriptions for that language.

fields.name: shortDescriptions
fields.description:
Localized short descriptions for the cluster.

Returns translated cluster short descriptions used in listings and previews. Can be filtered by language code to get descriptions for specific locales.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code to filter short descriptions.

ISO 639-1 uppercase language code (e.g., 'EN', 'NL', 'DE'). If provided, returns only short descriptions for that language.

fields.name: slugs
fields.description:
Localized URL slugs for the cluster.

Returns translated cluster slugs used in URLs and navigation. Can be filtered by language code to get slugs for specific locales.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code to filter slugs.

ISO 639-1 uppercase language code (e.g., 'EN', 'NL', 'DE'). If provided, returns only slugs for that language.

fields.name: sku
fields.description:
Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management.

Unique alphanumeric code used for inventory tracking, order processing, and product identification across all systems and channels.

fields.name: defaultLanguage
fields.description: The default language for this product or cluster, this is the language to fall back too, when there is no translation available in a specific language.

fields.name: metadataTitles
fields.description: [SEO] Localized Metadata title available in multiple languages

fields.name: metadataDescriptions
fields.description: [SEO] Localized Metadata description available in multiple languages

fields.name: metadataKeywords
fields.description: [SEO] Localized Metadata keywords available in multiple languages

fields.name: metadataCanonicalUrls
fields.description: [SEO] Localized Metadata canonical url available in multiple languages

fields.name: shortNames
fields.description:
Localized abbreviated product names for different languages.

    Returns short product names in multiple languages. Can be filtered by language code to get short names for specific locales.

args.name: language
args.description: Language code to filter short names.

fields.name: sources
fields.description:
Cluster data sources and external system references.

    Returns information about external systems and sources that provide data for this cluster, used for data lineage and integration management.

fields.name: language
fields.description:
The requested language for this this resource, default to the 
          products default language.
          ISO 639-1 format.

fields.name: class
fields.description: The class of the request resource

fields.name: hidden
fields.description: The hidden status of this resource.

types.name: ClusterAssignProductsInput
types.description:
Input for assigning products to a cluster.

Contains the list of product identifiers that should be associated with a cluster. Used for building product groups and enabling cluster-based product organization and configuration options.

inputFields.name: productIds
inputFields.description:
List of product identifiers to assign to the cluster.

Array of unique product IDs that should be associated with the cluster. Each product ID must be valid and exist in the system. Duplicate IDs are not allowed.

fields.name: cluster
fields.description: The cluster object

fields.name: actions
fields.description: Output messages about the actions performed.

types.name: ClusterAttribute
types.description:
Cluster-specific attribute containing shared properties and metadata for product clusters.

Extends the base cluster interface with attribute functionality. Used to store shared characteristics, group-level properties, and cluster-wide configuration that applies to all products within the cluster.

Perfect for managing attributes that span multiple related products, defining cluster-level business rules, and maintaining consistency across product groups with shared characteristics.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute instance.

Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for this specific attribute. Used to reference and manage individual attribute instances.

fields.name: value
fields.description:
The actual value data stored in this attribute.

Contains the attribute value in the appropriate format based on the attribute description's type definition. The value structure varies depending on the attribute type (text, enum, color, etc.).

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when this attribute was originally created.

Records the exact date and time when this attribute instance was first created in the system. Used for audit trails and data lifecycle management.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when this attribute was last modified.

Records the most recent date and time when any changes were made to this attribute's value or configuration. Updated automatically on each modification.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who created this attribute.

References the user account that originally created this attribute instance. May be 0 for system-generated attributes or when user information is not available.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who last modified this attribute.

References the user account that made the most recent changes to this attribute. May be 0 for system modifications or when user information is not available.

fields.name: attributeDescription
fields.description:
Retrieve the attribute description that defines this cluster attribute's schema and behavior.

Returns the complete attribute description containing metadata, type definitions, display configuration, and localization settings. This description serves as the template that defines how this cluster attribute should behave and be presented.

Essential for understanding attribute constraints, available operations, and presentation requirements for cluster-specific attributes that extend cluster information.

fields.name: clusterId
fields.description:
Unique identifier of the cluster that owns this attribute.

References the specific product cluster that this attribute value is associated with. Used to establish the relationship between attributes and their parent clusters for group-level property management and shared characteristics.

types.name: ClusterBulkMoveError
types.description:
Error information for a failed cluster move operation.

Contains details about what went wrong when attempting to move a cluster, including error codes, messages, and the affected cluster record.

fields.name: code
fields.description:
Error code indicating the type of error.

Can be VALIDATION, DB_INSERT, or UNKNOWN.

fields.name: messages
fields.description:
List of error messages.

Human-readable error messages describing what went wrong during the cluster move operation.

fields.name: record
fields.description:
The cluster record that failed.

JSON representation of the cluster data that caused the error, if available.

fields.name: rowNumber
fields.description:
Row number in the input array.

The position of the failed cluster in the input array, useful for identifying which cluster move operation failed.

types.name: ClusterBulkMoveErrorCode
types.description: Error codes for cluster bulk move operations

types.name: ClusterBulkMoveInput
types.description:
Input for bulk moving clusters to categories.

Contains an array of cluster-category pairs for moving multiple clusters to their respective categories in a single operation.

inputFields.name: clusters
inputFields.description:
List of cluster move operations.

Array of cluster-category pairs specifying which clusters should be moved to which categories. Each item contains a clusterId and categoryId.

types.name: ClusterBulkMoveResponse
types.description:
Response for bulk cluster move operations.

Contains the count of successfully moved clusters and any errors that occurred during the operation.

fields.name: movedCount
fields.description:
Number of clusters successfully moved.

Count of clusters that were successfully moved to their target categories.

fields.name: errors
fields.description:
List of errors that occurred.

Array of error objects for clusters that failed to move, including error codes, messages, and affected records.

types.name: ClusterCategorySearchInput
types.description:
Search criteria for cluster-associated categories.

Provides filtering and search options for categories associated with a specific cluster.
Inherits all CategorySearchInput functionality except categoryId filtering, since the cluster's categories are already determined.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Search categories by name.

Performs full text matching against category names in the specified or default language.
Case-sensitive search that matches the entire category name.

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Language code for localized search.

The language to use when searching categories by name or slug.
When omitted, the category's default language is used.
Must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code (2 characters).

inputFields.name: slug
inputFields.description:
Search categories by URL slugs.

Find categories by one or more SEO-friendly URL slugs.
Matches exact slug values in the specified or default language.

inputFields.name: parentCategoryId
inputFields.description:
Filter categories by parent relationships.

Find categories that belong to one or more parent categories.
Useful for retrieving subcategories of specific parent categories.

inputFields.name: hidden
inputFields.description:
Filter categories by visibility status.

Find categories by their hidden status.
Y = hidden categories, N = visible categories.
When omitted, returns both hidden and visible categories.

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Page number for pagination.

The page number to return in paginated results.
Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 1.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of categories per page.

The amount of categories to return per page.
Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 12.

inputFields.name: sortField
inputFields.description:
Field to sort categories by.

Available sortable fields: [name, dateCreated, entityDateChanged].
When omitted, results are returned in default order.

inputFields.name: sortOrder
inputFields.description:
Sort order for results.

Determines the sorting direction for the specified sort field.
ASC = ascending order, DESC = descending order.
Defaults to ascending order.

types.name: ClusterConfig
types.description:
Cluster configuration template for product cluster behavior.

Defines how product clusters should behave, including which fields are editable, shared, or selectable, and how drill-down navigation should work. Used as a template for creating consistent cluster experiences across the catalog.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the cluster configuration.

System-generated ID used to reference this configuration template when creating or updating product clusters.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Human-readable name for the cluster configuration.

Descriptive name that identifies the purpose and behavior of this configuration template, used for administrative purposes and configuration management.

fields.name: settings
fields.description:
Collection of configuration settings that define cluster behavior.

List of settings that specify how product attributes and fields should behave within clusters using this configuration, including editability, visibility, and interaction rules.

types.name: ClusterConfigCreateInput
types.description:
Input for creating a new cluster configuration template.

Contains the configuration name and settings that define how product clusters should behave, including field editability, sharing rules, and customer interaction patterns. Used to establish consistent cluster behavior across the catalog.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Name for the cluster configuration template.

Descriptive name that identifies the purpose and behavior of this configuration. Must be between 2 and 35 characters long and will be used for administrative identification and management.

inputFields.name: settings
inputFields.description:
Initial configuration settings for the cluster config.

Collection of settings that define how product attributes and fields should behave within clusters using this configuration, including editability, visibility, and interaction rules.

types.name: ClusterConfigSetting
types.description:
Individual configuration setting for cluster behavior control.

Defines how a specific product attribute or field should behave within clusters, including whether it's editable, shared across products, or used for customer selection. Controls the user interface and business logic for cluster product management.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the configuration setting.

System-generated ID used to reference this specific setting within cluster configurations and administrative interfaces.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Name of the product attribute or field this setting controls.

Identifies which product property this configuration applies to, such as 'name', 'price', 'description', or custom attribute names.

fields.name: type
fields.description:
Behavior type that defines how this setting operates within clusters.

Specifies whether the attribute is editable per product, shared across all cluster products, or used for customer selection and navigation.

fields.name: displayType
fields.description:
User interface display method for this setting.

Determines how customers interact with this setting in the storefront, such as through dropdowns, radio buttons, or other interface elements.

fields.name: priority
fields.description:
Display priority for ordering settings in user interfaces.

Numeric value used to control the order in which settings appear in administrative interfaces and customer-facing configuration screens.

types.name: ClusterConfigSettingDisplayType
types.description:
User interface display types for cluster configuration options.

Defines how cluster drill-down options are presented to customers in the storefront, affecting the user experience and interaction method for product selection.

enumValues.name: DROPDOWN
enumValues.description:
Dropdown selection interface.

Displays options in a compact dropdown menu, suitable for configurations with many options or when space is limited.

enumValues.name: RADIO
enumValues.description:
Radio button selection interface.

Displays options as radio buttons, ideal for configurations with few options where all choices should be visible simultaneously.

enumValues.name: IMAGE
enumValues.description:
Image-based selection interface.

Displays options as clickable images, perfect for visual attributes like patterns, styles, or product variants where visual representation is important.

enumValues.name: COLOR
enumValues.description:
Color picker selection interface.

Displays options as color swatches or color picker, specifically designed for color-based product attributes and variations.

types.name: ClusterConfigSettingType
types.description:
Configuration types that define how cluster settings behave and interact with product data.
