inputFields.description:
Localized descriptions for the pricesheet in multiple languages.

    Array of language-specific descriptions that provide detailed information about the pricesheet's purpose and usage. Each entry must have a unique language code and corresponding description text.

inputFields.name: priority
inputFields.description:
Priority level for pricesheet application order.

    Integer value determining the order in which pricesheets are evaluated when multiple pricesheets apply to the same customer. Higher values indicate higher priority.

inputFields.name: readonly
inputFields.description:
Read-only access control flag for pricesheet protection.

    When set to true, allows front-end to prevent modification or deletion of the pricesheet. Used to protect critical pricing configurations from accidental changes.

types.name: PriceSortField
types.description: Available fields for sorting price search results

enumValues.name: ID
enumValues.description: Sort by price record ID

enumValues.name: PRODUCT_ID
enumValues.description: Sort by associated product ID numerically

enumValues.name: PRICE_PER
enumValues.description: Sort by unit quantity for the price

enumValues.name: PRICE
enumValues.description: Sort by base list price amount

enumValues.name: SUGGESTED_PRICE
enumValues.description: Sort by manufacturer's suggested retail price

enumValues.name: STORE_PRICE
enumValues.description: Sort by physical store price

enumValues.name: BULK_PRICE_DISCOUNT_TYPE
enumValues.description: Sort by bulk discount calculation method

enumValues.name: DEFAULT_TAX_CODE
enumValues.description: Sort by default tax classification

enumValues.name: LAST_MODIFIED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by the date when the price was last modified

enumValues.name: CREATED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by the date when the price was created

enumValues.name: COST_PRICE
enumValues.description: Sort by cost price (deprecated)
enumValues.deprecationReason: Deprecated in favor of price.costPrices. Price query itself can't be sorted on price.cost. Input will be ignored.

types.name: PriceSortInput
types.description: Defines the sorting options for price queries.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description: The field to sort the prices by.

inputFields.name: order
inputFields.description: The direction to sort the results (ascending or descending).

types.name: PriceUpdateInput
types.description:
Price update data for modifying existing price records.

  Contains optional fields for updating price information including pricing values, discount types, tax codes, and display settings. Product ID cannot be changed after creation. All fields are optional for partial updates.

inputFields.name: per
inputFields.description:
Unit quantity for the listed price.

Defines how many units of the product are included in the listed price. For example, a value of 1 means the price is per single unit, while 12 might indicate the price is per dozen.

inputFields.name: list
inputFields.description:
Base selling price for the product.

This is the standard price used for pricing calculations before applying customer-specific discounts, volume pricing, or promotional offers. Serves as the foundation for all pricing logic.

inputFields.name: store
inputFields.description:
Physical store selling price.

The price at which the product is sold in brick-and-mortar stores. May differ from online prices due to store-specific costs, regional pricing strategies, or channel-specific promotions.

inputFields.name: suggested
inputFields.description:
Manufacturer's recommended retail price (RRP).

The price recommended by the manufacturer or supplier for retail sales. Used as a reference point for pricing decisions and can be displayed to customers as a comparison price.

inputFields.name: cost
inputFields.description:
Product acquisition cost for margin calculations.

The cost incurred to acquire or produce the product, used for profit margin analysis, pricing decisions, and financial reporting. Essential for maintaining profitable pricing strategies.

inputFields.name: bulkDiscountType
inputFields.description:
Volume discount calculation method.

Defines how bulk discounts are applied: as a percentage reduction from the base price or as a fixed discounted price per unit. Determines the calculation logic for volume pricing. One of: [costpriceplus, listpricemin, netprice]

inputFields.name: defaultTaxCode
inputFields.description:
Standard tax classification for the product.

The default tax code applied to this product for tax calculations. Can be overridden by zone-specific tax codes or customer-specific tax settings. One of: [H, L, N, M, CUST]

inputFields.name: display
inputFields.description:
Frontend price display configuration.

Controls how the price should be presented in user interfaces. Options include standard display, promotional formatting, or special pricing indicators. Default value is 'DEFAULT'.

types.name: Product
types.description:
Product entity representing items in the product catalog.

External entity from the product service that provides basic product identification and categorization. Used as a reference for product-specific attributes and relationships within the attribute system.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Resource primary identifier

fields.name: productId
fields.description:
Primary product identifier.

Unique numeric identifier used throughout the system for product references, ordering, and integration with external systems.

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Lists attributes for this product based on the search input.

fields.name: bundles
fields.description:
Bundles that contain this product.

List of all bundles where this product is included as an item, useful for cross-selling and bundle recommendations.

args.name: taxZone
args.description:
Tax zone for pricing calculations.

      Geographic tax zone code used to calculate accurate bundle pricing including applicable taxes. Must be exactly 2 characters representing a country code. Defaults to 'NL' if not specified.

fields.name: isBundleLeader
fields.description:
Indicates whether this product serves as a leader item in any bundle.

    Returns YesNo.Y if the product is designated as the leader item in at least one bundle, YesNo.N otherwise. Leader items typically drive bundle pricing and discount calculations.

fields.name: hasBundle
fields.description:
Indicates whether this product is included in any bundle.

    Returns YesNo.Y if the product is part of at least one bundle (either as a leader or regular item), YesNo.N otherwise. Useful for showing bundle availability indicators on product pages.

fields.name: category
fields.description:
Primary category of the product.

The main category that this product belongs to, providing hierarchical organization and navigation context.
Filtered by hidden status when specified in query parameters.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Filter by category visibility status.

Y = include only if category is hidden, N = include only if category is visible.
When omitted, includes category regardless of visibility status.

fields.name: categories
fields.description:
All categories the product belongs to.

Paginated response containing all categories associated with this product.
Includes categories with full category details and pagination support.

args.name: input
args.description:
Search and filter criteria for product categories.

Provides filtering, sorting, and pagination options for the product's associated categories.
When omitted, returns all categories with default pagination settings.

fields.name: categoryPath
fields.description:
Complete category path for the product.

Retrieves the full hierarchical path from the root category to the product's primary category.
Returns an ordered array of categories representing the breadcrumb navigation path.
Requires authentication for access.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Filter path categories by visibility status.

Y = include only hidden categories in path, N = include only visible categories in path.
When omitted, includes all categories in the path regardless of visibility status.

fields.name: crossupsellsFrom
fields.description:
Retrieve all cross-sell and upsell recommendations where this product is the source.

Returns recommendations that are triggered when customers view or interact with this product. These are the products that will be suggested to customers based on this product. Useful for understanding what products are being recommended from this specific product.

Possible errors:
- CROSSUPSELL_UNKNOWN_ERROR: Failed to search cross-sell/upsell recommendations
- CROSSUPSELL_CROSS_SERVICE_ERROR: Failed to communicate with external services

args.name: input
args.description:
Additional search criteria to filter the recommendations.

If not provided, returns all recommendations where this product is the source with default pagination settings. Can be used to further filter by recommendation type, target products, date ranges, or apply custom sorting.

fields.name: crossupsellsTo
fields.description:
Retrieve all cross-sell and upsell recommendations where this product is the target.

Returns recommendations where this product is being suggested to customers. These are the source products or clusters that trigger recommendations for this product. Useful for understanding what drives recommendations for this specific product and optimizing its visibility.

Possible errors:
- CROSSUPSELL_UNKNOWN_ERROR: Failed to search cross-sell/upsell recommendations
- CROSSUPSELL_CROSS_SERVICE_ERROR: Failed to communicate with external services

args.name: input
args.description:
Additional search criteria to filter the recommendations.

If not provided, returns all recommendations where this product is the target with default pagination settings. Can be used to further filter by recommendation type, source products, date ranges, or apply custom sorting.

fields.name: favoriteLists
fields.description:
Collection of favorite lists that contain this product.

Returns paginated results of all favorite lists where this product has been added.
Useful for understanding product popularity and usage patterns.

**Response Structure**:
- Paginated list of favorite lists containing this product
- Complete favorite list metadata
- Owner information (company, contact, or customer)
- Creation and modification timestamps

**Analytics Capabilities**:
- Product popularity tracking
- Usage pattern analysis
- Cross-list product relationships
- Owner preference insights

**Use Cases**:
- Product recommendation systems
- Popular item identification
- Cross-selling opportunities
- Inventory demand forecasting

fields.name: inventory
fields.description:
Product inventory information including stock levels and availability.

    Returns comprehensive inventory data for the product including stock balances across all locations, availability status, and inventory movement history. Used for stock management and availability calculations.

fields.name: mediaImages
fields.description: Product media images

args.name: search
args.description: Product media images search options

fields.name: mediaVideos
fields.description: Product media videos

args.name: search
args.description: Product media videos search options

fields.name: mediaDocuments
fields.description: Product media documents

args.name: search
args.description: Product media documents search options

fields.name: media
fields.description: Product media images

fields.name: orderlists
fields.description:
Order lists that include this product for bulk ordering operations.
    Returns a paginated collection of order lists where this product has been assigned.
    For POSITIVE order lists: Users/companies assigned to these lists can see and order this product.
    For NEGATIVE order lists: Users/companies assigned to these lists cannot see or order this product.
    Results can be filtered using the input parameter for more specific queries.

args.name: input
args.description:
Search and filtering criteria for order lists that include this product.

      Filters the results to show only order lists where this specific product has been assigned.
      For POSITIVE order lists: Users assigned to these lists can see and order this product.
      For NEGATIVE order lists: Users assigned to these lists cannot see or order this product.
      All standard search criteria can be applied in addition to the product-specific filtering.
      
      If not provided, returns all order lists that include this product with default pagination settings.
      
      Validation: All provided search criteria must be valid according to their respective field requirements.

fields.name: language
fields.description:
The requested language for this this resource, default to the 
          products default language.
          ISO 639-1 format.

fields.name: class
fields.description: The class of the request resource

fields.name: hidden
fields.description: The hidden status of this resource.

fields.name: names
fields.description:
Product names in multiple languages.

    Returns localized product names. Can be filtered by language code to get names for specific locales.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code to filter names.

      ISO 639-1 uppercase language code (e.g., 'EN', 'NL', 'DE'). If provided, returns only names for that language.

fields.name: descriptions
fields.description:
Product descriptions in multiple languages.

    Returns detailed product descriptions for different locales. Can be filtered by language code to get descriptions for specific languages.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code to filter descriptions.

      ISO 639-1 uppercase language code (e.g., 'EN', 'NL', 'DE'). If provided, returns only descriptions for that language.

fields.name: shortDescriptions
fields.description:
Product short descriptions in multiple languages.

    Returns brief product descriptions suitable for listings and summaries. Can be filtered by language code to get short descriptions for specific languages.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code to filter short descriptions.

      ISO 639-1 uppercase language code (e.g., 'EN', 'NL', 'DE'). If provided, returns only short descriptions for that language.

fields.name: slugs
fields.description:
URL-friendly product identifiers for each language.

    Returns SEO-optimized URL segments used in product page URLs. Can be filtered by language code to get slugs for specific locales.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code to filter slugs.

      ISO 639-1 uppercase language code (e.g., 'EN', 'NL', 'DE'). If provided, returns only slugs for that language.

fields.name: sku
fields.description:
Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management.

Unique alphanumeric code used for inventory tracking, order processing, and product identification across all systems and channels.

fields.name: defaultLanguage
fields.description: The default language for this product or cluster, this is the language to fall back too, when there is no translation available in a specific language.

fields.name: metadataTitles
fields.description: [SEO] Localized Metadata title available in multiple languages

fields.name: metadataDescriptions
fields.description: [SEO] Localized Metadata description available in multiple languages

fields.name: metadataKeywords
fields.description: [SEO] Localized Metadata keywords available in multiple languages

fields.name: metadataCanonicalUrls
fields.description: [SEO] Localized Metadata canonical url available in multiple languages

fields.name: shortNames
fields.description:
Localized abbreviated product names for different languages.

    Returns short product names in multiple languages. Can be filtered by language code to get short names for specific locales.

args.name: language
args.description:
Language code to filter short names.

      ISO 639-1 uppercase language code (e.g., 'EN', 'NL', 'DE'). If provided, returns only short names for that language.

fields.name: sources
fields.description:
Product data sources and external system references.

    Returns information about external systems and sources that provide data for this product, used for data lineage and integration management.

fields.name: shortName
fields.description:
Abbreviated product name.

Concise product identifier used where space is limited.

fields.name: keywords
fields.description:
Supplier-provided search keywords.

Additional search terms provided by the supplier to improve product discoverability and search engine optimization.

fields.name: customKeywords
fields.description:
Custom search keywords managed via PIM.

Additional search terms added through the Product Information Management system for enhanced search functionality.

fields.name: packageDescriptions
fields.description:
Localized packaging information.

Detailed packaging descriptions in multiple languages for customer information and marketing purposes.

fields.name: manufacturerCode
fields.description:
Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) code.

Manufacturer's own product code used for cross-referencing, warranty claims, and supplier communication.

fields.name: eanCode
fields.description:
European Article Number for global identification.

Standardized number used for product identification, inventory management, and point-of-sale systems.

fields.name: manufacturer
fields.description:
Product manufacturer information.

Company or brand that produces the product, used for brand filtering, warranty information, and supplier relationships.

fields.name: supplier
fields.description:
Primary supplier information.

Company or organization that supplies this product, used for procurement, inventory management, and supplier relationships.

fields.name: supplierCode
fields.description:
Supplier's product identification code.

Supplier-specific product code used for ordering, inventory management, and communication with suppliers.

fields.name: status
fields.description:
Current product lifecycle status.

Indicates the product's current state in its lifecycle, affecting availability and visibility.

fields.name: statusExtra
fields.description:
Additional status classification.

Supplementary status information often linked to custom value sets for specific business requirements and workflows.

fields.name: barCode
fields.description:
Product barcode for scanning and identification.

Machine-readable code used for inventory management, checkout processes, and automated product identification.

fields.name: turnoverGroup
fields.description:
Financial classification for reporting.

Groups products for financial reporting and analysis, used in accounting systems and business intelligence.

fields.name: taxonomy
fields.description:
Product classification hierarchy.

Standardized product categorization system used for organization, reporting, and integration with external systems.

fields.name: priceGroup
fields.description:
Pricing strategy classification.

Groups products with similar pricing rules and strategies, used by pricing engines for consistent pricing logic.

fields.name: orderable
fields.description:
Product availability for ordering.

Indicates whether customers can currently place orders for this product through the storefront and ordering systems.

fields.name: returnable
fields.description:
Product return policy eligibility.

Indicates whether this product can be returned by customers according to the return policy and business rules.

fields.name: physical
fields.description:
Product type classification for fulfillment.

Indicates whether this is a physical product requiring shipping or a digital product/service like downloads, warranties, or services.

fields.name: package
fields.description:
Product packaging type classification.

Describes how the product is packaged for sale (e.g., PIECE, BOX, BLISTER), affecting shipping, storage, and display.

fields.name: packageUnit
fields.description:
Individual item description within package.

Describes what constitutes one unit within the package (e.g., PIECE, BOX), used for inventory and ordering clarity.

fields.name: packageUnitQuantity
fields.description:
Quantity of individual items per package.

Number of individual units contained within one package, used for inventory calculations and customer information.

fields.name: minimumQuantity
fields.description:
Minimum order quantity for customers.

Smallest quantity customers can order, used to enforce business rules and ensure order profitability.

fields.name: unit
fields.description:
Base unit of measure for customer ordering.

Standard unit in which customers can order this product, used for pricing and quantity calculations.

fields.name: purchaseUnit
fields.description:
Unit of measure for supplier ordering.

Unit used when ordering from suppliers, which may differ from customer ordering units for bulk purchasing efficiency.

fields.name: purchaseMinimumQuantity
fields.description:
Minimum order quantity for supplier purchases.

Smallest quantity that can be ordered from suppliers, used for procurement planning and inventory management.

fields.name: economicOrderQuantity
fields.description:
Optimal order quantity for cost efficiency.

Quantity that provides the best balance of ordering costs and inventory holding costs, used for purchasing recommendations.

fields.name: orderableFrom
fields.description:
Start date for product ordering availability.

Date from which customers can begin placing orders for this product, used for product launches and seasonal availability.

fields.name: orderableTo
fields.description:
End date for product ordering availability.

Date after which customers can no longer place orders for this product, used for product discontinuation and seasonal restrictions.

fields.name: releaseDate
fields.description:
Product launch date for availability planning.

Date when the product was or will be officially released to the market, used for launch planning and availability scheduling.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Product record creation timestamp.

Date and time when this product was first added to the system, used for auditing and product lifecycle tracking.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Product record last modification timestamp.

Date and time when any product information was last updated, used for change tracking and synchronization.

fields.name: offers
fields.description: Available offers for this Product and Customer/Contact. First item in the array should be regarded as the active price

fields.name: containerClass
fields.description: The container class of this product.

fields.name: clusterId
fields.description: The cluster ID of the product's container

fields.name: cluster
fields.description:
Product cluster association for grouped products.

    Returns the cluster this product belongs to, if it's part of a product cluster. Clusters group related products with configurable options and variants.

args.name: hidden
args.description:
Include hidden clusters in results.

      Boolean flag to control whether hidden clusters should be included in the response. Defaults to excluding hidden clusters.

fields.name: surcharges
fields.description:
Retrieve all surcharges associated with this product.

    Returns a list of surcharges linked to the product with optional filtering capabilities. Used for determining additional fees applicable to the product during pricing calculations.

    Possible errors:
    - SURCHARGE_LIST_ERROR: Internal server error during surcharge retrieval
    - SURCHARGE_NOT_FOUND_ERROR: Product has no associated surcharges

args.name: input
args.description:
Optional search criteria for filtering surcharges.

      Allows filtering by type, tax codes, activation status, and other criteria. If not provided, returns all surcharges associated with the product.

types.name: ProductAttribute
types.description:
Product-specific attribute containing custom properties and metadata for individual products.

Extends the base product interface with attribute functionality. Used to store additional product information such as specifications, features, and custom properties that are not part of the standard product schema.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this attribute instance.

Auto-generated UUID that serves as the primary key for this specific attribute. Used to reference and manage individual attribute instances.

fields.name: value
fields.description:
The actual value data stored in this attribute.

Contains the attribute value in the appropriate format based on the attribute description's type definition. The value structure varies depending on the attribute type (text, enum, color, etc.).

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when this attribute was originally created.

Records the exact date and time when this attribute instance was first created in the system. Used for audit trails and data lifecycle management.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when this attribute was last modified.

Records the most recent date and time when any changes were made to this attribute's value or configuration. Updated automatically on each modification.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who created this attribute.

References the user account that originally created this attribute instance. May be 0 for system-generated attributes or when user information is not available.

fields.name: lastModifiedBy
fields.description:
Identifier of the user who last modified this attribute.

References the user account that made the most recent changes to this attribute. May be 0 for system modifications or when user information is not available.

fields.name: attributeDescription
fields.description:
Retrieve the attribute description that defines this product attribute's schema and behavior.

Returns the complete attribute description containing metadata, type definitions, display configuration, and localization settings. This description serves as the template that defines how this product attribute should behave and be presented.

Essential for understanding attribute constraints, available operations, and presentation requirements for product-specific attributes that extend product information.

fields.name: productId
fields.description:
Unique identifier of the product that owns this attribute.

References the specific product in the product catalog that this attribute value is associated with. Used to establish the relationship between attributes and their parent products for product-specific configuration and management.

types.name: ProductBulkMoveError
types.description:
Error information for a product that failed to move during bulk move operation.

Contains detailed error information including error codes, messages, and the affected product data.

fields.name: code
fields.description:
Error code indicating the type of error that occurred.

Can be VALIDATION, DB_INSERT, or UNKNOWN.

fields.name: messages
fields.description:
List of error messages describing what went wrong.

Provides detailed information about the failure to help with troubleshooting.

fields.name: record
fields.description:
The product record that failed to move.

Contains the original product data that was attempted to be moved, useful for identifying which product failed.

fields.name: rowNumber
fields.description:
Row number in the input array where the error occurred.

Helps identify the position of the failed product in the bulk move request.

types.name: ProductBulkMoveErrorCode
types.description: Error codes for product bulk move operations

types.name: ProductBulkMoveInput
types.description:
Input for bulk moving products to categories.

Contains an array of product-category pairs for moving multiple products to their respective categories in a single operation.

inputFields.name: products
inputFields.description:
List of product move operations.

Array of product-category pairs specifying which products should be moved to which categories. Each item contains a productId and categoryId.

types.name: ProductBulkMoveResponse
types.description:
Response for bulk product move operations.

Provides detailed feedback on the bulk move operation including the count of successfully moved products and any errors encountered during processing.

fields.name: movedCount
fields.description:
Number of products successfully moved to their target categories.

Represents the total count of products that were successfully relocated during the bulk move operation.

fields.name: errors
fields.description:
Collection of errors encountered during the bulk move operation.

Contains detailed error information for any products that failed to move, including error codes, messages, and the affected product data.

types.name: ProductCategorySearchInput
types.description:
Search criteria for product-associated categories.

Provides filtering and search options for categories associated with a specific product.
Inherits all CategorySearchInput functionality except categoryId filtering, since the product's categories are already determined.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Search categories by name.

Performs full text matching against category names in the specified or default language.
Case-sensitive search that matches the entire category name.

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Language code for localized search.

The language to use when searching categories by name or slug.
When omitted, the category's default language is used.
Must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code (2 characters).

inputFields.name: slug
inputFields.description:
Search categories by URL slugs.

Find categories by one or more SEO-friendly URL slugs.
Matches exact slug values in the specified or default language.

inputFields.name: parentCategoryId
inputFields.description:
Filter categories by parent relationships.

Find categories that belong to one or more parent categories.
Useful for retrieving subcategories of specific parent categories.

inputFields.name: hidden
inputFields.description:
Filter categories by visibility status.

Find categories by their hidden status.
Y = hidden categories, N = visible categories.
When omitted, returns both hidden and visible categories.

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Page number for pagination.

The page number to return in paginated results.
Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 1.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of categories per page.

The amount of categories to return per page.
Must be a positive integer. Defaults to 12.

inputFields.name: sortField
inputFields.description:
Field to sort categories by.

Available sortable fields: [name, dateCreated, entityDateChanged].
When omitted, results are returned in default order.

inputFields.name: sortOrder
inputFields.description:
Sort order for results.

Determines the sorting direction for the specified sort field.
ASC = ascending order, DESC = descending order.
Defaults to ascending order.

types.name: ProductClass
types.description: Available product classes

types.name: ProductContainerClass
types.description:
Classification of container types that can hold and organize products.

Defines the different organizational structures used to group and categorize products within the system for navigation, filtering, and product discovery.

enumValues.name: CATEGORY
enumValues.description:
Category-based product organization.

Products are organized within hierarchical categories that define their classification and enable category-based navigation and filtering.

enumValues.name: CLUSTER
enumValues.description:
Cluster-based product grouping.

Products are grouped into clusters that represent related product variants or configurations, allowing customers to choose from different options within a product family.

types.name: ProductCsvInput
types.description:
Input for importing products from a CSV file.

Contains the CSV file and field mapping configuration needed to process bulk product imports. Supports custom field mappings to handle different CSV formats and data structures.

inputFields.name: file
inputFields.description:
CSV file containing product data for import.

Must be a valid CSV file with product information. The file should contain headers that correspond to product fields, and each row should represent a single product to be imported.

inputFields.name: mappings
inputFields.description:
Field mapping configuration for CSV columns.

Optional list of mappings that define how CSV columns correspond to product properties. When provided, allows for custom field mapping to handle different CSV formats and column names. Each mapping must be unique.

types.name: ProductCsvMapping
types.description:
Mapping configuration for product CSV import fields.

Defines how CSV column headers correspond to product properties during bulk import operations. Each mapping connects a CSV column to a specific product field.

inputFields.name: csvHeader
inputFields.description:
Name of the column header in the CSV file.

Exact column header text from the CSV file that contains the data to be imported. Must match the header exactly as it appears in the first row of the CSV file. Cannot be empty.

inputFields.name: fieldName
inputFields.description:
Target product field for the CSV data.

Specifies which product property this CSV column should populate during import. Must be a valid product field that supports the data type and format provided in the CSV column.

types.name: ProductFieldName
types.description: Fields available for product CSV mapping.

enumValues.name: LANGUAGE
enumValues.description:
[Required][String] Primary language for product content.

ISO 639-1 uppercase language code that determines the default language for product names, descriptions, and other localized content.

enumValues.name: CATEGORY_ID
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Integer] Category identifier for product classification.

References the category where this product belongs in the product hierarchy, used for navigation, filtering, and organization.

enumValues.name: NAME
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Localized product names for different languages.

Collection of product names in various languages for international markets and multilingual storefronts.

enumValues.name: DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Detailed product descriptions in multiple languages.

Comprehensive product information including features, specifications, and benefits for each supported language.

enumValues.name: SHORT_DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Brief product summaries for listings and previews.

Concise product descriptions suitable for category pages, search results, and product cards where space is limited.

enumValues.name: KEYWORD
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Supplier-provided search keywords.

Additional search terms provided by the supplier to improve product discoverability and search engine optimization.

enumValues.name: CUSTOM_KEYWORD
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Custom search keywords managed via PIM.

Additional search terms added through the Product Information Management system for enhanced search functionality.

enumValues.name: SKU
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management.

Unique alphanumeric code used for inventory tracking, order processing, and product identification across all systems and channels.

enumValues.name: STATUS
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Enum] Current product lifecycle status.

Indicates the product's current state in its lifecycle, affecting availability and visibility., must be one of the following: [A, N, P, S, R, T]

enumValues.name: STATUS_EXTRA
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Additional status classification.

Supplementary status information often linked to custom value sets for specific business requirements and workflows.

enumValues.name: SUPPLIER
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Primary supplier information.

Company or organization that supplies this product, used for procurement, inventory management, and supplier relationships.

enumValues.name: SUPPLIER_CODE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Supplier's product identification code.

Supplier-specific product code used for ordering, inventory management, and communication with suppliers.

enumValues.name: BAR_CODE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Product barcode for scanning and identification.

Machine-readable code used for inventory management, checkout processes, and automated product identification.

enumValues.name: MANUFACTURER_CODE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) code.

Manufacturer's own product code used for cross-referencing, warranty claims, and supplier communication.

enumValues.name: EAN_CODE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] European Article Number for global identification.

Standardized number used for product identification, inventory management, and point-of-sale systems.

enumValues.name: UNIT
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Base unit of measure for customer ordering.

Standard unit in which customers can order this product, used for pricing and quantity calculations.

enumValues.name: MINIMUM_QUANTITY
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Integer] Minimum order quantity for customers.

Smallest quantity customers can order, used to enforce business rules and ensure order profitability.

enumValues.name: ECONOMIC_ORDER_QUANTITY
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Integer] Optimal order quantity for cost efficiency.

Quantity that provides the best balance of ordering costs and inventory holding costs, used for purchasing recommendations.

enumValues.name: MANUFACTURER
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Product manufacturer information.

Company or brand that produces the product, used for brand filtering, warranty information, and supplier relationships.

enumValues.name: PACKAGE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Product packaging type classification.

Describes how the product is packaged for sale (e.g., PIECE, BOX, BLISTER), affecting shipping, storage, and display.

enumValues.name: PACKAGE_UNIT
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Integer] Individual item description within package.

Describes what constitutes one unit within the package (e.g., PIECE, BOX), used for inventory and ordering clarity.

enumValues.name: PACKAGE_UNIT_QUANTITY
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Quantity of individual items per package.

Number of individual units contained within one package, used for inventory calculations and customer information.

enumValues.name: PURCHASE_UNIT
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Unit of measure for supplier ordering.

Unit used when ordering from suppliers, which may differ from customer ordering units for bulk purchasing efficiency.

enumValues.name: PURCHASE_MINIMUM_QUANTITY
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Integer] Minimum order quantity for supplier purchases.

Smallest quantity that can be ordered from suppliers, used for procurement planning and inventory management.

enumValues.name: ORDERABLE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Enum] Product availability for ordering.

Indicates whether customers can currently place orders for this product through the storefront and ordering systems., must be one of the following: [Y, N]. Default is Y

enumValues.name: ORDERABLE_FROM
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Start date for product ordering availability.

Date from which customers can begin placing orders for this product, used for product launches and seasonal availability., in ISO 8601 format 'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ' (e.g., 2024-10-31T09:55:00.000Z)

enumValues.name: ORDERABLE_TO
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] End date for product ordering availability.

Date after which customers can no longer place orders for this product, used for product discontinuation and seasonal restrictions., in ISO 8601 format 'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ' (e.g., 2024-10-31T09:55:00.000Z)

enumValues.name: RELEASE_DATE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Product launch date for availability planning.

Date when the product was or will be officially released to the market, used for launch planning and availability scheduling., in ISO 8601 format 'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssZ' (e.g., 2024-10-31T09:55:00.000Z)

enumValues.name: RETURNABLE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Enum] Product return policy eligibility.

Indicates whether this product can be returned by customers according to the return policy and business rules., must be one of the following: [Y, N]. Default is Y

enumValues.name: PHYSICAL
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Enum] Product type classification for fulfillment.

Indicates whether this is a physical product requiring shipping or a digital product/service like downloads, warranties, or services., must be one of the following: [Y, N]. Default is Y

enumValues.name: TURNOVER_GROUP
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Financial classification for reporting.

Groups products for financial reporting and analysis, used in accounting systems and business intelligence.

enumValues.name: PRICE_GROUP
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Pricing strategy classification.

Groups products with similar pricing rules and strategies, used by pricing engines for consistent pricing logic.

enumValues.name: TAXONOMY
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Product classification hierarchy.

Standardized product categorization system used for organization, reporting, and integration with external systems.

enumValues.name: SHORT_NAME
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Abbreviated product name.

Concise product identifier used where space is limited.. Deprecated: use SHORT_NAMES instead

enumValues.name: SHORT_NAMES
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Localized abbreviated product names for different languages.

Collection of short product names in various languages for international markets and multilingual storefronts, used where space is limited.

enumValues.name: PACKAGE_DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Localized packaging information.

Detailed packaging descriptions in multiple languages for customer information and marketing purposes.

enumValues.name: NOTE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Internal product notes and comments.

Internal documentation for product management, not visible to customers, used for operational information and reminders.

enumValues.name: CATEGORY_SOURCE_NAME
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Category data source identification.

Name of the system that provided the product's category information, used for category data management and synchronization., only required when using combination SOURCE_NAME and SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: CATEGORY_SOURCE_ID
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Category data source identifier.

Unique identifier for the system that provided the category data, used for category synchronization and data lineage., only required when using combination SOURCE_NAME and SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: PRODUCT_ID
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Primary product identifier.

Unique numeric identifier used throughout the system for product references, ordering, and integration with external systems.. Use either PRODUCT_ID or a combination of SOURCE_NAME and SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: SOURCE_NAME
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Product data source identification.

Name of the system or supplier that provided this product data, used for data lineage tracking and integration management.. Use either PRODUCT_ID or a combination of SOURCE_NAME and SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: SOURCE_ID
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Product data source identifier.

Unique identifier for the system or supplier that provided this product data, used for synchronization and data management.. Use either PRODUCT_ID or a combination of SOURCE_NAME and SOURCE_ID

enumValues.name: PRIORITY
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Integer] Product display and sorting priority.

Numerical value used to control product ordering in search results, category listings, and promotional displays.

enumValues.name: METADATA_TITLE
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] SEO-optimized page title for search engines.

Localized title tag content for product pages, optimized for search engine visibility and click-through rates.

enumValues.name: METADATA_DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] SEO meta description for search results.

Localized meta description content that appears in search engine results, designed to improve click-through rates.

enumValues.name: METADATA_KEYWORDS
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] SEO keywords for search optimization.

Localized keywords and phrases used for search engine optimization and improved product discoverability.

enumValues.name: METADATA_CANONICAL_URL
enumValues.description:
[Optional][String] Canonical URL for duplicate content management.

Localized canonical URL to prevent duplicate content issues and consolidate SEO value for product pages.

enumValues.name: HIDDEN
enumValues.description:
[Optional][Enum] Product visibility status for storefronts.

Controls whether the product is visible to customers in storefronts and search results, used for inventory management and product lifecycle control., must be one of the following: [Y, N. Defaults to N

fields.name: productId
fields.description:
Product identifier for this inventory summary.

    References the specific product that this inventory aggregation represents, linking to the product catalog.

fields.name: totalQuantity
fields.description:
Total non-reserved quantity available across all locations.

    Sum of all inventory quantities for this product across all warehouses and locations.

fields.name: totalReservedQuantity
fields.description:
Total quantity reserved across all locations.

    Sum of all reserved quantities for this product across all warehouses and locations.

fields.name: supplierQuantity
fields.description:
Non-reserved quantity available from external suppliers.

    Stock quantity that can be sourced from suppliers, including drop-ship inventory and supplier-managed stock.

fields.name: supplierReservedQuantity
fields.description:
Total quantity reserved from external suppliers.

    Sum of all reserved quantities for this product from external suppliers.

fields.name: localQuantity
fields.description:
Non-reserved quantity available in local warehouses.

    Stock quantity physically held in company-owned warehouses and storage facilities, immediately available for fulfillment.

fields.name: localReservedQuantity
fields.description:
Total quantity reserved in local warehouses.

    Sum of all reserved quantities for this product in company-owned warehouses and storage facilities.

fields.name: nextDeliveryDate
fields.description:
Earliest expected delivery date for replenishment.

    The soonest date when additional inventory is expected to arrive, used for stock planning and customer communication about future availability.

fields.name: balance
fields.description:
Detailed inventory records for this product.

    Complete list of individual inventory entries showing stock levels, locations, suppliers, and costs for comprehensive inventory management.

fields.name: messages
fields.description: [DEPRECATED]

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total count or summary value for the operation.

types.name: ProductMedia
types.description: Media content associated with a specific product

fields.name: images
fields.description:
Product-related images including photos, diagrams, and visual documentation.

    Contains all image media items associated with this product, such as product photos, technical diagrams, installation guides, and marketing materials.

args.name: search
args.description: Product media images search options

fields.name: videos
fields.description:
Product-related videos including demonstrations, tutorials, and promotional content.

    Contains all video media items associated with this product, such as product demonstrations, installation tutorials, promotional videos, and technical explanations.

args.name: search
args.description: Product media videos search options

fields.name: documents
fields.description:
Product-related documents including manuals, specifications, and technical documentation.

    Contains all document media items associated with this product, such as user manuals, technical specifications, installation guides, and compliance certificates.

args.name: search
args.description: Product media documents search options

types.name: ProductMoveItem
types.description:
Input for a single product move operation.

Contains the product identifier and the target category for moving a product to a different category.

inputFields.name: productId
inputFields.description:
Product identifier to move.

Unique numeric identifier of the product that should be moved to a different category.

inputFields.name: categoryId
inputFields.description:
Target category identifier.

ID of the category where the product should be moved to.

types.name: ProductOffer
types.description:
Product pricing offer with time-based validity.

Represents a specific pricing offer for a product with validity period and price calculation formula. Used for dynamic pricing, promotions, and time-sensitive offers in the catalog.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The id of the offer.

fields.name: price
fields.description: The calculated price for this offer.

types.name: ProductPrice
types.description:
Calculated product price with comprehensive pricing information and business rules applied.

  Contains the final calculated price for a product including base pricing, discounts, tax calculations, and all applicable business rules. Used for displaying prices to customers and processing orders.

fields.name: productId
fields.description:
Unique identifier of the product this price calculation applies to.

    Links the calculated price to a specific product in the catalog, enabling product-specific pricing and inventory management.

fields.name: type
fields.description:
Classification of the price element used in the calculation.

    Indicates the source and type of pricing applied, such as bulk pricing, pricesheet pricing, or default pricing. Used for price transparency and calculation auditing.

fields.name: discountType
fields.description:
Method used for discount calculation and application.

    Specifies how discounts were calculated and applied to the base price, enabling proper price display and calculation transparency.

fields.name: list
fields.description:
Base list price before discounts and calculations.

    The standard selling price used as the foundation for all pricing calculations. May be modified by discounts, volume pricing, or customer-specific rules.

fields.name: cost
fields.description:
Cost price for margin calculations and business analysis.

    The cost per unit for this product, used for margin analysis and pricing decisions. May vary based on quantity and supplier agreements.

fields.name: net
fields.description:
Net price after discounts but before tax calculations.

    The calculated price after applying all discounts and business rules but before adding taxes. Used for tax calculations and price display.

fields.name: gross
fields.description:
Final gross price including all calculations and applicable taxes.

    The final price that should be charged to the customer, including all discounts, business rules, and tax calculations. This is the price used for order processing.

fields.name: discount
fields.description:
Discount record applied to this price calculation.

    Contains details of any discount or bulk pricing rule that was applied during the price calculation. Used for price transparency and promotional tracking.

fields.name: taxCode
fields.description:
Tax classification code applied to this product price.

    Indicates the tax treatment and rate applied to this product based on its category and regional regulations. Used for tax calculations and compliance.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description:
Quantity of the product used for this price calculation.

    The number of units for which this price was calculated. Used for volume discounts, bulk pricing tiers, and total order calculations. Minimum value is 1.

types.name: ProductPriceFilterInput
types.description:
Price range filtering criteria for product searches.

Defines minimum and maximum price boundaries for filtering products by their pricing. Used to create price-based product filters and enable customers to find products within their budget range.

inputFields.name: from
inputFields.description:
Minimum price threshold for filtering.

Lower bound of the price range. Products with prices equal to or greater than this value will be included in the results.

inputFields.name: to
inputFields.description:
Maximum price threshold for filtering.

Upper bound of the price range. Products with prices equal to or less than this value will be included in the results.

types.name: ProductRangeFilterInput
types.description:
Range-based filtering criteria for numeric product attributes.

Enables filtering products by numeric ranges such as dimensions, weights, quantities, or custom numeric fields. Extends price filtering capabilities to support any numeric attribute with minimum and maximum value constraints.

inputFields.name: from
inputFields.description:
Minimum price threshold for filtering.

Lower bound of the price range. Products with prices equal to or greater than this value will be included in the results.

inputFields.name: to
inputFields.description:
Maximum price threshold for filtering.

Upper bound of the price range. Products with prices equal to or less than this value will be included in the results.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the attribute to filter by.

Either this field or 'name' must be provided to specify which numeric attribute to filter. Use this when you know the specific attribute ID.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Name of the attribute to filter by.

Either this field or 'id' must be provided to specify which numeric attribute to filter. Use this when referencing attributes by their display name.

inputFields.name: exclude
inputFields.description:
Exclude products within the specified range instead of including them.

When false (default), products within the min/max range are included in results.
When true, products within the min/max range are excluded from results.

inputFields.name: type
inputFields.description:
Data type of the numeric attribute being filtered.

Specifies whether the attribute contains decimal numbers, integers, or other numeric types to ensure proper range comparison and filtering behavior.

types.name: ProductSearchableField
types.description:
Product fields available for a search with configurable boost weights.

Defines which product fields can be searched using queries and allows for search relevance tuning by applying different boost weights to prioritize certain fields in search results.

enumValues.name: NAME
enumValues.description:
Product names in all languages.

Search across localized product names to find products by their display names in different languages.

enumValues.name: DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description:
Full product descriptions in all languages.

Search through detailed product descriptions including features, specifications, and comprehensive product information.

enumValues.name: SHORT_DESCRIPTION
enumValues.description:
Brief product summaries in all languages.

Search through concise product descriptions used in listings and product previews.

enumValues.name: KEYWORDS
enumValues.description:
Supplier-provided search keywords.

Search through additional keywords provided by suppliers to improve product discoverability.

enumValues.name: CUSTOM_KEYWORDS
enumValues.description:
Custom search keywords managed via PIM.

Search through manually curated keywords added through the Product Information Management system.

enumValues.name: SKU
enumValues.description:
Stock Keeping Unit codes.

Search by unique product SKU codes used for inventory management and product identification.

enumValues.name: MANUFACTURER
enumValues.description:
Product manufacturer names.

Search by the company or brand that produces the product.

enumValues.name: MANUFACTURER_CODE
enumValues.description:
Original Equipment Manufacturer codes.

Search by manufacturer-specific product codes used for cross-referencing and supplier communication.

enumValues.name: SUPPLIER
enumValues.description:
Primary supplier names.

Search by the company or organization that supplies the product.

enumValues.name: SUPPLIER_CODE
enumValues.description:
Supplier product identification codes.

Search by supplier-specific product codes used for ordering and inventory management.

enumValues.name: EAN_CODE
enumValues.description:
European Article Number codes.

Search by standardized EAN numbers used for global product identification.

enumValues.name: BAR_CODE
enumValues.description:
Product barcode identifiers.

Search by various barcode formats used for product scanning and identification.

enumValues.name: PRODUCT_ID
enumValues.description:
Numeric product identifiers.

Search by unique numeric product IDs used throughout the system.

enumValues.name: CLUSTER_ID
enumValues.description:
Numeric cluster identifiers.

Search by unique numeric cluster IDs for grouped product collections.

types.name: ProductSearchInput
types.description:
Advanced product search criteria with category and orderlist filtering.

  Extends base product search functionality with category-specific filtering, SKU-based searches, and orderlist-based product visibility controls. Supports hierarchical category navigation and customer-specific product access.

inputFields.name: term
inputFields.description:
General search term for product discovery.

    Searches across product names, descriptions, keywords, SKUs, and other searchable fields. Supports partial matching and relevance-based ranking.

inputFields.name: manufacturers
inputFields.description:
Filter by product manufacturers.

    Returns products from any of the specified manufacturers. Useful for brand-based filtering and manufacturer-specific product catalogs.

inputFields.name: supplierCodes
inputFields.description:
Filter by supplier product codes.

    Returns products matching any of the specified supplier codes. Used for supplier-specific product identification and cross-referencing.

inputFields.name: suppliers
inputFields.description:
Filter by product suppliers.

    Returns products from any of the specified suppliers. Useful for supplier-based filtering and procurement-focused searches.

inputFields.name: manufacturerCodes
inputFields.description:
Filter by manufacturer product codes.

    Returns products matching any of the specified manufacturer codes (OEM codes). Used for cross-referencing and manufacturer-specific identification.

inputFields.name: EANCodes
inputFields.description:
Filter by European Article Numbers (EAN).

    Returns products matching any of the specified EAN codes. Used for barcode-based product identification and inventory management.

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description:
Filter by specific product identifiers.

    Returns products whose IDs match the provided list. Useful for retrieving specific products or bulk operations.

inputFields.name: productIds
inputFields.description:
Filter by product identifiers.

    Returns products matching any of the specified product IDs. Alternative to 'ids' field for product identification.

inputFields.name: clusterIds
inputFields.description:
Filter by product cluster identifiers.

    Returns products belonging to any of the specified clusters. Used for finding configurable products and product groups.

inputFields.name: class
inputFields.description:
Filter by product classification.

    Returns products of the specified class type (e.g. product, cluster). Used for business logic and fulfillment routing.

inputFields.name: tags
inputFields.description:
Filter by product tags.

    Returns products that have any of the specified tags. Used for promotional grouping, seasonal filtering, and custom product categorization.

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Language for search processing.

    ISO 639-1 uppercase language code that determines which language-specific fields are used for searching. Does not affect the language of returned content (use language-specific resolvers for that).

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Page number for pagination.

    Specifies which page of results to return. Must be 1 or greater. Default is 1.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of items per page.

    Controls how many products are returned in each page. Default is 12, maximum is 500. Values over 500 will be capped to 500.

inputFields.name: textFilters
inputFields.description: List of text filters

inputFields.name: rangeFilters
inputFields.description: List of range filters

inputFields.name: price
inputFields.description: Product price filter

inputFields.name: statuses
inputFields.description: List of product status filters

inputFields.name: hidden
inputFields.description: Is product hidden?

inputFields.name: sortInputs
inputFields.description: List of product sort filters

inputFields.name: searchFields
inputFields.description: List of product search fields

inputFields.name: hasBundle
inputFields.description: Is product in a bundle

inputFields.name: isBundleLeader
inputFields.description: Is product a bundle leader

inputFields.name: containerSlugs
inputFields.description: Product container slug(s)

inputFields.name: containerPathSlugs
inputFields.description: Product path slug(s)

inputFields.name: userId
inputFields.description: Browse catalog as a specific User. Permissions, orderlists, favorite will be merged  with the logged in user.

inputFields.name: companyId
inputFields.description: Browse catalog as a specific Company. Permissions, orderlists, favorite will be merged  with the logged in user.

inputFields.name: createdAt
inputFields.description: Search by date created

inputFields.name: lastModifiedAt
inputFields.description: Search by date changed

inputFields.name: path
inputFields.description:
Category path for hierarchical navigation.

    Slash-separated category path (e.g., 'electronics/computers/laptops') used for category-based product filtering and navigation.

inputFields.name: categoryId
inputFields.description:
Category identifier for product filtering.

    Filters products to only those belonging to the specified category. Use with getDescendants to control whether subcategory products are included.

inputFields.name: skus
inputFields.description:
Filter by specific product SKUs.

    Returns only products whose SKUs match the provided list. Useful for retrieving specific products or bulk product operations.

inputFields.name: getDescendants
inputFields.description:
Include products from subcategories.

    When true, includes products from all descendant categories of the specified categoryId. When false, returns only products directly assigned to the specified category.

inputFields.name: applyOrderlists
inputFields.description:
Enable orderlist-based product filtering.

    When true, applies orderlist restrictions to determine product visibility based on customer permissions and access rights.

inputFields.name: orderlistIds
inputFields.description:
Specific orderlists to apply for product filtering.

    List of orderlist IDs to use for determining product visibility. If not specified, uses default orderlists based on customer context.

types.name: ProductSortField
types.description: Available fields for sorting product search results

enumValues.name: SKU
enumValues.description: Sort by product SKU alphabetically

enumValues.name: SUPPLIER_CODE
enumValues.description: Sort by supplier product code alphabetically

enumValues.name: CREATED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by the date when the product was created

enumValues.name: LAST_MODIFIED_AT
enumValues.description: Sort by the date when the product was last modified

enumValues.name: NAME
enumValues.description: Sort by product name alphabetically

enumValues.name: SHORT_NAME
enumValues.description: Sort by abbreviated product name alphabetically

enumValues.name: PRICE
enumValues.description: Sort by product price numerically

enumValues.name: RELEVANCE
enumValues.description: Sort by search relevance score (best matches first)

enumValues.name: CATEGORY_ORDER
enumValues.description: Sort by category-specific display order

enumValues.name: PRIORITY
enumValues.description: Sort by product priority value

types.name: ProductSortInput
types.description:
Sorting criteria for product search results.

Defines how product search results should be ordered by specifying a sortable field and the sort direction. Used to control the presentation order of products in search results and listings.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description:
Product field to sort by.

Specifies which product attribute should be used for sorting the search results. Available fields include name, price, creation date, and other sortable product properties.

inputFields.name: order
inputFields.description:
Sort direction for the specified field.

Determines whether results are sorted in ascending ('ASC') or descending ('DESC') order. When not specified, the default sort order for the field is used.

types.name: ProductsResponse
types.description:
Paginated response containing product search results with filtering and aggregation data.

Provides a comprehensive response for product queries including matching items, pagination metadata, price ranges, and available filters for building rich product discovery interfaces.

fields.name: items
fields.description:
Collection of products and clusters matching the search criteria.

Array of product and cluster entities that match the applied filters and search parameters, ordered according to the specified sorting criteria. Can contain both individual products and product clusters.

fields.name: itemsFound
fields.description:
Total number of products found across all pages.

Complete count of products that match the search criteria, regardless of pagination limits. Used for calculating total pages and displaying result counts to users.

fields.name: offset
fields.description:
Number of items displayed per page.

Maximum number of products returned in a single page of results. Used for pagination controls and determining page boundaries in user interfaces.

fields.name: page
fields.description:
Current page number in the result set.

One-based page number indicating which page of results is currently being displayed. Used for pagination navigation and result positioning.

fields.name: pages
fields.description:
Total number of pages available.

Calculated value representing the total number of pages needed to display all matching products based on the current page size. Used for pagination controls.

fields.name: start
fields.description:
Starting position of items on the current page.

One-based index of the first item displayed on the current page within the complete result set. Used for displaying result position information.

fields.name: end
fields.description:
Ending position of items on the current page.

One-based index of the last item displayed on the current page within the complete result set. Used for displaying result range information.

fields.name: minPrice
fields.description:
Lowest price found among all matching products.

Minimum price value across all products in the search results, used for price range filtering and displaying price bounds to customers.

fields.name: maxPrice
fields.description:
Highest price found among all matching products.

Maximum price value across all products in the search results, used for price range filtering and displaying price bounds to customers.

fields.name: filters
fields.description:
Available attribute filters for refining search results.

Collection of filterable attributes with their available values and counts, used for building faceted search interfaces and allowing customers to narrow down product results.

args.name: input
args.description:
Filter configuration for determining available attributes.

      Used to customize which attribute filters are returned based on the current search context and user preferences.

types.name: ProductStatus
types.description: Available product statuses

enumValues.name: A
enumValues.description: Available

enumValues.name: N
enumValues.description: Not available

enumValues.name: P
enumValues.description: Phase out

enumValues.name: S
enumValues.description: Presale

enumValues.name: R
enumValues.description: Restricted

enumValues.name: T
enumValues.description: Out of stock

types.name: ProductTextFilterInput
types.description:
Text-based filtering criteria for product attributes.

Enables filtering products by text-based attributes such as names, descriptions, or custom text fields. Supports both inclusion and exclusion filtering with multiple values.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the attribute to filter by.

Either this field or 'name' must be provided to specify which attribute to filter. Use this when you know the specific attribute ID.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Name of the attribute to filter by.

Either this field or 'id' must be provided to specify which attribute to filter. Use this when referencing attributes by their display name.

inputFields.name: values
inputFields.description:
Text values to filter by.

List of text values that products must match. Products matching any of these values will be included in results (unless 'exclude' is true).

inputFields.name: exclude
inputFields.description:
Exclude matching products instead of including them.

When false (default), products matching the filter values are included in results.
When true, products matching the filter values are excluded from results.

inputFields.name: type
inputFields.description:
Type of the attribute being filtered.

Specifies the data type of the attribute to ensure proper filtering behavior. Defaults to TEXT for standard text-based filtering.

types.name: PublishEmailEventResponse
types.description:
Response from email event publishing operations.

Indicates the success status of email event publication to the message queue and provides tracking information for monitoring and debugging email delivery workflows.

fields.name: success
fields.description:
Success status of the email event publication.

Indicates whether the email event was successfully published to the message queue for processing, enabling proper error handling and workflow management.

fields.name: messageId
fields.description:
Message queue identifier for tracking.
