types.name: UpdateOrderStatusInput
types.description: Input data for updating an existing order status with partial field updates

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Human-readable name for the order status.

    Used for display purposes in user interfaces and reports. Should be descriptive and meaningful for business users. Maximum length is 64 characters.

inputFields.name: code
inputFields.description:
Unique code identifier for the order status.

    Must be uppercase and contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores. Used for system integration and API references. Maximum length is 32 characters and must match pattern: ^[A-Z0-9_-]+$

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description:
Detailed description of the order status purpose and usage.

    Provides additional context about when and how this status should be used in the order workflow. Maximum length is 255 characters.

inputFields.name: orderType
inputFields.description:
Type of orders this status applies to.

    Determines which business processes can use this status: quotations for price quotes, orders for confirmed purchases, or requests for special inquiries.

inputFields.name: priority
inputFields.description:
Priority value for workflow ordering and sequence.

    Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Used to determine the order of statuses in workflow displays and processing sequences. Must be a non-negative integer.

inputFields.name: isDefault
inputFields.description:
Indicates whether this status is the default for new orders.

    When true, this status will be automatically assigned to new orders when no specific status is provided during creation. Only one status per order type should be marked as default.

inputFields.name: isPublic
inputFields.description: Controls visibility of orders with this status to external systems and users.

inputFields.name: isEditable
inputFields.description:
Determines whether orders with this status can be modified after creation.

    Orders with editable statuses allow updates to their properties, while non-editable statuses are locked to prevent accidental changes to critical workflow states.

inputFields.name: isDeletable
inputFields.description:
Controls whether orders with this status can be permanently removed from the system.

    Orders with deletable statuses can be removed when no longer needed, while non-deletable statuses are protected from deletion to maintain workflow integrity.

inputFields.name: isExportable
inputFields.description: Marks if the order is exportable

inputFields.name: isConfirmable
inputFields.description: Marks if the order is confirmable

inputFields.name: isArchivable
inputFields.description: Marks if the order can be archived

inputFields.name: nextStatusesIds
inputFields.description:
List of order status IDs that can follow this status in the workflow.

    Updates the possible workflow transitions from this status to other statuses. Each ID must represent a valid order status. Array must contain unique values.

inputFields.name: addOrderStatusToSet
inputFields.description:
The order status set to associate this status with.

    Updates the status set assignment for workflow organization. The status set must exist and be accessible.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Human-readable name for the order status set.

    Used for display purposes in user interfaces and workflow management. Should be descriptive and meaningful for business users organizing their order workflows. Maximum length is 64 characters.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description:
Detailed description of the order status set purpose and usage.

    Provides additional context about the workflow this set represents and when it should be used for order management. Maximum length is 255 characters.

inputFields.name: orderStatusIds
inputFields.description:
List of order status IDs to include in this set during creation.

    Allows immediate population of the status set with existing order statuses for complete workflow setup. Each ID must represent a valid order status in the system.

types.name: UpdatePaymentInput
types.description:
Payment update data containing fields to be modified.

Extends the payment creation input with all fields made optional for partial updates. The order ID cannot be changed after payment creation. Only provided fields will be updated, others remain unchanged.

inputFields.name: userId
inputFields.description:
Authenticated user identifier for payment attribution and history tracking.

Links the payment to a specific authenticated user for user-specific payment history and account management. Must be a positive integer when provided.

inputFields.name: anonymousId
inputFields.description:
Anonymous user session identifier for guest checkout payments.

References the guest user session for payments made without authentication. Used for guest checkout tracking and order management. Must be a positive integer when provided.

inputFields.name: paymentId
inputFields.description:
External payment identifier provided by the payment service provider for tracking.

Unique payment reference provided by the Payment Service Provider (PSP) for tracking and reconciliation. Used for payment status updates and transaction matching. Maximum length of 255 characters.

inputFields.name: amount
inputFields.description:
Payment amount in smallest currency unit (cents) for precise financial calculations.

The total amount to be paid expressed in the smallest denomination of the currency (e.g., cents for USD, pence for GBP). Must be a positive integer for precise financial calculations.

inputFields.name: currency
inputFields.description:
ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for international financial transactions.

Three-letter currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) following ISO 4217 standard. Used for currency conversion and financial reporting. Must be exactly 3 uppercase letters.

inputFields.name: method
inputFields.description:
Payment method code used by the payment service provider for transaction processing.

Specific payment method code used by the Payment Service Provider for processing this transaction (e.g., 'credit_card', 'paypal', 'bank_transfer'). Maximum length of 100 characters.

inputFields.name: status
inputFields.description:
Initial payment processing status for the new payment record.

Sets the starting status for the payment lifecycle. Determines the initial state and available actions for the payment processing workflow.

inputFields.name: addTransaction
inputFields.description:
Optional transaction to create alongside the payment for immediate processing.

When provided, creates an associated transaction record with the payment for immediate processing and tracking. Enables atomic creation of payment and initial transaction in a single operation.

types.name: UpdateProductInput
types.description:
Input for updating existing product information.

Contains optional fields for modifying product attributes, inventory settings, and metadata. Extends CreateProductInput with selective updates for partial product modifications while maintaining data integrity.

inputFields.name: categoryId
inputFields.description:
Category identifier for product classification.

References the category where this product belongs in the product hierarchy, used for navigation, filtering, and organization.

inputFields.name: names
inputFields.description:
Localized product names for different languages.

Collection of product names in various languages for international markets and multilingual storefronts.

inputFields.name: descriptions
inputFields.description:
Detailed product descriptions in multiple languages.

Comprehensive product information including features, specifications, and benefits for each supported language.

inputFields.name: shortDescriptions
inputFields.description:
Brief product summaries for listings and previews.

Concise product descriptions suitable for category pages, search results, and product cards where space is limited.

inputFields.name: keywords
inputFields.description:
Supplier-provided search keywords.

Additional search terms provided by the supplier to improve product discoverability and search engine optimization.

inputFields.name: customKeywords
inputFields.description:
Custom search keywords managed via PIM.

Additional search terms added through the Product Information Management system for enhanced search functionality.

inputFields.name: sku
inputFields.description:
Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management.

Unique alphanumeric code used for inventory tracking, order processing, and product identification across all systems and channels.

inputFields.name: status
inputFields.description:
Current product lifecycle status.

Indicates the product's current state in its lifecycle, affecting availability and visibility.

inputFields.name: statusExtra
inputFields.description:
Additional status classification.

Supplementary status information often linked to custom value sets for specific business requirements and workflows.

inputFields.name: supplier
inputFields.description:
Primary supplier information.

Company or organization that supplies this product, used for procurement, inventory management, and supplier relationships.

inputFields.name: supplierCode
inputFields.description:
Supplier's product identification code.

Supplier-specific product code used for ordering, inventory management, and communication with suppliers.

inputFields.name: barCode
inputFields.description:
Product barcode for scanning and identification.

Machine-readable code used for inventory management, checkout processes, and automated product identification.

inputFields.name: manufacturerCode
inputFields.description:
Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) code.

Manufacturer's own product code used for cross-referencing, warranty claims, and supplier communication.

inputFields.name: eanCode
inputFields.description:
European Article Number for global identification.

Standardized number used for product identification, inventory management, and point-of-sale systems.

inputFields.name: manufacturer
inputFields.description:
Product manufacturer information.

Company or brand that produces the product, used for brand filtering, warranty information, and supplier relationships.

inputFields.name: package
inputFields.description:
Product packaging type classification.

Describes how the product is packaged for sale (e.g., PIECE, BOX, BLISTER), affecting shipping, storage, and display.

inputFields.name: packageUnit
inputFields.description:
Individual item description within package.

Describes what constitutes one unit within the package (e.g., PIECE, BOX), used for inventory and ordering clarity.

inputFields.name: purchaseUnit
inputFields.description:
Unit of measure for supplier ordering.

Unit used when ordering from suppliers, which may differ from customer ordering units for bulk purchasing efficiency.

inputFields.name: purchaseMinimumQuantity
inputFields.description:
Minimum order quantity for supplier purchases.

Smallest quantity that can be ordered from suppliers, used for procurement planning and inventory management.

inputFields.name: orderableFrom
inputFields.description:
Start date for product ordering availability.

Date from which customers can begin placing orders for this product, used for product launches and seasonal availability.

inputFields.name: orderableTo
inputFields.description:
End date for product ordering availability.

Date after which customers can no longer place orders for this product, used for product discontinuation and seasonal restrictions.

inputFields.name: releaseDate
inputFields.description:
Product launch date for availability planning.

Date when the product was or will be officially released to the market, used for launch planning and availability scheduling.

inputFields.name: turnoverGroup
inputFields.description:
Financial classification for reporting.

Groups products for financial reporting and analysis, used in accounting systems and business intelligence.

inputFields.name: priceGroup
inputFields.description:
Pricing strategy classification.

Groups products with similar pricing rules and strategies, used by pricing engines for consistent pricing logic.

inputFields.name: taxonomy
inputFields.description:
Product classification hierarchy.

Standardized product categorization system used for organization, reporting, and integration with external systems.

inputFields.name: shortName
inputFields.description:
Abbreviated product name.

Concise product identifier used where space is limited.

inputFields.name: shortNames
inputFields.description:
Localized abbreviated product names for different languages.

Collection of short product names in various languages for international markets and multilingual storefronts, used where space is limited.

inputFields.name: packageDescriptions
inputFields.description:
Localized packaging information.

Detailed packaging descriptions in multiple languages for customer information and marketing purposes.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Internal product notes and comments.

Internal documentation for product management, not visible to customers, used for operational information and reminders.

inputFields.name: priority
inputFields.description:
Product display and sorting priority.

Numerical value used to control product ordering in search results, category listings, and promotional displays.

inputFields.name: metadataTitles
inputFields.description: [SEO] Metadata title in different languages.

inputFields.name: metadataDescriptions
inputFields.description: [SEO] Metadata description in different languages.

inputFields.name: metadataKeywords
inputFields.description: [SEO] Metadata keywords in different languages.

inputFields.name: metadataCanonicalUrls
inputFields.description: [SEO] Metadata canonical urls in different languages.

inputFields.name: unit
inputFields.description:
Base unit of measure for customer ordering.

Standard unit in which customers can order this product, used for pricing and quantity calculations.

inputFields.name: minimumQuantity
inputFields.description:
Minimum order quantity for customers.

Smallest quantity customers can order, used to enforce business rules and ensure order profitability.

inputFields.name: economicOrderQuantity
inputFields.description:
Optimal order quantity for cost efficiency.

Quantity that provides the best balance of ordering costs and inventory holding costs, used for purchasing recommendations.

inputFields.name: orderable
inputFields.description:
Product availability for ordering.

Indicates whether customers can currently place orders for this product through the storefront and ordering systems.

inputFields.name: returnable
inputFields.description:
Product return policy eligibility.

Indicates whether this product can be returned by customers according to the return policy and business rules.

inputFields.name: physical
inputFields.description:
Product type classification for fulfillment.

Indicates whether this is a physical product requiring shipping or a digital product/service like downloads, warranties, or services.

inputFields.name: packageUnitQuantity
inputFields.description:
Quantity of individual items per package.

Number of individual units contained within one package, used for inventory calculations and customer information.

inputFields.name: hidden
inputFields.description: Product hidden status

types.name: UpdateSurchargeInput
types.description:
Input data for updating an existing surcharge in the pricing system.

  Contains partial surcharge information for updates. Only provided fields will be modified, others remain unchanged. All validation constraints must be satisfied for successful updates.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Localized names for the surcharge in different languages.

    Must contain at least one language entry. Each entry requires a valid 2-character language code and corresponding name value. Used for display purposes across different locales.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description:
Detailed descriptions of the surcharge in different languages.

    Provides additional context about the surcharge purpose and application. Each entry requires a valid 2-character language code and corresponding description value. Used for detailed information display.

inputFields.name: type
inputFields.description:
Classification of surcharge calculation method.

    Determines how the surcharge value is applied to pricing calculations. Must be either flat fee for fixed amounts or percentage for proportional charges.

inputFields.name: value
inputFields.description:
Numeric value for surcharge calculation.

    For flat fees: amount in currency units. For percentages: percentage value (e.g., 15.5 for 15.5%). Must be a positive number.

inputFields.name: taxCode
inputFields.description: Tax code

inputFields.name: taxCodeValue
inputFields.description: Tax code value

inputFields.name: taxZone
inputFields.description:
Geographic tax zone identifier for regional tax calculations.

    Must be exactly 2 characters representing the tax jurisdiction. Used to determine applicable tax rates and compliance requirements.

inputFields.name: enabled
inputFields.description:
Activation status of the surcharge.

    When true, the surcharge is active and will be applied to pricing calculations. When false, it is disabled and will not affect pricing.

inputFields.name: validFrom
inputFields.description:
Start date and time for surcharge validity period.

    Surcharge will only be applied to orders after this timestamp. If not provided, surcharge is immediately active. Must be a valid ISO 8601 date string.

inputFields.name: validTo
inputFields.description:
End date and time for surcharge validity period.

    Surcharge will not be applied to orders after this timestamp. If not provided, surcharge remains active indefinitely. Must be a valid ISO 8601 date string.

inputFields.name: shopId
inputFields.description:
[DEPRECATED] Shop identifier for surcharge application scope.

    If not provided, the default shop will be inferred from the channel context. Must be a positive integer representing a valid shop identifier.

inputFields.name: firstName
inputFields.description: First name of the administrative user. Used for personalization and identification in administrative interfaces. Maximum length of 30 characters.

inputFields.name: middleName
inputFields.description: Middle name or initial of the administrative user. Optional field for complete name representation in formal communications. Maximum length of 20 characters.

inputFields.name: lastName
inputFields.description: Last name (surname) of the administrative user. Used for formal identification and sorting in administrative listings. Maximum length of 50 characters.

inputFields.name: gender
inputFields.description: Gender identity of the administrative user. Used for personalization and demographic reporting where applicable. Supports standard gender classifications with unknown as default for privacy.

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description: Preferred language for user interface and communications. Two-letter ISO 639-1 language code that determines the language for system notifications and interface elements. Maximum length of 2 characters.

inputFields.name: phone
inputFields.description: Contact phone number for the administrative user. Primary phone number for urgent communications and two-factor authentication. Should follow international format with country code. Maximum length of 30 characters.

inputFields.name: job
inputFields.description: Job title or role description of the administrative user. Professional title that helps identify the user's responsibilities and authority level within the organization. Maximum length of 30 characters.

types.name: UpdateWarehouseAddressInput
types.description:
Input for updating an existing warehouse address.

  Contains optional fields for modifying warehouse address properties. Only provided fields will be updated, others remain unchanged. The address ID is required to identify which address to update.

inputFields.name: firstName
inputFields.description:
First name of the primary contact person.

Given name of the main contact person for this warehouse address, used for deliveries and communication. Maximum 30 characters.

inputFields.name: middleName
inputFields.description:
Middle name of the primary contact person.

Middle name or initial of the main contact person for this warehouse address. Maximum 20 characters.

inputFields.name: lastName
inputFields.description:
Last name of the primary contact person.

Family name of the main contact person for this warehouse address, used for deliveries and official communication. Maximum 50 characters.

inputFields.name: gender
inputFields.description:
Gender of the primary contact person.

Gender designation for the main contact person, used for appropriate communication and addressing.

inputFields.name: company
inputFields.description:
Company name associated with the warehouse address.

Business name or organization associated with this warehouse location, used for official correspondence and shipping documentation. Maximum 100 characters.

inputFields.name: street
inputFields.description:
Street name and address line.

Primary street address including street name and any additional address line information for the warehouse location. Maximum 150 characters.

inputFields.name: number
inputFields.description:
Street number or building number.

Numeric or alphanumeric identifier for the specific building or location on the street. Length must be between 1 and 10 characters.

inputFields.name: numberExtension
inputFields.description:
Street number extension or unit identifier.

Additional identifier such as apartment number, suite, or unit designation. Maximum 15 characters.

inputFields.name: postalCode
inputFields.description:
Postal code for the warehouse location.

ZIP code, postal code, or equivalent regional identifier used for mail delivery and location identification. Maximum 10 characters.

inputFields.name: city
inputFields.description:
City name for the warehouse location.

    Name of the city where the warehouse is located, used for shipping, logistics planning, and location identification. Maximum 100 characters.

inputFields.name: region
inputFields.description:
State or region code for the warehouse location.

    Two-letter state, province, or region code where the warehouse is located. Used for regional logistics and tax calculations. Maximum 2 characters.

inputFields.name: country
inputFields.description:
Country code for the warehouse location.

    Two-letter ISO country code where the warehouse is located. Used for international shipping, customs, and regulatory compliance. Maximum 2 characters.

inputFields.name: phone
inputFields.description:
Primary phone number for the warehouse location.

    Fixed-line telephone number for warehouse contact and communication. Used for logistics coordination and customer inquiries. Length must be between 6 and 30 characters.

inputFields.name: fax
inputFields.description:
Fax number for the warehouse location.

    Fax number for document transmission and official communications. Used for shipping documents and formal correspondence. Length must be between 6 and 30 characters.

inputFields.name: mobile
inputFields.description:
Mobile phone number for the warehouse location.

    Mobile telephone number for urgent communications and on-the-go contact. Used for logistics coordination and emergency situations. Length must be between 6 and 30 characters.

inputFields.name: email
inputFields.description:
Email address for the warehouse location.

    Primary email contact for warehouse communications, shipping notifications, and operational correspondence. Must be a valid email format.

inputFields.name: code
inputFields.description:
Internal reference code for the warehouse address.

    Custom identifier or reference code used for internal tracking and organization of warehouse addresses. Maximum 64 characters.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Special delivery instructions and notes.

    Additional information for delivery personnel including access instructions, special handling requirements, or location-specific details. Maximum 255 characters.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Friendly display name for the warehouse address.

    Human-readable name used to identify this address in user interfaces and reports. Helps distinguish between multiple addresses for the same warehouse. Maximum 150 characters.

inputFields.name: url
inputFields.description:
Company website URL associated with the warehouse.

    Official website or domain URL for the company operating at this warehouse location. Must be a valid URL format. Maximum 150 characters.

inputFields.name: icp
inputFields.description:
Intra-Community Purchase (ICP) tax designation.

    Determines whether tax should be applied when this address is used as a delivery destination for business-to-business orders across borders. Used for international tax compliance.

inputFields.name: id
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier of the warehouse address to update.

    Primary key used to identify which specific address should be modified within the warehouse's address collection.

types.name: UpdateWarehouseInput
types.description:
Input for updating an existing warehouse.

  Contains optional fields for modifying warehouse properties. Only provided fields will be updated, others remain unchanged. Address updates must be performed separately through dedicated address mutation operations.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Unique name for the warehouse facility.

    Identifier used to distinguish this warehouse from others in the system. Cannot contain spaces and must be unique. Maximum 64 characters.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description:
Detailed description of the warehouse facility.

    Comprehensive description providing context about the warehouse's purpose, capabilities, or special characteristics. Maximum 255 characters.

inputFields.name: notes
inputFields.description:
Internal notes and operational information.

    Free-form text for storing internal notes, special instructions, or operational details about the warehouse. Not visible to external users. Maximum 255 characters.

inputFields.name: isActive
inputFields.description:
Operational status of the warehouse.

Indicates whether the warehouse is currently active and available for operations. Inactive warehouses are excluded from inventory allocation and order fulfillment.

inputFields.name: isStore
inputFields.description:
Store designation for customer-facing operations.

Indicates whether this warehouse also functions as a retail store location, enabling customer visits, in-store pickup, and retail operations.

inputFields.name: isPickupLocation
inputFields.description:
Customer pickup location availability.

Indicates whether customers can collect their orders from this warehouse location, enabling click-and-collect and pickup services.

inputFields.name: shopId
inputFields.description:
[DEPRECATED] Associated shop identifier for retail operations.

References the shop configuration when this warehouse serves as a retail location, linking warehouse operations to specific shop settings and branding.

inputFields.name: businessHours
inputFields.description:
Operating hours for each day of the week.

Defines when the warehouse is operational for receiving, processing, and shipping orders. Must include exactly 7 entries (one for each day of the week from Sunday=0 to Saturday=6). Used for scheduling operations and customer communication about availability.

types.name: Upload
types.description: The `Upload` scalar type represents a file upload.

types.name: UploadFileInput
types.description: Flexible file upload input supporting multiple upload methods and configurations

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Language code for the uploaded file content.

    Specifies the language context for the file, used for localization and content organization. Must be a valid 2-character language code (e.g., 'EN', 'DE', 'FR').

inputFields.name: uploadType
inputFields.description:
Method of file upload to use.

    Determines whether the file should be stored internally or referenced externally. Affects how the file is processed, stored, and accessed.

inputFields.name: cacheControl
inputFields.description:
HTTP cache control settings for the uploaded file.

    Controls how browsers and CDNs cache the file content. Optional configuration that defaults to optimal caching settings if not specified.

inputFields.name: base64File
inputFields.description:
Base64 encoded file upload option.

    Use this method when uploading files as base64 encoded strings. Suitable for small files or when direct file upload is not available. Maximum size is approximately 10MB.

    Set to null (with uploadType: BASE64) to delete this language.

inputFields.name: file
inputFields.description:
Direct file upload from filesystem.

    Use this method for uploading files directly from the client's filesystem using GraphQL multipart request specification. Most efficient for larger files.

    Set to null (with uploadType: UPLOAD) to delete this language.

inputFields.name: urlFile
inputFields.description:
Upload file from a publicly accessible URL.

    Use this method to upload files by providing a URL. The system will download the file from the specified location and store it locally.

    Set to null (with uploadType: DOWNLOAD_EXTERNAL) to delete this language.

types.name: UploadType
types.description: Upload type

enumValues.name: BASE64
enumValues.description: Upload by providing base64 string representation of a file

enumValues.name: FILE
enumValues.description: Upload by referencing a file

enumValues.name: URL
enumValues.description: Upload by providing public url to the file

types.name: UploadVideoInput
types.description: Video upload specification with language and location information

inputFields.name: language
inputFields.description:
Language code for the video content.

    Specifies the language context for the video, used for localization and content organization. Must be a valid 2-character language code (e.g., 'EN', 'DE', 'FR').

inputFields.name: uri
inputFields.description:
URL or URI pointing to the video content.

    Can be a direct link to a video file, or a URL from supported video platforms like YouTube or Vimeo. The URL must be publicly accessible and return valid video content.

    Set to null to remove the video for this language.

types.name: UpsertSparePartsMachineInput
types.description:
Input for creating or updating a spare parts machine.

Extends the creation input with additional options for update operations. Supports both creating new machines and modifying existing ones with enhanced default value handling.

inputFields.name: externalReference
inputFields.description:
External system reference for the machine.

Links this machine to its counterpart in external systems for data synchronization and cross-platform integration.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Localized names for the machine.

Collection of translated machine names in multiple languages. Each entry must have unique language codes within the array.

inputFields.name: description
inputFields.description:
Detailed descriptions of the machine.

Comprehensive information about the machine's purpose, specifications, and usage in multiple languages. Each entry must have unique language codes within the array. Defaults to empty array if not provided.

inputFields.name: machines
inputFields.description:
Child machines nested within this machine.

Hierarchical collection of sub-machines that belong to this parent machine, enabling complex equipment structures and organizational relationships. Each entry must be unique within the array. Defaults to empty array if not provided.

inputFields.name: parts
inputFields.description:
Spare parts associated with this machine.

Collection of replacement components and parts that are compatible with or required for this machine's operation and maintenance. Each entry must be unique within the array.

inputFields.name: slug
inputFields.description:
URL-friendly identifiers for the machine.

Human-readable URL segments used for SEO-friendly navigation and localized machine pages. Must be unique per language and globally unique within the system. Each entry must have unique language codes within the array.

types.name: UrlFileUploadInput
types.description: Upload media content by providing a publicly accessible URL

inputFields.name: url
inputFields.description:
Publicly accessible URL to the media file.

    The URL must be accessible without authentication and return the actual file content. The service will download and store the file from this location.

inputFields.name: fileName
inputFields.description:
Filename to use when storing the downloaded file.

    Must include the file extension and be between 5-255 characters. This name will be used for storage and may affect how the file is processed.

types.name: UserClaims
types.description:
User authorization claims and permissions data.

  Contains comprehensive user identity, permissions, and access control information used for authorization decisions across the system.

fields.name: userId
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the user within the system.

    Primary user ID used to associate the user with their data and track their activities across all system operations.

fields.name: userDirectoryId
fields.description:
Directory identifier for the user's organizational context.

    Links the user to their organizational directory, determining their access to directory-specific resources and permissions.

fields.name: adminUserId
fields.description:
Administrative user identifier for elevated permissions.

    When present, indicates the user has administrative privileges and links to their admin user profile.

fields.name: contactId
fields.description:
Contact identifier when the user represents a contact entity.

    Links the user to a specific contact record, enabling contact-specific operations and data access.

fields.name: customerId
fields.description:
Customer identifier when the user represents a customer entity.

    Links the user to a specific customer record, enabling customer-specific operations and data access.

fields.name: companyId
fields.description:
Primary company identifier for the user's main organizational affiliation.

    Represents the user's default company context used when no specific company is provided in operations.

fields.name: companyIds
fields.description:
Complete list of company identifiers the user has access to.

    Enables multi-company operations and determines which company data the user can access and modify.

fields.name: roles
fields.description:
User's assigned roles for permission-based access control.

    Determines what operations the user can perform and what resources they can access within the system.

fields.name: discounts
fields.description:
Available discount codes and pricing rules for the user.

    Contains discount identifiers that can be applied to transactions and pricing calculations for this user.

fields.name: acllist
fields.description:
Access control list defining specific resource permissions.

    Contains identifiers for resources and operations the user has explicit access to, providing fine-grained permission control.

fields.name: class
fields.description:
User classification type for permission and access control.

    Determines the user's category within the system which affects their available permissions and accessible resources.

fields.name: loginRoot
fields.description:
Root login identifier for hierarchical user relationships.

    Links to a parent or root user account, used for managing user hierarchies and delegated access permissions.

fields.name: dateCreated
fields.description:
Timestamp when the user claims were created.

    Indicates when these authorization claims were first established, used for auditing and claim lifecycle management.

fields.name: valuesetItems
fields.description:
Retrieve items belonging to this value set with filtering and pagination.

    Returns all items associated with the value set including their values, localized descriptions, and additional metadata. Used for populating dropdown lists, validation options, and configuration interfaces.

    This field resolver automatically filters items to only those belonging to the current value set, providing a convenient way to access related data in GraphQL queries.

    Use this field to:
    ΓÇó Populate dropdown lists with value set options
    ΓÇó Display all available choices for configuration
    ΓÇó Implement search and filtering within value set items
    ΓÇó Access localized labels for internationalization

    Possible errors:
    - VALUESET_ITEM_LIST_ERROR: Failed to retrieve value set items due to system error

args.name: input
args.description:
Search criteria and pagination parameters for filtering value set items.

      All search parameters are optional. When provided, they filter the items within this specific value set. Pagination controls help manage large item collections efficiently.

      The valuesetIds parameter is automatically set to the current value set, so it should not be provided in the input.

inputFields.name: name
inputFields.description:
Unique identifier name for the new value set that will be used throughout the system for referencing and configuration purposes.

Must be unique across all value sets and follow naming conventions for system identifiers.

inputFields.name: descriptions
inputFields.description:
Human-readable descriptions explaining the purpose and usage of this value set in multiple languages.

Provides context for administrators and developers about what this value set represents and how it should be used throughout the system.

inputFields.name: type
inputFields.description:
Classification determining the management scope and modification permissions for this value set.

SYSTEM types are reserved for core system functionality and can only be created by automated processes. CUSTOM types can be created and modified by authorized users for business-specific needs.

inputFields.name: valuesetItems
inputFields.description: Initial set of items to populate this value set with. Each item must have a unique value within the value set and can include localized descriptions for internationalization.

inputFields.name: value
inputFields.description:
The actual data value that this item will represent in the system.

Must be unique within the parent value set and will be used as the key for selection and processing. Length must be between 1 and 512 characters.

inputFields.name: descriptions
inputFields.description:
Human-readable labels for this value set item in multiple languages.

These descriptions will be displayed to users in dropdown lists, selection interfaces, and other UI components. Providing multiple languages ensures proper internationalization support.

inputFields.name: extra
inputFields.description:
Additional metadata or supplementary information for this value set item.

Can be used to store related data such as currency codes, country codes, or other contextual information that enhances the item's functionality. Maximum length is 512 characters.

fields.name: id

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description: Page number for pagination, starting from 1. Used to navigate through multiple pages of results when the total number of items exceeds the offset limit. Must be a positive integer (minimum: 1).

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description: Number of value set items to return per page. Controls the size of each page in the paginated response to manage data volume and performance. Must be between 1 and 100 items per page.

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description: Filter by specific value set item identifiers. Provide an array of numeric IDs to retrieve only those specific items, useful for bulk operations or targeted queries.

inputFields.name: valuesetIds
inputFields.description: Filter items by their parent value set identifiers. Provide an array of value set IDs to retrieve items from specific value sets only, essential for dropdown population.

inputFields.name: values
inputFields.description: Filter items by their actual data values. Provide an array of value strings to find items with matching values, helpful for searching specific options in dropdown lists.

inputFields.name: extras
inputFields.description: Filter items by their extra metadata values. Provide an array of extra value strings to find items with matching additional data like codes or categories.

inputFields.name: sortInputs
inputFields.description: Sorting criteria for organizing search results. Supports multiple sort fields with different orders to achieve complex result organization for dropdown displays.

inputFields.description: Sort order direction. Use ASC for ascending order (A-Z, 1-9) or DESC for descending order (Z-A, 9-1) to match user interface expectations.

types.name: VerifyToken
types.description:
Decoded JWT token information after successful verification.

  Contains all the claims and metadata from a verified authentication token, providing user identity, permissions, and token validity information.

fields.name: uid
fields.description:
Unique user identifier from the authentication system.

    Firebase UID that uniquely identifies the user account across all authentication operations.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
User's display name from their profile.

    The name associated with the user account, used for display purposes in user interfaces.

fields.name: claims
fields.description:
Custom claims and permissions embedded in the token.

    Contains user-specific authorization data, roles, and permissions that determine what operations the user can perform.

fields.name: iss
fields.description:
Token issuer identifier.

    Identifies the authentication service that issued this token, used for token validation and trust verification.

fields.name: aud
fields.description:
Token audience identifier.

    Specifies the intended recipient or service for this token, ensuring tokens are used only by authorized applications.

fields.name: auth_time
fields.description:
Authentication timestamp in Unix epoch seconds.

    The time when the user was originally authenticated, used for session management and security policies.

fields.name: user_id
fields.description:
User identifier from the token subject.

    The user ID embedded in the token's subject claim, typically matching the uid field.

fields.name: sub
fields.description:
Token subject identifier.

    Standard JWT subject claim that identifies the principal (user) that the token represents.

fields.name: iat
fields.description:
Token issuance timestamp in Unix epoch seconds.

    The time when this token was created and issued by the authentication service.

fields.name: exp
fields.description:
Token expiration timestamp in Unix epoch seconds.

    The time when this token expires and will no longer be accepted for authentication.

fields.name: email
fields.description:
User's email address from the token.

    The email address associated with the authenticated user account.

fields.name: email_verified
fields.description:
Email verification status.

    Indicates whether the user's email address has been verified through the email verification process.

fields.name: firebase
fields.description:
Firebase-specific token information and metadata.

    Contains additional Firebase authentication data and provider-specific information.

types.name: VerifyTokenInput
types.description:
Parameters for token verification and validation.

  Contains the authentication token that needs to be verified for validity, expiration, and signature integrity.

inputFields.name: token
inputFields.description:
JWT authentication token to verify.

    The token will be validated for signature integrity, expiration time, and issuer authenticity. Must be a properly formatted JWT token.

types.name: Warehouse
types.description:
Warehouse facility for inventory storage and logistics operations.

  Represents a physical or virtual warehouse location used for storing inventory, processing orders, and managing logistics operations. Includes operational settings, business hours, and address information.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the warehouse.

    Primary key used to reference this warehouse throughout the system and for all warehouse-related operations.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Warehouse name for identification and display.

    Human-readable name used to identify the warehouse in user interfaces, reports, and operational documents. Maximum 255 characters.

fields.name: description
fields.description:
Detailed description of the warehouse facility.

    Comprehensive description providing additional context about the warehouse's purpose, capabilities, or special characteristics. Maximum 255 characters.

fields.name: notes
fields.description:
Internal notes and operational information.

    Free-form text for storing internal notes, special instructions, or operational details about the warehouse. Not visible to external users. Maximum 255 characters.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description:
Operational status of the warehouse.

    Indicates whether the warehouse is currently active and available for operations. Inactive warehouses are excluded from inventory allocation and order fulfillment.

fields.name: isStore
fields.description:
Store designation for customer-facing operations.

    Indicates whether this warehouse also functions as a retail store location, enabling customer visits, in-store pickup, and retail operations.

fields.name: isPickupLocation
fields.description:
Customer pickup location availability.

    Indicates whether customers can collect their orders from this warehouse location, enabling click-and-collect and pickup services.

fields.name: shopId
fields.description:
[DEPRECATED] Associated shop identifier for retail operations.

    References the shop configuration when this warehouse serves as a retail location, linking warehouse operations to specific shop settings and branding.
fields.deprecationReason: Shop is deprecated and will be removed in a future version

fields.name: addressId
fields.description:
Primary address identifier for the warehouse.

    References the main address record containing location details, contact information, and shipping address for this warehouse facility.

fields.name: businessHours
fields.description:
Operating hours for each day of the week.

    Defines when the warehouse is operational for receiving, processing, and shipping orders. Used for scheduling operations and customer communication about availability.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Warehouse creation timestamp.

    Date and time when this warehouse was initially created in the system, used for auditing and operational history tracking.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Last modification timestamp.

    Date and time when any warehouse information was last updated, used for change tracking and synchronization purposes.

fields.name: address
fields.description:
Complete address information for the warehouse.

    Detailed address record including street address, city, postal code, country, and contact information for the warehouse facility.

types.name: WarehouseAddress
types.description:
Address information for warehouse locations.

  Contains comprehensive address and contact details for warehouse facilities including physical location, contact information, and operational settings for shipping and logistics operations.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the warehouse address.

    Primary key used to reference this address record throughout the system and for address-related operations.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Address creation timestamp.

    Date and time when this address was initially created in the system, used for auditing and record tracking.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Last modification timestamp.

    Date and time when any address information was last updated, used for change tracking and data synchronization.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description:
First name of the primary contact person.

    Given name of the main contact person for this warehouse address, used for deliveries and communication. Maximum 30 characters.

fields.name: middleName
fields.description:
Middle name of the primary contact person.

    Middle name or initial of the main contact person for this warehouse address. Maximum 20 characters.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description:
Last name of the primary contact person.

    Family name of the main contact person for this warehouse address, used for deliveries and official communication. Maximum 50 characters.

fields.name: gender
fields.description:
Gender of the primary contact person.

    Gender designation for the main contact person, used for appropriate communication and addressing. Defaults to unspecified.

fields.name: company
fields.description:
Company name associated with the warehouse address.

    Business name or organization associated with this warehouse location, used for official correspondence and shipping documentation. Maximum 100 characters.

fields.name: street
fields.description:
Street name and address line.

    Primary street address including street name and any additional address line information for the warehouse location. Maximum 150 characters.

fields.name: number
fields.description:
Street number or building number.

    Numeric or alphanumeric identifier for the specific building or location on the street. Maximum 10 characters.

fields.name: numberExtension
fields.description:
Street number extension or unit identifier.

    Additional identifier such as apartment number, suite, or unit designation. Maximum 15 characters.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.description:
Postal code for the warehouse location.

    ZIP code, postal code, or equivalent regional identifier used for mail delivery and location identification. Maximum 10 characters.

fields.name: city
fields.description:
City or municipality name.

    Name of the city, town, or municipality where the warehouse is located, used for addressing and regional identification. Maximum 100 characters.

fields.name: region
fields.description:
State, province, or regional identifier.

    Two-character code for the state, province, or regional subdivision where the warehouse is located. Maximum 2 characters.

fields.name: country
fields.description:
Country code for the warehouse location.

    Two-character ISO country code identifying the country where the warehouse is located, used for international shipping and tax calculations. Maximum 2 characters.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: Fixed phone number that applies to this address [min: 6, max: 30]

fields.name: mobile
fields.description: Mobile phone number that applies to this address [min: 6, max: 30]

fields.name: email
fields.description: Email that applies to this address [valid email format needed]

fields.name: fax
fields.description: Fax number that applies to this address [min: 6, max: 30]

fields.name: code
fields.description: Address code

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Address delivery notes

fields.name: icp
fields.description: ICP address field defines whether tax should be applied to an order if the address is selected as a delivery address. Used when shipping b2b order abroad

fields.name: url
fields.description: Address company domain url

fields.name: name
fields.description: Address friendly descriptive name

inputFields.description: Field to sort by

inputFields.name: order
inputFields.description: Order option to sort by. [Default to `ASC`]

fields.description: List of items of type Warehouse

fields.description: Total number of items found

fields.description: The amount of items to show per page

fields.description: The current page

fields.description: Total amount of pages

fields.name: start
fields.description: Start position of the current page

fields.name: end
fields.description: End position of the current page

inputFields.name: ids
inputFields.description:
Filter warehouses by specific identifiers.

List of warehouse IDs to retrieve. When provided, only warehouses with matching IDs will be returned.

inputFields.name: isActive
inputFields.description:
Filter by operational status.

When true, returns only active warehouses available for operations. When false, returns only inactive warehouses.

inputFields.name: isStore
inputFields.description:
Filter by store designation.

When true, returns only warehouses that also function as retail stores. When false, returns only non-retail warehouses.

inputFields.name: isPickupLocation
inputFields.description:
Filter by pickup location availability.

When true, returns only warehouses where customers can collect orders. When false, returns only warehouses without pickup services.

inputFields.name: page
inputFields.description:
Page number for pagination, starting from 1.

Used to navigate through multiple pages of results when the total number of warehouses exceeds the offset limit.

inputFields.name: offset
inputFields.description:
Number of warehouses to return per page.

Controls the size of each page in the paginated response to manage data volume and performance. Minimum value is 1.

inputFields.name: sortInputs
inputFields.description: Inputs to sort by

types.name: YesNo
types.description: Boolean in Yes/No format

enumValues.name: Y
enumValues.description: Affirmative response indicating true, enabled, or positive state

enumValues.name: N
enumValues.description: Negative response indicating false, disabled, or negative state

types.name: ZoneTaxCode
types.description:
Zone-specific tax code configuration for geographic tax compliance.

  Represents tax code overrides for specific geographic zones, enabling location-based tax calculations and compliance with regional tax regulations. Used for international commerce and multi-jurisdictional tax management.

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for the zone tax code record.

    Primary key used for zone tax code management and geographic tax rule operations.

fields.name: priceId
fields.description:
Reference to the associated price record.

    Foreign key linking this zone tax code to its base price for geographic tax calculations.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when the zone tax code record was initially created.

    Used for audit trails and tax compliance tracking.

fields.name: lastModifiedAt
fields.description:
Timestamp when the zone tax code record was last updated.

    Essential for tracking tax rule changes and compliance updates.

fields.name: zone
fields.description:
Geographic zone identifier for tax calculations.

Defines the specific geographic region or tax jurisdiction where special tax rules apply. Used to determine location-specific tax rates and regulations.

fields.name: taxCode
fields.description:
Tax code applicable to the specified zone.

The specific tax classification that applies within the geographic zone. Overrides default tax codes when products are sold in regions with special tax requirements.

inputFields.description: Price id

types.name: ZoneTaxCodeSortField
types.description:
Available fields for sorting zone tax code search results.

  Defines the sortable fields for zone-specific tax code configurations, enabling organized retrieval of geographic tax rule data for compliance and reporting purposes.

enumValues.name: ID
enumValues.description:
Sort by zone tax code record identifier.

      Orders results by the unique identifier of each zone tax code record for consistent data organization and reference.

enumValues.name: TAX_CODE
enumValues.description:
Sort by tax classification code alphabetically.

      Orders results by the tax code value, useful for grouping similar tax treatments and regulatory compliance organization.

enumValues.name: ZONE
enumValues.description:
Sort by geographic zone code alphabetically.

      Orders results by the geographic zone identifier, enabling location-based organization and regional tax rule management.

enumValues.name: LAST_MODIFIED_AT
enumValues.description:
Sort by last modification timestamp.

      Orders results by when each zone tax code was last updated, useful for tracking recent changes and data synchronization.

enumValues.name: CREATED_AT
enumValues.description:
Sort by creation timestamp.

      Orders results by when each zone tax code was initially created, useful for historical tracking and audit trails.

types.name: __Schema
types.description: A GraphQL Schema defines the capabilities of a GraphQL server. It exposes all available types and directives on the server, as well as the entry points for query, mutation, and subscription operations.

fields.name: types
fields.description: A list of all types supported by this server.

fields.name: queryType
fields.description: The type that query operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: mutationType
fields.description: If this server supports mutation, the type that mutation operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: subscriptionType
fields.description: If this server support subscription, the type that subscription operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: directives
fields.description: A list of all directives supported by this server.

types.name: __Type
types.description:
The fundamental unit of any GraphQL Schema is the type. There are many kinds of types in GraphQL as represented by the `__TypeKind` enum.

Depending on the kind of a type, certain fields describe information about that type. Scalar types provide no information beyond a name, description and optional `specifiedByURL`, while Enum types provide their values. Object and Interface types provide the fields they describe. Abstract types, Union and Interface, provide the Object types possible at runtime. List and NonNull types compose other types.

types.name: __TypeKind
types.description: An enum describing what kind of type a given `__Type` is.

enumValues.name: SCALAR
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a scalar.

enumValues.name: OBJECT
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an object. `fields` and `interfaces` are valid fields.

enumValues.name: INTERFACE
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an interface. `fields`, `interfaces`, and `possibleTypes` are valid fields.

enumValues.name: UNION
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a union. `possibleTypes` is a valid field.

enumValues.name: ENUM
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an enum. `enumValues` is a valid field.

enumValues.name: INPUT_OBJECT
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an input object. `inputFields` is a valid field.

enumValues.name: LIST
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a list. `ofType` is a valid field.

enumValues.name: NON_NULL
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a non-null. `ofType` is a valid field.

types.name: __Field
types.description: Object and Interface types are described by a list of Fields, each of which has a name, potentially a list of arguments, and a return type.

types.name: __InputValue
types.description: Arguments provided to Fields or Directives and the input fields of an InputObject are represented as Input Values which describe their type and optionally a default value.

fields.name: defaultValue
fields.description: A GraphQL-formatted string representing the default value for this input value.

types.name: __EnumValue
types.description: One possible value for a given Enum. Enum values are unique values, not a placeholder for a string or numeric value. However an Enum value is returned in a JSON response as a string.

types.name: __Directive
types.description:
A Directive provides a way to describe alternate runtime execution and type validation behavior in a GraphQL document.

In some cases, you need to provide options to alter GraphQL's execution behavior in ways field arguments will not suffice, such as conditionally including or skipping a field. Directives provide this by describing additional information to the executor.

types.name: __DirectiveLocation
types.description: A Directive can be adjacent to many parts of the GraphQL language, a __DirectiveLocation describes one such possible adjacencies.

enumValues.name: QUERY
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a query operation.

enumValues.name: MUTATION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a mutation operation.

enumValues.name: SUBSCRIPTION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a subscription operation.

enumValues.name: FIELD
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a field.

enumValues.name: FRAGMENT_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a fragment definition.

enumValues.name: FRAGMENT_SPREAD
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a fragment spread.

enumValues.name: INLINE_FRAGMENT
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an inline fragment.

enumValues.name: VARIABLE_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a variable definition.

enumValues.name: SCHEMA
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a schema definition.

enumValues.name: SCALAR
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a scalar definition.

enumValues.name: OBJECT
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an object type definition.

enumValues.name: FIELD_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a field definition.

enumValues.name: ARGUMENT_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an argument definition.

enumValues.name: INTERFACE
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an interface definition.

enumValues.name: UNION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a union definition.

enumValues.name: ENUM
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an enum definition.

enumValues.name: ENUM_VALUE
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an enum value definition.

enumValues.name: INPUT_OBJECT
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an input object type definition.

enumValues.name: INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an input object field definition.

directives.name: include
directives.description: Directs the executor to include this field or fragment only when the `if` argument is true.

args.name: if
args.description: Included when true.

directives.name: skip
directives.description: Directs the executor to skip this field or fragment when the `if` argument is true.

args.name: if
args.description: Skipped when true.

directives.name: deprecated
directives.description: Marks an element of a GraphQL schema as no longer supported.

args.name: reason
args.description: Explains why this element was deprecated, usually also including a suggestion for how to access supported similar data. Formatted using the Markdown syntax, as specified by [CommonMark](https://commonmark.org/).

directives.name: specifiedBy
directives.description: Exposes a URL that specifies the behavior of this scalar.

args.name: url
args.description: The URL that specifies the behavior of this scalar.

directives.name: oneOf
directives.description: Indicates exactly one field must be supplied and this field must not be `null`.
